When Lauren Boebert suddenly announced that she was packing up her bags and leaving Western Colorado, we were all shocked. But maybe we shouldn’t have been.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84783970/472608170/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzYwODY5My1mMjBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gMsErMpYfM9kD3LWe3raBCTdo_EVGGWfEQvq9vDfJIM=&emci=2165de95-db0f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=5c608693-f20f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84783971/472608177/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzYwODY5My1mMjBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gMsErMpYfM9kD3LWe3raBCTdo_EVGGWfEQvq9vDfJIM=&emci=2165de95-db0f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=5c608693-f20f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
When Lauren Boebert suddenly announced that she was packing up her bags and leaving Western Colorado, we were all shocked. But maybe we shouldn’t have been.
My husband Adam Frisch ran against Boebert in 2022 and came just 546 votes short of defeating her. Our family, campaign team, and all of our volunteers had worked hard – very hard. Adam drove over 24,000 miles with our son Felix meeting with voters across the entire district. But ultimately, we were out-spent and came up short.
This past year, we decided to give it another go, and we’ve been working even harder than the last campaign. With support from grassroots donors like you, we were out-raising Boebert – and Adam had already driven _another_ 24,000 miles to listen to voters. It looked like we were heading for a win... so Lauren Boebert ran off scared.
**But with Boebert now out of the race, things are going to be harder.** We’ve got new Republican opponents who are trying to hide their extremism, and the Republican Super PACs are already circling to try to stop us from winning.
**This is a must-win House seat this November. Ours was the closest race in the entire country in 2022. But if Adam is going to win this critical House seat and replace Lauren Boebert in Congress, we’re counting on grassroots donors like you to give now:**
[**Please, can Adam count on you to chip in $5 or more right now – whatever you can afford to give before midnight tonight – to help him finish the job, win this critical House seat, and replace Lauren Boebert in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84783972/472608182/1610638071?refcode=em20240511pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=5c608693-f20f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzYwODY5My1mMjBmLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gMsErMpYfM9kD3LWe3raBCTdo_EVGGWfEQvq9vDfJIM=)

name: Mucarsel-Powell, Debbie
subject: this is my story, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
what the American Dream means to me
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84784789/472629257/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1201-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWRiNGEzZGItZjgwZi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wAwdUIVfMoICvASXpL6ijMp_bawOC7JlVpxAYCpuamc=)
Hi there, friend, it's Debbie. If you don't know me already, I'm the Democrat running to defeat Sen. Rick Scott in Florida.
I'm about to ask you to make a donation to support my grassroots campaign. But first, I'm hoping you'll let me tell you a story about doughnuts and the American Dream. [**(If you're short on time and ready to chip in, you can click here to help me flip Florida blue!)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84784790/472629258/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1201-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWRiNGEzZGItZjgwZi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wAwdUIVfMoICvASXpL6ijMp_bawOC7JlVpxAYCpuamc=)
When I was 14 years old, my mother, my sisters, and I left our home in Ecuador in the hope of achieving our American Dream. As I adjusted to life and high school in a new country, my mom worked double shifts to support our family. But even still, it was a struggle to pay the bills and afford rent for our small, one room apartment.
When I turned 15, I got a job at a local doughnut shop. **It was hard work, but it's what my family needed to make ends meet.**
I'm not the only one who got their start in the doughnut business. When he was a young man, my opponent, Rick Scott, **_bought_** two doughnut shops.

While I was a teen making minimum wage to help keep the lights on at home, Rick Scott was an owner.

**For me, the doughnuts represent a lifeline that helped my family afford rent. ****For Rick Scott, they represent the beginning of his private corporate career.**
I went on to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant ever elected to Congress. Rick Scott went on to oversee the largest Medicare fraud in the nation’s history, amass a fortune of hundreds of millions, and buy a Senate seat.

If you ask me, our differing stories in the doughnut business make the differences between us pretty clear.
**I know we can win — and new polling data shows our campaign 4 points ahead! But Rick Scott spent $64 million to buy this seat in 2018 and has already written _six-figure_ personal checks to his campaign this time around.** **[I can't win this race without your help. So please, if you have anything to spare, will you rush $5 now to defeat Rick Scott and give Floridians the leadership they deserve?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84784791/472629259/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1201-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWRiNGEzZGItZjgwZi1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wAwdUIVfMoICvASXpL6ijMp_bawOC7JlVpxAYCpuamc=)**

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

When he was a young man, my opponent, Rick Scott, bought two doughnut shops. While I was a teen making minimum wage to help keep the lights on at home, Rick Scott was an owner. For me, the doughnuts represent a lifeline that helped my family afford rent. For Rick Scott, they represent the beginning of his private corporate career. I went on to graduate college and become the first South American immigrant ever elected to Congress. Rick Scott went on to oversee the largest Medicare fraud in the nation’s history, amass a fortune of hundreds of millions, and buy a Senate seat. If you ask me, our differing stories in the doughnut business make the differences between us pretty clear. I know we can win — and new polling data shows our campaign 4 points ahead! But Rick Scott spent $64 million to buy this seat in 2018 and has already written six-figure personal checks to his campaign this time around. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for taking the time to read this email and for all that you do to power my grassroots campaign. With gratitude, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend — We are just 4 days from our mid-month fundraising deadline.

[Before I explain why this deadline is so important, will you chip in a split donation of $10 between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign today to support my campaign?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67641?t=6&akid=14361%2E878179%2EU_zJez) | [DONATE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67641?t=7&akid=14361%2E878179%2EU_zJez)
---
May is just 6 months from November, which means that **we don’t have time to fall behind** on our fundraising goals.

Hitting each fundraising goal, or _falling short,_ will produce one of two possible narratives — that grassroots Democrats are doing everything possible to defeat Trump, or if _we’re leaving the door cracked open for his return._

I’m going to be honest with you — we are a bit behind on our goal this month.

But I’m not worried because I know I can rely on this team to always show up. From the beginning of my campaign, I’ve counted on our team to fuel our efforts to fight back against MAGA extremists and build the biggest grassroots movement California has ever seen.

This team has gotten me this far, and I know they can carry me through the election.

[With all of this being said, will you rush a split donation today between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign to get us back on track to reach our mid-month fundraising goal?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67641?t=8&akid=14361%2E878179%2EU_zJez)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67642?t=9&akid=14361%2E878179%2EU_zJez)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67643?t=10&akid=14361%2E878179%2EU_zJez)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67644?t=11&akid=14361%2E878179%2EU_zJez)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67645?t=12&akid=14361%2E878179%2EU_zJez)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67641?t=13&akid=14361%2E878179%2EU_zJez)
We can’t give the GOP any leverage to say that this campaign is weak or losing momentum. With your help, we won’t.

Thank you for everything.

— Adam
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=14361%2E878179%2EU_zJez). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=14361%2E878179%2EU_zJez).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=14361%2E878179%2EU_zJez) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=14361%2E878179%2EU_zJez). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=14361%2E878179%2EU_zJez)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=14361%2E878179%2EU_zJez)

name: Congressman Wesley Hunt
subject: Two Words:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Socialist Mayhem

| [](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=c35a71d8ea214e0e89ed77c43058bb35&_e=D3hx1gMRwjkpxXRYh9IU0JLhAe66KoOWdTF2R4n-85J0BBkSNH2sSDXvGv81mpMqTONbms1t8KHti6lt66TgbKQYv_Xo1QU2DIGF73LmQXFaA3Zn7xW6n5e0R1ZIxH6tj2P68W-4jGznDbaBGsduqRp5Jlo7Qkrwckjytx1M3lQZxo37jaRe2GFTXDWSDx1-DALtl3Z4HlPMf_8pkO7P4HCXZN9kaBry5LJxnUJpFT4Id2ls7OZYd2c9HQTs0lYTCJCwxUGhdX56jghZ_0gtIv-5FLV1Q-eSn4l892dXZtwgfwF17vVJpIGNWTFesUP1gjTFUw0v6WX4-ECtzJJEGA%3D%3D)
---
American Patriot,

_****THIS IS DISTRESSING.****_

November is coming fast, and you know what's going to happen if I lose. Two words:
| [**SOCIALIST MAYHEM**](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=c35a71d8ea214e0e89ed77c43058bb35&_e=D3hx1gMRwjkpxXRYh9IU0JLhAe66KoOWdTF2R4n-85J0BBkSNH2sSDXvGv81mpMqTONbms1t8KHti6lt66TgbKQYv_Xo1QU2DIGF73LmQXFaA3Zn7xW6n5e0R1ZIxH6t43bDsTI705J-9G8o60-9TBSkj45zY5y3xh3zeF3seDDmPpHRcIvdEkbZ4R3XvHVDUUCfZTVxPq8AgDiJV4xCjPAzLk42aP8ME303ePS0jD6p-8Jlxs1iyh4vXBDQHpH-SgyIq3TS569Xey_DOoh5ALaGojQeBWnjTghYm2_cyML9_ftpU09-1pmzMZbr1CTPAoCslsRT-QtSQgt0DefdTg%3D%3D)
---

**We cannot afford to lose a single seat in the House. Not even one.**

Biden got his opportunity to run this country into the ground, and he's outdone himself. It's time to reverse the damage.

****[**Help me keep the House RED. The results of this election will seal our fate. We don 't have time to take chances. **](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=c35a71d8ea214e0e89ed77c43058bb35&_e=D3hx1gMRwjkpxXRYh9IU0JLhAe66KoOWdTF2R4n-85J0BBkSNH2sSDXvGv81mpMqTONbms1t8KHti6lt66TgbKQYv_Xo1QU2DIGF73LmQXFaA3Zn7xW6n5e0R1ZIxH6tj2P68W-4jGznDbaBGsduqRp5Jlo7Qkrwckjytx1M3lQewiPQ8vXBM8XAb82m6_Vafx8l6FcLa0eXIe0asi44a84AoUV9IpZRwOZP8l6VmQLWKFCbj9NMpppg3AztpgZRAy3quY3jQ5DnigXNsGDczZcueIQ1cySTfEOTsmYPkQmR7BbjJTo6dfxkbmFV0MKk1KIeWWBG6ite4i2uJf2G5A%3D%3D)****

[**CHIP IN $3**](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=c35a71d8ea214e0e89ed77c43058bb35&_e=D3hx1gMRwjkpxXRYh9IU0JLhAe66KoOWdTF2R4n-85J0BBkSNH2sSDXvGv81mpMqTONbms1t8KHti6lt66TgbKQYv_Xo1QU2DIGF73LmQXFaA3Zn7xW6n5e0R1ZIxH6tj2P68W-4jGznDbaBGsduqRp5Jlo7Qkrwckjytx1M3lSdQCFMSnbCFnHqfXwWO1KARTU_VEWp8Amz2CwCro1hndeChCDjByUKEegUFpTVjdNOO1_-1G2ZLLt2oF3XYWJKLF-ct12tZtWNfPD1rw2-B5FDlUGhY1-oWioEyQPjmqqA3qLI-TaE3qlbIsiDO9v21PxYD7IKQpd5FLnJmH4RvQ%3D%3D)
---

Be a patriot. Keep the Majority. Make a difference.

_Congressman Wesley Hunt_
[](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=c35a71d8ea214e0e89ed77c43058bb35&_e=D3hx1gMRwjkpxXRYh9IU0JLhAe66KoOWdTF2R4n-85J0BBkSNH2sSDXvGv81mpMqTONbms1t8KHti6lt66TgbKQYv_Xo1QU2DIGF73LmQXFaA3Zn7xW6n5e0R1ZIxH6tGx7nSvTUIFfF9l5L-QSjZi8WIxy3R13wjSrXYyEQqP4UTKcUgh-8-J_XyfWnBWQl74ClbAaReO7W19laP8_6sDHxEFoiXfSjImXjr-eLzh4Xde91MgcA071BPBLKGoqWvaUymkrJY-4zb4eHzBFf6L959ChHaSCzKgP4ORjDVjzwXeuaohgFTsbF8EXqbZAb)

**_Changing Washington won 't be easy, but graduating from West Point and serving in the United States Army, being deployed to combat zones, and flying Apache helicopters over Iraq has prepared me for tough fights and big challenges.

I truly believe nothing is more worth fighting for than our great country and our way of life in the Houston area._**********

clean_body: Socialist Mayhem | American Patriot, **THIS IS DISTRESSING. November is coming fast, and you know what's going to happen if I lose. Two words: | We cannot afford to lose a single seat in the House. Not even one. Biden got his opportunity to run this country into the ground, and he's outdone himself. It's time to reverse the damage. Be a patriot. Keep the Majority. Make a difference. Congressman Wesley Hunt Changing Washington won 't be easy, but graduating from West Point and serving in the United States Army, being deployed to combat zones, and flying Apache helicopters over Iraq has prepared me for tough fights and big challenges. I truly believe nothing is more worth fighting for than our great country and our way of life in the Houston area.******** Paid for by Hunt for Congress. name: Dianne Black
subject: A letter from Dianne Black
body:
As a mother of five and grandmother of three, I worry that the number one cause of death for American children is guns, and I would like to be in a position to do something about it. I support gun control, and being elected to the US House of Representatives would be a way to help make it happen. Ha
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/10OzgTzW5/c?w=tik7daot0zsNYRVUM9qm2grEhcyoc1v9-24Bjl-u43E.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzEwT3pnVHpXNT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImQ0ODdlYmZmLWQ3ZjUtNGFlYi1hZGIzLTFhZmNkMzc1NTliZiJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | From Dianne Black
---
| | As a mother of five and grandmother of three, I worry that the number one cause of death for American children is guns, and I would like to be in a position to do something about it. I support gun control, and being elected to the US House of Representatives would be a way to help make it happen. Happy Mother’s Day from the Mississippi Democratic nominee for Representative for MS-01. I am writing to ask you to please help North Mississippi Democrats get out the vote by donating to Friends of Dianne Black for US Congress. I support gun control and would vote in favor of removing guns of war from being sold in America and increasing background checks. We should not be selling guns to convicted felons or to domestic abusers, which can only be prevented by requiring background checks before every gun sale. If elected to Congress, I will vote to finish the job outlined by President Biden and pass universal background check legislation for firearm purchases. Vice President Kamala Harris, who is head of the White House Office of Gun Violence Prevention, recently said: “Every year, thousands of unlicensed gun dealers sell tens of thousands of guns without a background check, including to buyers who would have failed one - domestic abusers, violent felons and even children. This single gap in our federal background check system has caused unimaginable pain and suffering.” I am voting to reelect Biden and Harris on Nov. 5, 2024, because they are working to benefit the American people, especially our children, by addressing legislation for gun control. Still, they need a supportive Congress to pass legislation. I am your candidate from Mississippi’s 1st Congressional District.May I please have a donation from you for our democratic campaign? I am on the ballot, so I have a chance to win. Our campaign needs donations to print sample ballots to get out the vote up and down our Mississippi ballots in the 21 counties that comprise Mississippi’s 1st Congressional District.
* You can safely donate to Dianne Black using ActBlue, the Democrat Party’s official donation website at [www.actblue.com/donate/dblk](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/10OzgTzW5/c?w=inXMS0gyznIyF9XS5GfEHrwnQPqD-gzO0uXVei74QIE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2RibGsiLCJyIjoiMzdlYzM2NzctYTFmMy00NjM4LTg0ZmEtZjUwNjk5MGMyMDNkIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZDQ4N2ViZmYtZDdmNS00YWViLWFkYjMtMWFmY2QzNzU1OWJmIn0)
* Send a check to Friends of Dianne Black, PO Box 612, Olive Branch, MS 38654
* Cash App $dianneblackcongress (add your information, name, address, and place of employment for FEC reporting purposes).

My Volunteer Campaign Manager, Kelly Jacobs, and I have designated May as “May I please have a donation for my campaign for US House of Representatives month?” We have rarely contacted you asking for donations since we began in 2022, which we hope you have noticed. We send thank-you notes and don’t abuse our donors. Still, we need to raise $35,000 to invest in digital and radio advertisements to help all Mississippi Democrats on our 1st CD ballots, like President Biden and Vice President Harris. Government Representatives are elected to sit at the table where decisions are made about our laws and how to spend tax dollars. Please help Dianne Black for US Congress with a contribution today. Sincerely, Dianne BlackDemocratic nominee for US RepresentativePO Box 612, Olive Branch, MS 38654 901-282-9282[DianneBlackForCongress@gmail.com](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/10OzgTzW5/c?w=rMnMkAyVJ29PIBDCQ132ZDXdkt-5mesMatoq2PWNIqs.eyJ1IjoibWFpbHRvOkRpYW5uZUJsYWNrRm9yQ29uZ3Jlc3NAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiciI6IjM3ZWMzNjc3LWExZjMtNDYzOC04NGZhLWY1MDY5OTBjMjAzZCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImQ0ODdlYmZmLWQ3ZjUtNGFlYi1hZGIzLTFhZmNkMzc1NTliZiJ9)
---

My Volunteer Campaign Manager, Kelly Jacobs, and I have designated May as “May I please have a donation for my campaign for US House of Representatives month?” We have rarely contacted you asking for donations since we began in 2022, which we hope you have noticed. We send thank-you notes and don’t abuse our donors. Still, we need to raise $35,000 to invest in digital and radio advertisements to help all Mississippi Democrats on our 1st CD ballots, like President Biden and Vice President Harris. Government Representatives are elected to sit at the table where decisions are made about our laws and how to spend tax dollars. Please help Dianne Black for US Congress with a contribution today. Sincerely, Dianne BlackDemocratic nominee for US RepresentativePO Box 612, Olive Branch, MS 38654 901-282-9282 | | | | | | | | | | | | This email was sent from .

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Serving on the Judiciary Committee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=6437%2E5257348%2Edebw0g ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hey Derek, it’s me
again.

Normally I wouldn’t reach out to you twice in one day, but given Donald
Trump’s schedule of late, it’s not often that he’s been able to get out of
the courtroom and hit the campaign trail.

But he just did today, in South Jersey, so it’s critical that we not allow
the dozens of lies he just spout on stage to go unchallenged.

Derek, one thing
I’ve learned from the roles in which I’ve served — as an Assistant U.S.
Attorney, congressional committee chairman, impeachment manager, and
January 6 Committee member — is that our system of democratic governance
will only endure as long as our oath of office means something.

That is what this entire election is about — no matter what Trump tries to
distract us with.

Are we as good as our word?

Trump’s Supreme Court justice nominees told the Senate Judiciary Committee
that Roe v. Wade was 50 years of settled legal precedent.

Are we as good as our word?

Donald Trump has created with his lies, the Big Lie most of all, a
permission structure for MAGA Republicans to issue Orwellian denials of
facts, truths, and reality.

As a senior member of the House Judiciary Committee, I have made it a
mission to protect the rule of law and restore integrity to the courts —
particularly the highest court in the land, which has become a tragically
partisan institution.

In the Senate, the Judiciary Committee has the added responsibility of
confirming high-level appointments and making judicial confirmations.
Under Biden, we have made historic progress, for example, in confirming
more Black women to the federal judiciary than all previous presidential
administrations — combined.

For the good of the country, when we win this race and make it to the
United States Senate, we must do so with a Democratic majority and
President Biden in the White House — not fighting President Donald Trump
on right-wing appointments while being in the political minority. The
stakes are huge.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=may2024_abs_em.WQbX9u&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20240511_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=6437%2E5257348%2Edebw0g ]Derek,
I need your donation to help defeat Steve Garvey in California and protect
vulnerable Democrats across the country. Chip in to help respond to the
vicious lies Trump told at his rally this evening and elect Democrats in
November.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zekoi4qdckkftp4509k3iem3fpubcl6mm5bgc6n8_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg66oj6c1h2bs)

**_I made history._
**
When I **_LEFT_** the Democratic Party.

And after I stood up against the "tolerant" Left's REGIME,**they came after me. HARD.**

This is Tulsi Gabbard.

When I came to Congress for the first time in 2002, I saw with my own eyes what the Democratic party was...

an **_anti-American_** , **_woke_** , and **_cowardly_** group of _**ELITISTS**_ who fought for _**NOBODY**_ but themselves!

On their priority list, **Americans like you and I were at the very bottom.**

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za16ub0ap0cp01hg07s82imedcfknboljsoropl0_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg66oj6c1h2bs)
As a combat veteran and former Congresswoman, it's in my _blood_ to serve my country. So I stood up for the American _**PEOPLE!**_

And the Democrats branded me a **_TRAITOR._** They threw the entire kitchen sink at me, hoping I'd back down and leave the _**SWAMP**_ in shame.

But I will **_NEVER_** give up the fight to **_SAVE_** our country!

**_[And with fellow grassroots patriots like YOU by my side, I know we'll succeed.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn9gmudqcqeg1auik1mmr5al17niltak9jd6ihi0_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg66oj6c1h2bs)_**

---
This election, our entire **_COUNTRY_** is on the line, and we cannot afford to fail.

**_[Can I count on you to join me in the fight to DEFEAT the Democrats' America-LAST regime and get our country back on the right track?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze586qfogppkt3u32m5ios1v92kicojdnue52o38_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg66oj6c1h2bs)_**

name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcior7n8qqclkrtoopacpe6876us58qmda90ce08_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg6ep32clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9fpt4v7fg3eh5siuff4t77h7onos2em3fbl9h48_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg6ep32clh2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8rsee0pbgrooc7gp5tjfeppmqfh4anufgoe6668_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg6ep32clh2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

name: Tulsi Gabbard
subject: I made history.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND FREEDOM INC
body:
When I LEFT the Democratic Party.

| | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrghqc3nie10nr5j0hmp8qhfu08j4hiu8opke0qg_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg61o37c3h2bs)
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ztnn51tf1elh1lk1bcuoahfbssa6ppkae30jq9b0_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg61o37c3h2bs)

**_I made history._
**
When I **_LEFT_** the Democratic Party.

And after I stood up against the "tolerant" Left's REGIME,**they came after me. HARD.**

This is Tulsi Gabbard.

When I came to Congress for the first time in 2002, I saw with my own eyes what the Democratic party was...

an **_anti-American_** , **_woke_** , and **_cowardly_** group of _**ELITISTS**_ who fought for _**NOBODY**_ but themselves!

On their priority list, **Americans like you and I were at the very bottom.**

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh6i5d99fb0c92adtejs09goovmk0r3ol8agbru8_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg61o37c3h2bs)
As a combat veteran and former Congresswoman, it's in my _blood_ to serve my country. So I stood up for the American _**PEOPLE!**_

And the Democrats branded me a **_TRAITOR._** They threw the entire kitchen sink at me, hoping I'd back down and leave the _**SWAMP**_ in shame.

But I will **_NEVER_** give up the fight to **_SAVE_** our country!

**_[And with fellow grassroots patriots like YOU by my side, I know we'll succeed.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1d6oc57m34gc3om2gudtjefs0g85uoajenf85p8_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg61o37c3h2bs)_**
| | [CHIP IN TODAY: SAVE AMERICA](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmrcfuqvup4c1kfluuqkitjmbqfsor20p71hbgj8_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg61o37c3h2bs)
---
This election, our entire **_COUNTRY_** is on the line, and we cannot afford to fail.

**_[Can I count on you to join me in the fight to DEFEAT the Democrats' America-LAST regime and get our country back on the right track?](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfbc52ri6jqc1f1mueki2qcnpf2jjhc3f7rc8tl8_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg61o37c3h2bs)_**

name: Byron Donalds, Co-Chairman
subject: Concerning GOP Ballot Harvesting...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
As Co-Chair of one of the most important initiatives of the Republican Party, I wanted you to what we’re doing right now to lay the groundwork for the biggest GOP landslide in AMERICAN HISTORY!

| |

---
| | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgl0kk546dhg06mukpuee2tdinev5rmdo06hgo2g_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg61o35chh2bs "Byron Donalds")
---

Hey - my name is Byron Donalds.

As Co-Chair of one of the most important initiatives of the Republican Party, I wanted you to what we're doing right now to lay the groundwork for the biggest GOP landslide in AMERICAN HISTORY!

_**[A lot goes into building the most powerful election-winning machine our country has ever seen- so bear with me for a minute:](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd9n9uhculcqb2780khra4tntus5sdtoqaup2ba8_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg61o35chh2bs "A lot goes into building the most powerful election-winning machine our country has ever seen – so bear with me for a minute:")**_

-> If the Democrat Legal Machine tries any shenanigans, we'll be there to stop them
-> If Liberals can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
-> If they're sending poll watchers, we should send an army of our own
-> We're not pandering to minority voters, we're building relationships with them
-> We're expanding GOTV efforts to get young Conservatives to the ballot box
-> We're fighting bad election laws to make it easier to vote but harder to cheat

These are the nuts and bolts of winning campaigns up and down the ballot. And I'm proud to help lead these efforts.

As Conservatives, we have the issues on our side. We are the only commonsense Party. **If we get these campaign operations right, the Democrats are in serious trouble come election day.**

_But I have to be honest with you: building this level of infrastructure is very expensive._ We're running ads in costly swing-state markets, printing campaign literature, filling up gas tanks to knock doors, recruiting volunteers, and scaling up our voter contact programs.

And unlike the Democrats, we don't rely on Liberal billionaires and rich celebrities for funding.

I'm perfectly okay with that. But it means if we want to WIN BIG, the burden falls on all of us to step up. _**[That's why I'm coming to you now - would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks to help kick start these efforts? Whether it's 10 bucks or 100 bucks, I only ask that everyone pitches in SOMETHING.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvthb0tvjtkdj568j15g3vfda6s2lklo3m8ih628_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg61o35chh2bs "That’s why I’m coming to you now – would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks to help kick start these efforts? Whether it’s 10 bucks or 100 bucks, I only ask that everyone pitches in SOMETHING.")**_

Look,

**I know it 's a lot to ask but I GUARANTEE it'll all be worth it when we expand our Conservative Majority, take back control of the Senate, and win the White House.**

I don't know about you but the thought of unified Republican control fires me up! If that doesn't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?
---
| | | [PLEASE: PITCH IN 10 BUCKS](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkjngfj2qitts1acur3ejeq14hrpgta2mnfua8g8_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg61o35chh2bs "PLEASE: PITCH IN 10 BUCKS")
---
| | | [PLEASE: PITCH IN 25 BUCKS](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zoehm2tk54lk6dbqrbe4p7jfme6qgbrvjc0bb4m0_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg61o35chh2bs "PLEASE: PITCH IN 25 BUCKS")
---
| | | [PLEASE: PITCH IN 50 BUCKS](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkhbro1f3t3m7qicgtfhdue7m2jinnj6pd5sqpig_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg61o35chh2bs "PLEASE: PITCH IN 50 BUCKS")
---
| | | [PLEASE: PITCH IN 100 BUCKS](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zseofeh6uvr2qsqfaccntfmsvijvlv0s6g3b3pko_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg61o35chh2bs "PLEASE: PITCH IN 100 BUCKS")
---
Before I go, I'll just say this:

The Democrat Party is spending more money - and spending it earlier - than we've ever seen before. They know they are LOSING on the issues.

That's why they're compensating by raising astronomical sums of money, plastering social media with Liberal propaganda, and unleashing the powers of our Federal Government to attack Conservatives.

**But make no mistake: there are a lot more of US than there are of THEM!_[So if every Conservative in America steps up, there is nothing we can't do. So will you do your part when we need you the most?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztqq8o4afn591jnp4r12ih51qi0ctdgmbncptj48_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg61o35chh2bs "So if every Conservative in America steps up, there is nothing we can’t do. So will you do your part when we need you the most?")_**

I hope you'll join us. I really do.

Thank you,
Byron Donalds

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrnq2k1gqr60pt4g7skdc0bjc202jpf2hh0omcl0_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg61o35chh2bs "Please take my Election Year Check-In!")
---

This is Steve Scalise.

As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhd59drj0h7gm51a8kij8cm4pl2tld4fsc54dt90_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg61o35chh2bs "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | [START MY ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN >>](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zojmi47r0le6lh5v7a6r3ubmm6v75di9o9q846so_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg61o35chh2bs "START MY ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN")

subject: Establishment Republicans are afraid to say it, but I will:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Crane For Congress
body:

---

---

Every establishment Republican is afraid to say it, but I will:
**There are __SERIOUS__ questions about Election integrity. **
They'll call me a liar. They'll probably even try to _censor_ this email.

So what happens today will decide everything.

My name is Eli Crane - you might not know me, but I'm a Navy SEAL, a businessman, a husband, a father, and a humble servant of God.

I'm also the Pro-Trump, Pro-America conservative who represents AZ-02 - the biggest race on the map.

The Democrats hate me & want me silenced. Hell, many of the Republicans want me silenced too. **_The Establishment and anti-Trump haters will do ANYTHING to destroy me. There is no time left._**

They have all the power & resources they need, and that's why I'm humbly swallowing my pride to ask you for help today.

**[Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2592adm4k61cudksnc98g7q5ulsf478pot1v8pg_rp22sh2s8i6ep35clg69o72cph2bs "Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?")**

---

Look, I'm a Navy SEAL. I've been on 5 war-time deployments - I'm the last guy who normally asks for help, but if this text message doesn't work, it's over.

Thank you for standing up for what's right.

God bless you. - Eli

name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDkyNzEifQ/97MkQswEzKFuXBVnDn1aGQ)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here.

You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY— but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders.

**This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.**

The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of the D-Day invasion, the American Veterans Center is bringing the Parade BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as a T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country.

**[Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDkyNzEifQ/EtyNk5NPf81z3d4se-JLpw)**
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDkyNzEifQ/xqfwpyFfvliWPHcHIkhcRA)
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDkyNzEifQ/D62wy9Eew5C4AHdpnTsexw)
---

---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDkyNzEifQ/CfVrtaifJI_Ik1U_bq5IDA)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.
* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDkyNzEifQ/35Bt5FXP8Vy2y_QgnvhxSQ) If you’ve been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best ways you could possibly do it.

**And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get.**

You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C. for the parade is difficult.

I am honored to say that we will have several World War II veterans with us for this year’s parade... but I don’t know how many more years we’ll have that precious opportunity.

So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of the D-Day invasion and what might be the last chance these great men have to gather together, **I encourage you to help us honor them while we still have them with us.**

And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms.

Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country.
Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country.

_I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._

**Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please —[if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDkyNzEifQ/L9yYi5eu0ULGSLBPFqY7Wg)**
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDkyNzEifQ/sPLXqSAyERLfv_X38Sk54A)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9RkZPNDkyNzEifQ/0iA4GJ7O_vqQKcSFt8YCww)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---
Freedom First Project P.O. Dan in Forrest Gump that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of the D-Day invasion, the American Veterans Center is bringing the Parade BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as a T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever. Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom. If you’ve been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best ways you could possibly do it. And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get. You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C. for the parade is difficult. I am honored to say that we will have several World War II veterans with us for this year’s parade... but I don’t know how many more years we’ll have that precious opportunity. So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of the D-Day invasion and what might be the last chance these great men have to gather together, I encourage you to help us honor them while we still have them with us. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please —** Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honorary Grand Marshal National Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201 Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztddrmbq1i9gvaqr0gesj76pk1u7lnd5ilve3tlo_rp22sh2s8i6ep35cli68or2c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zserum905idse8qqf42soped9mie6hag8hrnp15g_rp22sh2s8i6ep35cli68or2c1h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj0177k6m3g0j9e4bp8192sbf0rf98gl6jeq3u08_rp22sh2s8i6ep35cli68or2c1h2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgm33ts5niht2jhk64ofbjhk6lfe0t08ci03kbb0_rp22sh2s8i6ep35cli68or2c1h2bs)**

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Before they're gone
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zon13k3qqplv839oqq5o4p7kai3cooan2na7ijc0_rp22sh2s8i6ep35cli6cob6chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr0ics4hc4u1qlrb47qg9n8m6e51n9416iribvn0_rp22sh2s8i6ep35cli6cob6chh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z00akj5hg6mc3gh8gap9erjusqfqhkon4bv7onfg_rp22sh2s8i6ep35cli6cob6chh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm2900sa8ubrg0cp0g0rqpgdukqed8fantblr7d0_rp22sh2s8i6ep35cli6cob6chh2bs)**

name: Kevin Sorbo
subject: Hero Worship in The Fountainhead
body:
You probably didn’t expect this email from me.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zunor997kpnd09200196p7e5ku9lbp13ih7nc0tg_rp22sh2s8i6ep35cli62pb1c3h2bs) Friend,

You probably didn’t expect this email from me. It’s not about a new film or a political beef... but something deeper: philosophy and literature.

Like many of you, my wife Sam and I were deeply inspired by the novels of Ayn Rand, _The Fountainhead_ , and _Atlas Shrugged_. Sam identified with the character of Dagny Taggart fending off “moochers and looters,” while I connected with Howard Roark’s pursuit of artistic integrity.

It wasn’t until recently that I began to think of another one of Rand’s prophetic themes: her celebration of the masculine ideal — of strength, independence, and decisiveness as masculine virtues.

Yet today, masculinity is under attack — and has been for decades. No wonder so many boys and young men are feeling alienated, confused, and anxious.

First, we’re the butt of sitcom jokes. Eventually, the most masculine of us were considered “the bad guys.” Now, it seems like any form of masculinity is the "toxic" type.

>From the time these young men start attending school, they are lectured about their “male privilege” and inculcated with guilt as “oppressors,” even as they’re being marginalized and silenced themselves. What’s more, boys and girls alike are bombarded with messages in school and especially on social media about so-called “gender fluidity,” an ideological assault not just on masculinity and femininity but on the very concept of Objective Reality itself!

If young people could discover the literature of Ayn Rand — and her distinctly masculine heroes like John Galt and Howard Roark — perhaps they’d be inspired, as I was, to embrace masculinity and heroism and cultivate the personal virtues of reason, integrity, independence, and pride in achievement.

But here’s the rub: in the 1970s, 70% of young people were reading books every day for fun. Today, that percentage has plummeted to just 12%. How, then, to inspire young people to commit to reading a 1,000+ page novel?!

That’s where The Atlas Society comes in. Sam and I were introduced to the work of The Atlas Society by its CEO, Jennifer Grossman (JAG). We became friends with JAG when Sam and I lived in Southern California — I met her when I had to rescue her from a flat tire (talk about masculine virtue!). Joking aside, we were brought together by our shared admiration for the literature of Ayn Rand — and since then, have been actively involved with the organization: _with Sam emceeing their annual gala, appearing on panels, and joining in their weekly podcasts_.

What struck us about the approach of The Atlas Society was how they leverage art and technology to engage young people with Rand’s ideas — adapting her novels and screenplays into graphic novels, producing viral animated videos, hosting rollicking student conferences — that make philosophy fun and accessible.

**[I told Jennifer Anju Grossman (JAG), the CEO of The Atlas Society, that I would help them raise $30,000 this month. You can help them inspire young people to embrace their heroic nature by donating $10, $20, $50, or even $100 today.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr6k71e8o9i4eq13v9hnl9aaq9phlo5ko3tf64p0_rp22sh2s8i6ep35cli62pb1c3h2bs)**
[Donate](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5g0sud3u379p9v6ubngfbql8kljlknoir1mgj0o_rp22sh2s8i6ep35cli62pb1c3h2bs)
But I’ll tell you another reason Sam and I warmed to the work of The Atlas Society. It was an op-ed JAG published in The Wall Street Journal: “Can You Love God and Ayn Rand? As deeply devout Christians, we love Rand’s fierce defense of individualism and capitalism — but we part ways on the issue of faith. And for that reason, we appreciated the warm, and non-dogmatic attitude of The Atlas Society — welcoming religious and non-religious Ayn Rand fans alike.
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhr2o1mtpruipfj79ku3f3bve3jghtvb526rdnfo_rp22sh2s8i6ep35cli62pb1c3h2bs)
The Atlas Society’s programs have reached MILLIONS of young people through their events, graphic novels, and online content! Your generous donation will help them reach even more of the next generation with the virtues of reason, individualism, and achievement. Click any button to show your support.
[Donate $10](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8q8co95410d89sna32b8pmf2o819m9hp9gssr98_rp22sh2s8i6ep35cli62pb1c3h2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8atakr332ju991mpkvusijg9hmbjefp7t05l7k0_rp22sh2s8i6ep35cli62pb1c3h2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvalil5u9tvl05k7eg931bv1ukfv1rm4llqcnja8_rp22sh2s8i6ep35cli62pb1c3h2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2e6k9m7hhheu0cfh6ehocopvm61bd3ctq41llfo_rp22sh2s8i6ep35cli62pb1c3h2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh31kjv3oetncvrq4cgf981q1qhipldjorn3n1oo_rp22sh2s8i6ep35cli62pb1c3h2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeiviseain9lk995vdhqm2ejom45b84ilo3fe1pg_rp22sh2s8i6ep35cli62pb1c3h2bs)

[Donate ANY Amount](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgd3m5lr1ga5415vif78kpasahuehcogbc6uujcg_rp22sh2s8i6ep35cli62pb1c3h2bs)
The literature of Ayn Rand can help young people not only discover a new respect for men and masculine values — but for MAN as a heroic being, with reason as his only absolute and productive achievement as his noblest activity.

You can inspire the next generation to embrace their heroic nature by helping me raise $30,000 for The Atlas Society this month.

[Please click here to donate $10, $20.24, $48, or any amount you can generously afford today >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqae77j4p1tj7rv4gc8nuvfag8v6hn74ahqeq2ro_rp22sh2s8i6ep35cli62pb1c3h2bs)
[Donate](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrie5jajveip2h32gu4e2ubakm9v8ffsv5mg5ikg_rp22sh2s8i6ep35cli62pb1c3h2bs)
God bless,

Kevin Sorbo

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._

body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pK42rCImsevew3EoVauPtg~~/AARclAA~) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email—I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pK42rCImsevew3EoVauPtg~~/AARclAA~)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights—to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more—are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight—in which Hillsdale College is a leader—is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** —on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.—who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pK42rCImsevew3EoVauPtg~~/AARclAA~)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

Conservative Broadcast
---

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Happy Mother’s Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville Victory Fund
body:
I am reminded of a powerful quote today. Read more >>>
| | | Peter,

Good morning! I hope you’re enjoying a wonderful weekend.

I couldn’t let this special day pass without reaching out to wish a Happy Mother’s Day to ALL of the great Alabama moms, grandmothers, and mother figures out there... and I hope everyone else has something special planned to celebrate the mothers in your lives!

Today, I am reminded of a powerful quote from Abraham Lincoln, in a letter he penned reflecting on the impact of our parents in our lives.
**_“All that I am, or hope to be, I owe to my angel mother.”_**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/70f724346d7ea3d03947229f28c3afba/cf1b9241c3ab25a3c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
The love of my mother, Olive, who passed away back in 2016, is among the greatest blessings in my life. The amazing life and family my wife, Suzanne, and I have built together over the years is another true blessing for which I am grateful beyond measure.

Here’s to a wonderful Mother’s Day 2024 here in Alabama and across America!

\- Coach
---
| | Paid for by Tuberville Victory Fund.
---
| | id: 2024-05-02-13:08:07:957t
---

This email was sent by: Tommy Tuberville
PO Box 590012, Birmingham, AL, 35259
To view your profile center, go [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c&c=33013&jid=70f724346d7ea3d03947229f28c3afba)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Warning: It’s happening to families like yours

But to truly put a stop to this nonsense once and for all, we must win court victories like this in schools all over America.

| | Dear Fellow Conservative, We don’t know each other but today I’m urgently asking you to sign the [**STOP GROOMING CHILDREN IN SCHOOLS Petition**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2rCBG8gUXDN1SSKXoovf0A~~/AARclAA~/RgRoIyl4P0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvOTQ5NmVkNmMtODZjZC00ZmRjLTkxOGEtOTRlZDY0MWFhM2ZkP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDUxMl9CREdfQ0ZBTF9KRVNTMV9SRU5fUEEtUk9OVwNzcGNCCmYzYZBAZsnbX11SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) so you can make sure what happened to the Konen family, never happens to your family. [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2rCBG8gUXDN1SSKXoovf0A~~/AARclAA~/RgRoIyl4P0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvOTQ5NmVkNmMtODZjZC00ZmRjLTkxOGEtOTRlZDY0MWFhM2ZkP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDUxMl9CREdfQ0ZBTF9KRVNTMV9SRU5fUEEtUk9OVwNzcGNCCmYzYZBAZsnbX11SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Jessica Konen is a good mom. She has always been very involved in her daughter’s life. They’ve always talked. **But Jessica was shocked when she was called into her daughter’s middle school and informed by school administrators that her daughter, Alicia, was now a “boy.”** Jessica’s 12-year-old daughter’s school secretly pushed her into believing she was “transgender” and “bisexual.” Her 12-year-old didn’t even know what those words meant. But behind her mother’s back, they had _already_ given Alicia a new name, new pronouns, and were even having her use a new bathroom.And they told her to keep it a secret from her mother. They told her Jessica couldn’t be trusted. Now I want to pause right here – because right now maybe you’re thinking, **“ _My_ children and grandchildren would never fall for this nonsense.”** Or maybe you’re saying to yourself, **“This only happens when the parents aren’t involved.”**
---
| | I get it. I used to think that too. Until our phones started ringing with calls from so many good families across the country... families like yours. | [**Sign the Petition**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2rCBG8gUXDN1SSKXoovf0A~~/AARclAA~/RgRoIyl4P0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvOTQ5NmVkNmMtODZjZC00ZmRjLTkxOGEtOTRlZDY0MWFhM2ZkP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDUxMl9CREdfQ0ZBTF9KRVNTMV9SRU5fUEEtUk9OVwNzcGNCCmYzYZBAZsnbX11SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---

The radicals know what they’re doing.
They exploit the very innocence and trust that parents and grandparents work so hard to instill in their children.
They target kids, overwhelmingly young girls, who might be a little awkward or who don’t quite fit in...
...and they brainwash them with propaganda convincing them that their joy or salvation will come from a gender “transition.”
Then they whisper, “Now, don’t tell mom.”
Before I tell you the rest of the Konen family’s story...
[**Please follow this link right now to sign the STOP GROOMING CHILDREN IN SCHOOLS Petition.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2rCBG8gUXDN1SSKXoovf0A~~/AARclAA~/RgRoIyl4P0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvOTQ5NmVkNmMtODZjZC00ZmRjLTkxOGEtOTRlZDY0MWFhM2ZkP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDUxMl9CREdfQ0ZBTF9KRVNTMV9SRU5fUEEtUk9OVwNzcGNCCmYzYZBAZsnbX11SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
Schools keeping secrets from parents must stop.
California – where the Konens live – actually has a model policy in place _requiring_ schools to keep secrets from parents.
And when Jessica pushed back, when she asked questions about it – when she fought to free her beautiful little girl from their clutches... do you know what happened?
**Child Protective Services (CPS) showed up at her home to “interview” her children.**
We don’t know who “reported” Jessica to CPS but she got the message loud and clear – support this gender “transition” – or else.
In the end, the Konens were incredibly lucky. Jessica’s daughter, Alicia, came to see the truth and they were able to break free from the clutches of the transgender movement.
But that’s not how it ends for many, many families. Maybe even yours.
Maybe you’ve already had a Thanksgiving, Christmas, or other family gathering where a child you love suddenly showed up dressed as the opposite gender.
Maybe you’ve already been told you have to use their new name and non-sensical pronouns.
Maybe a child you love is begging for dangerous hormone therapies and permanent radical surgeries.
**And if you’re a grandparent who disagrees, there’s nothing you can do.**
**And if you’re a parent who resists, Child Protective Services comes knocking.**
Today, I’m writing because _there is something you can do_ and that’s to sign the **[STOP GROOMING CHILDREN IN SCHOOLS Petition](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2rCBG8gUXDN1SSKXoovf0A~~/AARclAA~/RgRoIyl4P0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvOTQ5NmVkNmMtODZjZC00ZmRjLTkxOGEtOTRlZDY0MWFhM2ZkP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDUxMl9CREdfQ0ZBTF9KRVNTMV9SRU5fUEEtUk9OVwNzcGNCCmYzYZBAZsnbX11SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** today.
After what Jessica and Alicia went through, it would have been easy to just walk away and put all this behind them. But they knew they had to take a stand or this would happen to another innocent child, another family, maybe even yours.
So, we took Jessica’s daughter’s school to court. We sued them for violating Jessica’s parental rights.
**And. We. Won.**
Now they’ll think twice before they keep secrets from other parents in other school districts.
But to truly put a stop to this nonsense once and for all, we must win court victories like this in schools _all_ _over_ _America_.
**[So after signing the STOP GROOMING CHILDREN IN SCHOOLS Petition, will you make a tax-deductible donation of $25 today?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2rCBG8gUXDN1SSKXoovf0A~~/AARclAA~/RgRoIyl4P0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvOTQ5NmVkNmMtODZjZC00ZmRjLTkxOGEtOTRlZDY0MWFhM2ZkP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDUxMl9CREdfQ0ZBTF9KRVNTMV9SRU5fUEEtUk9OVwNzcGNCCmYzYZBAZsnbX11SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**
Without the _Center for American Liberty’s_ lawyers and experience, Jessica never would have been able to launch a landmark lawsuit of this magnitude.
And you better believe, that’s exactly what the left is counting on.
Right now, the left freely targets children and families who are least likely to have the means to fight back.
And once they normalize their practice of “transitioning” kids in school and normalize taking kids out of the hands of parents who refuse to go along with these “transitions”...
It won’t be long until someone in your family gets called into the school office like Jessica did.
It won’t be long until Child Protective Services is knocking on the door of someone you love.
**[So please help us stop them by signing the STOP GROOMING CHILDREN IN SCHOOLS Petition and making your best tax-deductible donation today.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2rCBG8gUXDN1SSKXoovf0A~~/AARclAA~/RgRoIyl4P0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvOTQ5NmVkNmMtODZjZC00ZmRjLTkxOGEtOTRlZDY0MWFhM2ZkP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDUxMl9CREdfQ0ZBTF9KRVNTMV9SRU5fUEEtUk9OVwNzcGNCCmYzYZBAZsnbX11SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**
Taking these activists to court and making them pay is our most effective weapon.
Political pressure and new laws won’t work like dragging an activist into court and subjecting them to the real financial and legal consequences of their actions.
Thank you in advance for your support.
God Bless,
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2rCBG8gUXDN1SSKXoovf0A~~/AARclAA~/RgRoIyl4P0SWaHR0cHM6Ly9hbmVkb3QubGliZXJ0eWNlbnRlci5vcmcvOTQ5NmVkNmMtODZjZC00ZmRjLTkxOGEtOTRlZDY0MWFhM2ZkP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFTiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDUxMl9CREdfQ0ZBTF9KRVNTMV9SRU5fUEEtUk9OVwNzcGNCCmYzYZBAZsnbX11SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

Even in the Konen case against the unknown Spreckels Union School District, the giant left-leaning ACLU tried to get involved to crush us! name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=4864eeaed3fb45a4912230ecb4dbb66d&_e=hqKyPsX0LvV7X-0eSs9393IMG--1fepNcs9wCcZQZsb31tKmj4FzeAn8V6Kg7rcYy5dcrOuS6OtNcqupEd9M9WOZSlQKSiJusk0eRWBdezIC-xhAO845ilfWRqjKt4AXBbEo5i5VqStc0m5JZ8BAv9Tt5nd66TBvQbgxLR5t0afQAKZv5Zwl3Ln2yhG9pMRu4tVM1qajZQXchkvSdZj_x12UvBdw1vLn1lyNZZVeFAqGrSXmEPuY_hCEsAuP0s7LoqTVGPrYJUnlEy9G1J431l21BIAjEVGnZfn6ufVPyth680J87ismowqIYW5n1LEp2vOYvDi08dlSjoqe7HOxcXHs7esyMQL6uKhl0KSSAwPtHfTIFi3Uu5dolGvQH90-JUrqJ49e8Jff6mMubDV-CRRFoytL6tWqcGGoear9_Gk%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **" The Second World Wars."**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called " The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
