Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Department of Justice
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d5f9d01ba0b54178bd11cb227e76bb30&_e=n9VF3FcWV46WaYqxPRC5t1aOEBHoppqtyIulnFI2_ETVtH0eOCQ5jVh1l1QgmdTLUUA3cmttXF9JvjhuKnQvxPtLwG5Y_1xET6Do69SgDFS9llDAAmYlVqrPg8LdX6NRMRagGGkhCQF1xGthxLEEo2oH8rGWBgWJDSmlzQP_-mf3jbq29D3mD-98xpS5D3cREFi4y_mqTgSnsBGM_cOPBLhKJX7EjBZFu58tVHINSGWJ0PuwbSJlxF4vCA9XFaw4EaCl7j5yf2ANtaem7E3FFpKGlgeIKS2u5Zx3SaQFtZbCICPiE2axPcQAW83cT1lR7rCLLFgDcvrA2AJZn0kcG614aXASQgJxivwGv-USyzaG-e1qRgjGdPZ_0Chnqbf47prQJftiiNPHevtk6JgZHA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d5f9d01ba0b54178bd11cb227e76bb30&_e=n9VF3FcWV46WaYqxPRC5t1aOEBHoppqtyIulnFI2_ETVtH0eOCQ5jVh1l1QgmdTLUUA3cmttXF9JvjhuKnQvxPtLwG5Y_1xET6Do69SgDFS9llDAAmYlVqrPg8LdX6NRMRagGGkhCQF1xGthxLEEo2oH8rGWBgWJDSmlzQP_-mf3jbq29D3mD-98xpS5D3cREFi4y_mqTgSnsBGM_cOPBLhKJX7EjBZFu58tVHINSGWJ0PuwbSJlxF4vCA9XFaw4DJvtMyALtOPYxUc8zkN0y8ZDXcz9yr4TSXYM2hag6XFNVggJgQWDIf2T8x9BVqmh6U3utkPxkKqDvTw45Vz2pxlE5mD-PRUfMDXsHRsj60XCKl13S53MltZJ2Rnow5Sv1nDUEKbsN3YGecE_7Y8JAA%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d5f9d01ba0b54178bd11cb227e76bb30&_e=n9VF3FcWV46WaYqxPRC5t1aOEBHoppqtyIulnFI2_ETVtH0eOCQ5jVh1l1QgmdTLUUA3cmttXF9JvjhuKnQvxPtLwG5Y_1xET6Do69SgDFS9llDAAmYlVqrPg8LdX6NRMRagGGkhCQF1xGthxLEEo2oH8rGWBgWJDSmlzQP_-mf3jbq29D3mD-98xpS5D3cREFi4y_mqTgSnsBGM_cOPBLhKJX7EjBZFu58tVHINSGWJ0PuwbSJlxF4vCA9XFaw4FRgNvIOeTrq0hvu_ziS7-mRqdVsI0tB3dFTTP9bHQ0Ah3Ukya6mI6GnC2C1eAtDODydy-eH6wOhQ8NdMO0PGQHXZXdJ3Kr49Y-2PZM9Sm7QFXKwOFW81PHCLxVPDiKPK7nHuei0joCR0iyXNI24idQ%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9cfe469c148145658c038c1f7577c7f5&_e=v9mnaO_PjzQi0YI3Coq70TYZS3NVr8-WJjaSMiAljlktVABcpkzKNVgmmct5mkYhY3WZn67_0fHoj4zLD6kpX-wnkFStFhfBpK4HC-Nrak8RZ3D0onCwBSSChEZSim-vpOHBjyEufBifDLhvLCB02WSxiTxGsAhBrtBn0xQXlXDsMyK8T8E7B9x9N59-AITnSgQVsSDUiGm73oKzXaKfm0_YMHImI9DqrBi4b4plzj_OkBIWtu7KkmAOsyVXVQXcP-0SJUqNlBHWt5py2rZggqk2BgBlEOPmsbJgbwEAl69NrQLUZcmTdBSeV1TMscKTsoOV6DaSdCwwSL3YRGETOZ7N5WqfiYR9OIS4YPw2iCQ-zVwxEduYaR5TJ0jtB3wuW0HPuHlR8VWMZv_Fca8DYw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9cfe469c148145658c038c1f7577c7f5&_e=v9mnaO_PjzQi0YI3Coq70TYZS3NVr8-WJjaSMiAljlktVABcpkzKNVgmmct5mkYhY3WZn67_0fHoj4zLD6kpX-wnkFStFhfBpK4HC-Nrak8RZ3D0onCwBSSChEZSim-vpOHBjyEufBifDLhvLCB02WSxiTxGsAhBrtBn0xQXlXDsMyK8T8E7B9x9N59-AITnSgQVsSDUiGm73oKzXaKfm0_YMHImI9DqrBi4b4plzj_OkBIWtu7KkmAOsyVXVQXc2BmO_zMB9JtWnYw9nlnF2cVGeV-PpzNjrj5kOBBpPaKA0CNUd8JME-JG7HpMcXmBd0qy6bMy8yQwtOIYEd45U80PIUHejULzygkjfOzuVo2XWMZeRpmjcbV2W38NCmm_oLJzaQ2DnceGmdzQGcL4Cg%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9cfe469c148145658c038c1f7577c7f5&_e=v9mnaO_PjzQi0YI3Coq70TYZS3NVr8-WJjaSMiAljlktVABcpkzKNVgmmct5mkYhY3WZn67_0fHoj4zLD6kpX-wnkFStFhfBpK4HC-Nrak8RZ3D0onCwBSSChEZSim-vpOHBjyEufBifDLhvLCB02WSxiTxGsAhBrtBn0xQXlXDsMyK8T8E7B9x9N59-AITnSgQVsSDUiGm73oKzXaKfm0_YMHImI9DqrBi4b4plzj_OkBIWtu7KkmAOsyVXVQXcX4Gdy2bnHM4v03yhT-5dM7zFk9DxoCsjmxKksBUheZ-0DH-wMwxq9u-v3ebRsluHTO8CJuwG3g1LlqisOuGz5NVxGx92Woremo1TA0mS43Cej0zwpjMjwfEXLLh_gV2kVxyrmnW48jz6MX6-XhPPYg%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |
---

Conservatives Give
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9cfe469c148145658c038c1f7577c7f5&_e=lWEuWLbqS7W5FCS1677OresJQOGt4_1s7bakPIEyJcK8fqBvuvqaY0ziWTkwwGMM6omjpKmklOPFfL_bmhiGf6H5b2X9klMeQCo5zxC4XD4ivlccwOnO2CwabNxGlC1iaOK_dwYoDOOHJDIl7Xkw5VeIJ3J1pmBm6MNJynuj7Q9sHNy3i3cP1zT9dWhYLYEQSdRvetDnrbN4FNwK4M6t5JfzhlTygj5MktWwNJ0CFoxSHtZbzrf-D2m_6ROb3RBFtAXkBPpEcPkO-1cH5PiUiQ%3D%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9cfe469c148145658c038c1f7577c7f5&_e=v9mnaO_PjzQi0YI3Coq70dOa6hQCIxciFEzoMgMcparG0I9oC5d6jk-XijVq9JPvsBpcIaDBlPi4jykN_4kI9_VeI8uiXFDpiBHrlXArxi1aqAANaoVrE4z3gvV-m5JNhneqs13i5qvXJwomPt60nY-_q61wSvYA9GzYv8ttfs1cMls9ThKrvxGd1zdPr5QdK3wHSnfHkvx4ETgJu8hyYmtIAQiyKAtgoQrkylmCU04%3D)_

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e6cd63113304c52900eb46361ac4636&_e=xG3H1FmVwqFvRrCpsYT7sVJ0HMppt1dyL5jK736n2Tc8cloNHRpoIgfrAgvBHZaO_FcXexKw1QQNZnKVU-_6lpVNnkvrlMPi471bEQYbNy321Bb_9l8F7PbalSrX_LqhQtTAeRvwtC2sGjiJvsh4Cqy6OmrLeztd4vU-9oPThOCV1PKr7PhO0rPZBYkLrWdiIdk748_viyFpcfQusN5e4SYfegCwW_QK6c3CWw-wTA0jTTzIwAZG0wZYgmLnQuKC5APPwk1b_SyTMxf67wJ1pEKdvb0x-3ei7zr_ismxZeJfTKDKmsi9vSiHhvZAuHaa_iaLMmdz_b6Bwm3wq0PGCGuoZNDz8BhGjLay3oxswZCTGAJsyVxG-MP_qVJpbA9iMCmOWIgRINSGRGY3ArxHAPvFh_SUKDdZOcJ_W76AF24%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **" The Second World Wars."**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e6cd63113304c52900eb46361ac4636&_e=xG3H1FmVwqFvRrCpsYT7sVJ0HMppt1dyL5jK736n2Tc8cloNHRpoIgfrAgvBHZaO_FcXexKw1QQNZnKVU-_6lpVNnkvrlMPi471bEQYbNy321Bb_9l8F7PbalSrX_LqhQtTAeRvwtC2sGjiJvsh4Cqy6OmrLeztd4vU-9oPThOCV1PKr7PhO0rPZBYkLrWdiIdk748_viyFpcfQusN5e4SYfegCwW_QK6c3CWw-wTA0jTTzIwAZG0wZYgmLnQuKC5APPwk1b_SyTMxf67wJ1pPTMs3kLvX_JBt7WJgs-cTQyjDat7WowZnAznjeWDlrGotnziBPGj9ykIyC1fLNtsSrwOWyOmLm95rqOZBkmfosHwpPVOjfOOd05_2N4lNeaiLOYQA98IiDmqEL-3XbfI-yQxE52MOX8vbhF6ZW9Ua8%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" The Second World Wars"** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e6cd63113304c52900eb46361ac4636&_e=xG3H1FmVwqFvRrCpsYT7sVJ0HMppt1dyL5jK736n2Tc8cloNHRpoIgfrAgvBHZaO_FcXexKw1QQNZnKVU-_6lpVNnkvrlMPi471bEQYbNy321Bb_9l8F7PbalSrX_LqhQtTAeRvwtC2sGjiJvsh4Cqy6OmrLeztd4vU-9oPThOCV1PKr7PhO0rPZBYkLrWdiIdk748_viyFpcfQusN5e4SYfegCwW_QK6c3CWw-wTA0jTTzIwAZG0wZYgmLnQuKC5APPwk1b_SyTMxf67wJ1pOfL9YxCtIaFXSyJ7_TaQG5ScYeD02lypGf3AnXYdeU_r2LTX0X9rckLn-9TQu1ags_mg2DBtsrp0fXjhInhj-4-bDgTrRE8sdUeJiT6h5aGc1j52M5oIPWSpB1rfy1tFf1jsJToE6ZneJshB19Q9fo%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **" The Second World Wars"** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e6cd63113304c52900eb46361ac4636&_e=xG3H1FmVwqFvRrCpsYT7sVJ0HMppt1dyL5jK736n2Tc8cloNHRpoIgfrAgvBHZaO_FcXexKw1QQNZnKVU-_6lpVNnkvrlMPi471bEQYbNy321Bb_9l8F7PbalSrX_LqhQtTAeRvwtC2sGjiJvsh4Cqy6OmrLeztd4vU-9oPThOCV1PKr7PhO0rPZBYkLrWdiIdk748_viyFpcfQusN5e4SYfegCwW_QK6c3CWw-wTA0jTTzIwAZG0wZYgmLnQuKC5APPwk1b_SyTMxf67wJ1pAYMNUMP9XG1UI9mZKK2cDR5JBjE8kejM7UnDRYoOKDT7zFZOQMV0J-VQiAx12S_yL3cuiKeM2w-OHj0WcWVT3wD1pMr2RuY7cSbig-IAtuDJzHEuL0TZpJTn7RnCzUTYn-pwVfqoitmg93ErVcgyyA%3D)**

body:
Please particpate in this survey on the Department of Justice.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44f0e8f1c14d45e5a0b9b8f076c9b2bf&_e=Bt1EACfcrjxQtP5YbOTbZ8OtZA48IQV54VL_sAj4TvwCdR_-jJovUEBfVnPD4RgZ48-AQE51w0NAj-ow7XNYuGrgCdkwljYSyMSyezpWSarrb2hg1HZ4LTIUpuTuIhHMgKbtqrUK3TeeqS1De7NzMzOGzb6uOCQPn2rTpX9YMgTY-f2aWeLPTTYndicB39eyVe460cAEUVlnVpltKyxhB5RFPUCRftlaloGSF5Zvfe1RonN4ceE_H2objHuSOhJE1zMgVZTupF6DqFzXpXXaSuegFSwVcFo2XqOfa4zKWpFuPseaUVoFaToBPdJcT27WxvtghsO5mAHp3_LapWS3EDWcUVSyabubQAuGOXd8JrIo0qYWKEkgk1GZF_or9L519gfKocML5u4FyMgtMQ8CkA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44f0e8f1c14d45e5a0b9b8f076c9b2bf&_e=Bt1EACfcrjxQtP5YbOTbZ8OtZA48IQV54VL_sAj4TvwCdR_-jJovUEBfVnPD4RgZ48-AQE51w0NAj-ow7XNYuGrgCdkwljYSyMSyezpWSarrb2hg1HZ4LTIUpuTuIhHMgKbtqrUK3TeeqS1De7NzMzOGzb6uOCQPn2rTpX9YMgTY-f2aWeLPTTYndicB39eyVe460cAEUVlnVpltKyxhB5RFPUCRftlaloGSF5Zvfe1RonN4ceE_H2objHuSOhJEVkjUpqrg10Jm1ewb6oX_NW20ZaRwdpFoiJiOQKVCl3JTRBfxcwGomeJlie4Pysj_e83K1AJNueQ-_1YZiHPzNttd9qo3iT3gArpxo_q_9YM3MIwSxBk16kSVCX7DYE5kgEXht0U5Lq-Ot5j62DpNxg%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44f0e8f1c14d45e5a0b9b8f076c9b2bf&_e=Bt1EACfcrjxQtP5YbOTbZ8OtZA48IQV54VL_sAj4TvwCdR_-jJovUEBfVnPD4RgZ48-AQE51w0NAj-ow7XNYuGrgCdkwljYSyMSyezpWSarrb2hg1HZ4LTIUpuTuIhHMgKbtqrUK3TeeqS1De7NzMzOGzb6uOCQPn2rTpX9YMgTY-f2aWeLPTTYndicB39eyVe460cAEUVlnVpltKyxhB5RFPUCRftlaloGSF5Zvfe1RonN4ceE_H2objHuSOhJELj3oHJ-uxPZvG9s3-9bSjWCA8cgYxnAS7iz3eA2OhaDTDCGb1AzcapsFLVE7dOqUaojRNNGup-7YCC4W10beAz6TrK4XdDDWmqmLVlc5tnpYeJ7nXCbVG_cyc86x-Hl8SaU5-xLLrM5DdACEfC9oxw%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDkyNzMifQ/KVcjpkg8tWfx8PgBk5mE_A)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here.

You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI NY— but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders.

**This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.**

The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of the D-Day invasion, the American Veterans Center is bringing the Parade BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as a T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country.

**[Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDkyNzMifQ/tp11oHj1zW4vF5LthQwzaQ)**
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDkyNzMifQ/u8z1QgGcssTSuMcjRFxRHA)
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDkyNzMifQ/xQvrTGbns4Vo5QTYCc-iAg)
---

---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDkyNzMifQ/qyLcsDXI2EWeAxZO4S8hag)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.
* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDkyNzMifQ/BDY5xxifgSb633H20BHoGg) If you’ve been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best ways you could possibly do it.

**And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get.**

You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C. for the parade is difficult.

I am honored to say that we will have several World War II veterans with us for this year’s parade... but I don’t know how many more years we’ll have that precious opportunity.

So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of the D-Day invasion and what might be the last chance these great men have to gather together, **I encourage you to help us honor them while we still have them with us.**

And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms.

Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country.
Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country.

_I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._

**Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please —[if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDkyNzMifQ/PdJcIIXUJwEj97c1md8Esw)**
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDkyNzMifQ/xqE1CQf_ew3lTDdp8p__mw)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPNDkyNzMifQ/S9KJ104LgSHoHW6aG0Xvbg)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---
Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MTMzLWMyYWQ3YWFmMTBkMTQ5NmFhMmM4NjQ2OWI5NmNhMTk3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/hU-F6BbKJLgmqrMnPv22iQ) to unsubscribe.
---

body:
Colin Allred needs your help to defeat Ted Cruz and help protect our critical Senate majority.
| | | | |

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65166999-6f01-4cf9-b72a-37b9ff0fa41d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

---
| | | | | Peter, did you see this AMAZING headline? [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8deb0657-5be8-4c93-b2b3-33abd10ace04/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Ted Cruz won his last election by _just 2.6%_ , and right now, we've got the best shot in years to finally send him packing. [Will you chip in a split $20 donation between Colin and Blue Amp Action right now to help him reach enough voters to finally take down Ted Cruz? →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb05bc364-4ad6-4d96-b704-a564c196fc8f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---

| | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3c60967b-dc7b-4e7e-a275-eec17a6dc4dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | One thing's for certain: Ted and his extremist donors aren't going down without a fight – and now, FEC reports show that he's got more cash on hand than any other Republican Senate candidate in the country. **But here's the thing: this race is going to be EXPENSIVE, Peter.** If we want to send Ted Cruz on a permanent vacation, we need to build the largest grassroots team that Texas has ever seen, made up of passionate folks like you. **That's why Colin needs your help to reach his critical $500,000 fundraising deadline – and if we fall short, we might not have the resources to run the massive voter outreach operations we need to win.** [**Please: Will you rush $20 right now so that Colin and Blue Amp Action can hit this urgent goal, keep up with Ted Cruz's millions, and finally give Texans the leadership we deserve? If we can just reach enough voters before November, then we have a chance to stop Ted Cruz from getting six more disastrous years in the Senate.** →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1ae7ca4d-8b83-4958-90dc-53a3468f8c41/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2c75dc09-eabf-40df-94c3-c47d412918f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Happy Mother’s Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
My mother made me who I am today.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84789013/472650070/950179054?refcode=EM_C_240512mothers_N_SB_90DO_5_G_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDM5ZTUxMC01NTEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KSfLOrBalDujyXEfjUKm9pjK6aZ85Ny-hKAgEk4iEm0=) Peter, Happy Mother’s Day!

This Mother’s Day, I wanted to take a moment to reflect on my mother, the light and inspiration that has led me down this path today.

By instilling in me the importance of education and perseverance, my mother made me who I am today. I would not be sitting here as Ohio 11th’s Congresswoman without her, and I am eternally indebted to her for the example she set for me. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84789014/472650071/950179054?refcode=EM_C_240512mothers_N_SB_90DO_5_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDM5ZTUxMC01NTEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KSfLOrBalDujyXEfjUKm9pjK6aZ85Ny-hKAgEk4iEm0=) Thanks to my mother’s example, I have never allowed the barriers I’ve encountered to stop me from pursuing my goals and blazing my own path. Having her as a role model has inspired me to fight to ensure everyone has access to opportunities, regardless of their background, every day.

To all the incredible mothers out there, you’re appreciated more than you could ever imagine. Enjoy your special day.

Gratefully,

Shontel Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

clean_body: My mother made me who I am today. = Peter, Happy Mother’s Day! This Mother’s Day, I wanted to take a moment to reflect on my mother, the light and inspiration that has led me down this path today. By instilling in me the importance of education and perseverance, my mother made me who I am today. I would not be sitting here as Ohio 11th’s Congresswoman without her, and I am eternally indebted to her for the example she set for me. = Thanks to my mother’s example, I have never allowed the barriers I’ve encountered to stop me from pursuing my goals and blazing my own path. Having her as a role model has inspired me to fight to ensure everyone has access to opportunities, regardless of their background, every day. To all the incredible mothers out there, you’re appreciated more than you could ever imagine. Enjoy your special day. Gratefully, Shontel Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. Will you join her and be the change we need? = Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress 545 E Town Street Columbus, OH 43215 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| Happy Mother's Day!
On this special day dedicated to celebrating the extraordinary women who have shaped our lives, I want to take a moment to extend my heartfelt wishes to each and every mother.
In New Hampshire and across the country, mothers stand as pillars of support, compassion, and resilience. Your love knows no bounds, and your sacrifices do not go unnoticed.
---
| [](https://sxw89cgbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018PSKSQ2c9QnZ0ttSCHTP7AwXxoBHOZQWrtbKQrMNEN6zS0WgApk1DPjcyqOSLlExLOR-qoAhIm2f8SllvX9LJT4rnUEAypEmQL6d4iyQjR14pJmB7U5yfzYQIZ8rObpd_hAwZt8BgodmymPAwaUzENkznqX4KfJZ-AST97oSK7Q=&c=KczYFpaxsT9DtUsKy5F954E-AdH6xPEAunQna-QdtBlIHJrFxq_JsA==&ch=tkZbx7gs-w4QuSJfe6P_I5MUQED2k4HUldWT2vaiawLjB6oABCEcFg==)

| So, to all the mothers, grandmothers, stepmothers, foster mothers, and mother figures, I want to express my deepest gratitude and appreciation for all that you do.
You are cherished, loved, and celebrated not just today, but every day.
May this Mother's Day be filled with joy, love, and countless cherished moments with your loved ones.
Thank you,
Russell Prescott

| A note from Russell...
The people of New Hampshire are ready for a change in our representation in Congress, whether it's rising energy costs, the broken southern border, or a lack of support for our men and women in law enforcement. New Hampshire families know that our current leadership in Washington is failing us and have forgotten the 'Live Free or Die' values that we all pride ourselves on in New Hampshire. We need a fresh voice who has the business and elected experience to change the status quo. United, we can defeat Chris Pappas and bring real change to Washington.
Thank you.
-Russell

| Hey Peter —

It’s Matt here, Callie’s husband.

If you’re like me, you’re up early trying to throw together a Mother’s Day breakfast other than Pop Tarts. Callie’s hard work and dedication to our family and the lives of Upper and Northern Michiganders are motivating, and I couldn’t be prouder of the journey to Congress she’s decided to embark on for the sake of our democracy and our families.

Most of all, I admire her ability to juggle all that while being an _awesome_ mother to our daughters.

name: Marina Jenkins
subject: A quick note on what our work means for mothers and families
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Too many politicians are out-of-touch with what families actually need
|
---

_– We know Mother’s Day can be difficult for some, so please feel free to disregard the message below. Thank you! –_

Friends,
Happy Mother’s Day to all my fellow moms and motherly figures out there! I hope you all get a chance to celebrate with your loved ones and do something fun, relaxing, or whatever fills your cup. I’m looking forward to spending the day with my two kiddos, but wanted to reach out with a quick reflection on what our work on redistricting means for mothers and families across the country.
As I am sure you have noticed, too many politicians are making life harder – not easier – for moms, mother figures, and other caregivers. Reproductive freedom and access to reproductive health care is constantly under attack, parental leave is often too minimal (and unpaid) if offered at all, child care is costly and frequently out of reach, and so much more. It is deeply upsetting, and it makes All On The Line’s fight that much more important.
**Partisan gerrymandering enables politicians to be out-of-touch with what families actually need. If we don’t win fair maps, we cannot elect the right leaders who will actually reflect the priorities of the people they are meant to serve – namely, popular pro-family policies, like affordable and available healthcare, paid parental leave, and the right to decide when and whether to start or grow a family.**
These are all things we value, and they drive our fight to put an end to gerrymandering across the country.
[**To show your appreciation this Mother’s Day, can you chip in to help fund our efforts to secure fair maps and build a democracy that takes better care of our families? Do it for the moms!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84789717/472651584/608781345?refcode=don_aotl_redite_email_mayfun_email_20240512-AOTL-MothersDay-Marina_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlMTEyZDI4LTU3MTAtZWYxMS05NmYzLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Q7uiOoiN94eXvLM2PfQo3lUuNETViatAQcmP-yG2fBU=)

clean_body: Too many politicians are out-of-touch with what families actually need | – We know Mother’s Day can be difficult for some, so please feel free to disregard the message below. Thank you! – Friends, Happy Mother’s Day to all my fellow moms and motherly figures out there! I hope you all get a chance to celebrate with your loved ones and do something fun, relaxing, or whatever fills your cup. I’m looking forward to spending the day with my two kiddos, but wanted to reach out with a quick reflection on what our work on redistricting means for mothers and families across the country. As I am sure you have noticed, too many politicians are making life harder – not easier – for moms, mother figures, and other caregivers. Reproductive freedom and access to reproductive health care is constantly under attack, parental leave is often too minimal (and unpaid) if offered at all, child care is costly and frequently out of reach, and so much more. It is deeply upsetting, and it makes All On The Line’s fight that much more important. Partisan gerrymandering enables politicians to be out-of-touch with what families actually need. If we don’t win fair maps, we cannot elect the right leaders who will actually reflect the priorities of the people they are meant to serve – namely, popular pro-family policies, like affordable and available healthcare, paid parental leave, and the right to decide when and whether to start or grow a family. These are all things we value, and they drive our fight to put an end to gerrymandering across the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = I cannot thank you enough for your dedication to this cause, friends — and neither can moms across America. Thank you. – Marina Jenkins Executive Director, All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Every establishment Republican is afraid to say it, but I will:
**There are __SERIOUS__ questions about Election integrity. **
They'll call me a liar. They'll probably even try to _censor_ this email.

So what happens today will decide everything.

My name is Eli Crane - you might not know me, but I'm a Navy SEAL, a businessman, a husband, a father, and a humble servant of God.

I'm also the Pro-Trump, Pro-America conservative who represents AZ-02 - the biggest race on the map.

The Democrats hate me & want me silenced. Hell, many of the Republicans want me silenced too. **_The Establishment and anti-Trump haters will do ANYTHING to destroy me. There is no time left._**

| | Dear Fellow American, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.
---
| | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you.
---
| [](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4be0fcadb2a34160a82a66692619994a&_e=ikpn0Rlf1sL48ft1nIu0gQnn49wWs92h6CYswLT6zRpMObw_ii4QAdTn0PhUMBrT5bdkcLIMhMNiBIoiCCA-8oNpRhka89oXjTmgE2twZ7-LCNU4vOc4ybh5an2ricT_NrgYxrEqe1vmqcXpM2hVQpnHYl1mo5p3rpCbIFZqjHAUd3lVkjNSYhypb_rBH5aj0DWR7SeuKbET3Rrc7CPzExj8lJTXf0rahwoweOWkH4RsA0TP8WazLmlAROEj5_pdryS7Bn_HFxGPgeiMwH4wVPgM9mAsB8sEbmgeuCyYVLeUEGbcvpC5W0eCUxRcR3vJ5r8L6MJ0PDYHTL_I6Q_-3rflTc_iKsTQupQT9RRNUd2S-1e0Q-dLz7D4iksNt5YFf4ivUPZq3fMOcs12g2JyYg%3D%3D)

| | **[Today, I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4be0fcadb2a34160a82a66692619994a&_e=ikpn0Rlf1sL48ft1nIu0gQnn49wWs92h6CYswLT6zRpMObw_ii4QAdTn0PhUMBrT5bdkcLIMhMNiBIoiCCA-8oNpRhka89oXjTmgE2twZ7-LCNU4vOc4ybh5an2ricT_NrgYxrEqe1vmqcXpM2hVQpnHYl1mo5p3rpCbIFZqjHAUd3lVkjNSYhypb_rBH5aj0DWR7SeuKbET3Rrc7CPzExj8lJTXf0rahwoweOWkH4QdtKly5kvAxw4lyMaMyeAiNTyQb1o3hxfPPOboApW9TK8gQB_0ylon68cBN58Qpo_LkBuOaMkdzRscA--FKjd8LXApnRometmLcZD4wy097oQoKg__EupsRjAVuI8sqxKGQvudK4QsQOz_WbvkhY561iV-BxuNxqF9HjHgAjpKBg%3D%3D)** As of March 5th, it's official. I'm going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November. Democrat policies have brought America to its knees. There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And that's why I'm running for Senate. **_We Republicans_ pulled our country out of the 1970's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.** And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do. But there is no way I can pull it off without you. **[**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign of $35 or more today?**](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4be0fcadb2a34160a82a66692619994a&_e=ikpn0Rlf1sL48ft1nIu0gQnn49wWs92h6CYswLT6zRpMObw_ii4QAdTn0PhUMBrT5bdkcLIMhMNiBIoiCCA-8oNpRhka89oXjTmgE2twZ7-LCNU4vOc4ybh5an2ricT_NrgYxrEqe1vmqcXpM2hVQpnHYl1mo5p3rpCbIFZqjHAUd3lVkjNSYhypb_rBH5aj0DWR7SeuKbET3Rrc7CPzExj8lJTXf0rahwoweOWkH4T_oWtctAvRFLhPEoasEasyI00C4_HcUlecf4OcA8bY5l7Vs7xh9Yw9wWbiIFVbF_1oShBxSFwjeR_tL9zXuJAKSTPwkh670kQ7d38pq0SErzMuMddvYSfYw5ePM1dHOdCAUe3Jn2D4Dj1u2MRyJGYDySKZS4VV0T43hQIRQhSikg%3D%3D)** I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a _**Republican win**_. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... **...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs.** Thank you and God Bless,
---

But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you. | | | As of March 5th, it's official. I'm going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November. Democrat policies have brought America to its knees. There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And that's why I'm running for Senate. We Republicans pulled our country out of the 1970's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan. And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do. But there is no way I can pull it off without you. I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... ...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs. Thank you and God Bless, | | Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 | | This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails **** |

I’m sorry I’m emailing you so early. 😅 My days the last few weeks have been a lot of early mornings and late nights.

I’m starting to get a little worried about our election. Being outspent by a super PAC that shares a donor list with Donald Trump means we’re up against people who don’t like it when the candidates they donate to lose.

**_I mean, remember what happened the last time Trump lost?_** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84790190/472652277/-384126614?amount=&15amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.05.12_B1_Early_U2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTFiNmNhZGItNTcxMC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ddcaz70fL5yzzQ3y3Ka_Irvfdi9Y57eG4zWf_L-0dd0=) But I’m no stranger to “tough.”

I played football through college. I’m a single parent. I was a Capitol police officer.

I used my own two hands to protect our democracy on January 6 — probably one of the toughest things I’ve ever done.

I’m running for Congress because we need more tough folks in the House who will protect our democracy.

[**_My election is in just 2 days and we need your support to get out the vote in the final moments of this campaign. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: On Mother’s Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
#

---
Friends --
Happy Mother’s Day! To all the hard-working mothers out there, we know how much you do. I hope you’re spending the day with loved ones, or doing something that fills your cup.
If you’ve followed my campaigns at all over the last few years, you’ve probably heard a little bit about my mom—her story of coming out in the late 80s in suburban Detroit and our experience struggling to get healthcare when she was diagnosed with ovarian cancer in 2009.
My mom was lively, spirited, and ahead of her time in so many ways. She taught me to be independent, assertive, and to seek out opportunities to challenge myself, to push myself, and to grow. I’ll never forget sitting in the car on the way to school as she simultaneously gave me pep talks and put on a full face of makeup.
In the big moments, I think about the milestones I wish she was here to experience and the questions I wish I could ask her. I think about the pride she would have felt at the legalization of gay marriage in 2015, and the pain and indignity she would have felt following the fall of Roe v Wade, as someone who so believed in fighting for those rights the first time around.
My mom, and her experience when she got sick and didn’t have healthcare, is why I first ran for Congress. And it’s why I’m still in it today. So on this day, and every day, I’m grateful to all of the moms, step-moms, mothers-in-law, and grandmothers who are changing lives of those they are raising in big and small ways.
Happy Mother’s Day,
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1427%2E135344%2EDDhNUR).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: Warrior Moms Unite!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Happy Mother’s Day.

|
---

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mother_day_5_12_24_rs_a1&n=4)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
Like many of you, my relationship to my mom Ethel had its ups and downs.
Also like many of you, as I got older, I began to appreciate the extraordinary things my mother gave to our family.
One such epiphany occurred when I had six kids of my own. I remember becoming mystified about how my mother kept our family of eleven children together and on course after my father’s death.
In fact, I stand amazed and in awe of her each and every Mother’s Day, especially her admonition that “Kennedy’s never give up.”
I’ve taken that to heart.
Finally, from my family to yours, Happy Mother’s Day.
| |
---
---
Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
P.S. – [I’m thrilled that our campaign created an excellent variety of campaign wearables for our Warrior Mom and Grandmas.](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=Z7xtroXZRjfhUcu7j-58eHtIarQ-zcZxlEXKf7TAAPfYDuzb-A6H3c-KAKGkgsLrXaGY4HLb0mfZhnnwyZwwLS-FZM8gqlb49UVNWQwXjSRDIdzlDmbk9E9fcOz3-pOKfLn1G-cRByLUdi68W6-8OKJvEFflXo_vS3Fbz6kbveasKY4XPR0ne8Lp1vqIPBfW&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mother_day_5_12_24_rs_a1&n=5) They did a wonderful job honoring those women who are standing alongside our campaign for the White House!

name: Barb Lorinser's son
subject: Origin of Mother's Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Untitled%20design.png]
My mom, an orphan, overcame giant obstacles to become a union nurse and singlehandedly raise six kids.
We relied on government assistance at times, but her grit and tenacity kept food on the table and love in our home.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext]
Barb Lorinser was soft on the edges, but tempered with a spine of steel. Today, we celebrate all the resilient mothers and their unconditional love.
▶️ WATCH VIDEO ▶️ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext]
Friends,
The original concept of Mother's Day was rooted in the promotion of peace and advocacy for social justice. It holds a significant place in history.
It was a powerful movement that sought to establish women's equality with men, a cause that remains relevant today.
It was a day dedicated to activism and advocacy, a call to action for a more just society.
Let's honor this and all mothers for undertaking the most difficult, most important job on Earth. Let's celebrate the world's ultimate source of strength.
Happy Mother's Day.
Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
ABOUT MY UPBRINGING [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/altext]
Or, send a check to
Friends of Dr. Bob
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: B+L Weekly Reads: Crime is down, auto thefts still stubbornly high | Chester Co. post-covid analysis is lacking + More ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week. | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and Happy Mother's Day! Welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d27faf3e9e&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Crime in collar counties largely drops from ‘22 to ‘23, but auto thefts still stubbornly high](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b55beff7d6&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Todd Shepherd_
Crime in Philadelphia’s four suburban counties largely dropped in 2023 when compared to the previous year, but in a statistical sense, many of those gains are being wiped out by large numbers of auto thefts continuing to plague southeast Pennsylvania, according to a _Broad + Liberty_ analysis of the Pennsylvania Uniform Crime Reporting database.

But auto thefts continue to be the outlier in southeast Pennsylvania, with the spike that started in 2021 yet to be contained. Over the last two years, law enforcement officials all across the country have blamed a large part of the problem on a TikTok video that exposed security weaknesses in Kia and Hyundai cars, showing exactly how easy it was to break into those vehicles.

**Why It Matters**. A [Gallup poll from March](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0aa139935a&e=b7b3eddce2) showed crime is the second biggest concern for the country, right behind inflation. Even with the overall trends pointing down, crime still figures to be a prominent feature in the 2024 presidential, senate, and other races in Pennsylvania and across the country, with the election now exactly six months away.

**Quotable**. “The increase in auto thefts is something we continue to work on every day through investigations and initiatives, including steering wheel lock giveaways to help mitigate the number of thefts to the affected Hyundai or Kia models,” Bucks County District Attorney Jennifer Schorn said. “Last year, detectives and prosecutors with this office led the takedown of a massive catalytic converter theft ring that we are hopeful will serve as a deterrent to anyone considering stealing vehicle parts or vehicles in Bucks County.” **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4037069df2&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[What the Chester County post-Covid analysis doesn’t say](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=685c78f4b4&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Beth Ann Rosica_
Sometimes it’s what isn’t said that is most telling.
Chester County’s decision to conduct an “After Action Report” on its response to Covid-19 is laudable, yet also unfortunate in that the report failed to address the most controversial and embarrassing parts of the county’s response.

Through a Right to Know request, I obtained a copy of a report that Chester County commissioned to evaluate its response to Covid-19. Entitled Chester County Covid-19 Response After Action Report, the twenty-five page document identifies the county’s major strengths and major areas of improvement across eight categories.

The three county commissioners voted in October 2021 to approve a contract with outside vendor, Constant Associates, for over $144,000 to conduct the review. Despite this significant allotment of taxpayer funds, this report is not available to county residents unless they submit a Right to Know Request. It is unclear whether the report is available to county employees.

**Why It Matters**. While the report includes the types of recommendations you would expect, the absence of certain issues is most telling. For example, one of the eight sections of the report is dedicated to Laboratory Testing. The report fails to acknowledge the debacle of spending $13 million dollars on Covid tests that did not actually work. The county is still involved in a legal dispute over the issue.

With that amount of mismanagement of funds and poor decision making, it seems an important point to include in an after action report.

Also notably absent from the report is a discussion of the Health Department’s impact on children’s education and how that could have been handled differently. The report cites “communications with schools and healthcare organizations who were critical to information sharing and unified messaging during the pandemic” as a major strength. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=026782a53b&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **4\. Lightning Round**
* **[Rob Mercuri: The joy of family and the importance of maternal health](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f4ae818b7e&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Parents and children versus politicians and teachers unions](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0d26511816&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: Swami Nostradamus Virato and the New Frontier](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3f3fa7fc5a&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Ben Mannes: Congress comes to Philadelphia to investigate violent crime](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e34a9a4fde&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Christine Flowers: Welcome to my world, Michael Smerconish](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=db2c983d2d&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Andy Bloom: Pro-Palestinian protestors are misinformed](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=77852f4268&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
At the _Free Press_ this week, Kat Rosenfield looked at [the weird affection some on the left hold for Vice President Kamala Harris](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8cc4b44424&e=b7b3eddce2), despite the seeming lack of objective evidence that she deserves it. “As a longtime Democratic voter,” she writes, “I had serious concerns about Harris’s White House aspirations when she entered the national stage with a brief, abortive run for the presidency, during which she never consistently polled above 15 percent....Amid the unique madness of 2020, Kamala Harris seemed like, if not a great investment, then a tolerable associate. In 2024, the thought of her ascending to the presidency is enough to make a principled liberal nervous.”

clean_body: News + editorial to start your week. | | | | | | | Good morning and Happy Mother's Day! Welcome to Broad + Liberty 's Weekly Reads. and get the best of Broad + Liberty delivered straight to your inbox. | | 1. By Todd Shepherd Crime in Philadelphia’s four suburban counties largely dropped in 2023 when compared to the previous year, but in a statistical sense, many of those gains are being wiped out by large numbers of auto thefts continuing to plague southeast Pennsylvania, according to a Broad + Liberty analysis of the Pennsylvania Uniform Crime Reporting database. But auto thefts continue to be the outlier in southeast Pennsylvania, with the spike that started in 2021 yet to be contained. Over the last two years, law enforcement officials all across the country have blamed a large part of the problem on a TikTok video that exposed security weaknesses in Kia and Hyundai cars, showing exactly how easy it was to break into those vehicles. Why It Matters. A showed crime is the second biggest concern for the country, right behind inflation. Even with the overall trends pointing down, crime still figures to be a prominent feature in the 2024 presidential, senate, and other races in Pennsylvania and across the country, with the election now exactly six months away. Quotable. “The increase in auto thefts is something we continue to work on every day through investigations and initiatives, including steering wheel lock giveaways to help mitigate the number of thefts to the affected Hyundai or Kia models,” Bucks County District Attorney Jennifer Schorn said. “Last year, detectives and prosecutors with this office led the takedown of a massive catalytic converter theft ring that we are hopeful will serve as a deterrent to anyone considering stealing vehicle parts or vehicles in Bucks County.” | | 2. By Beth Ann Rosica Sometimes it’s what isn’t said that is most telling. Chester County’s decision to conduct an “After Action Report” on its response to Covid-19 is laudable, yet also unfortunate in that the report failed to address the most controversial and embarrassing parts of the county’s response. Through a Right to Know request, I obtained a copy of a report that Chester County commissioned to evaluate its response to Covid-19. Entitled Chester County Covid-19 Response After Action Report, the twenty-five page document identifies the county’s major strengths and major areas of improvement across eight categories. The three county commissioners voted in October 2021 to approve a contract with outside vendor, Constant Associates, for over $144,000 to conduct the review. Despite this significant allotment of taxpayer funds, this report is not available to county residents unless they submit a Right to Know Request. It is unclear whether the report is available to county employees. Why It Matters. While the report includes the types of recommendations you would expect, the absence of certain issues is most telling. For example, one of the eight sections of the report is dedicated to Laboratory Testing. The report fails to acknowledge the debacle of spending $13 million dollars on Covid tests that did not actually work. The county is still involved in a legal dispute over the issue. With that amount of mismanagement of funds and poor decision making, it seems an important point to include in an after action report. Also notably absent from the report is a discussion of the Health Department’s impact on children’s education and how that could have been handled differently. The report cites “communications with schools and healthcare organizations who were critical to information sharing and unified messaging during the pandemic” as a major strength. | | 4\. Lightning Round | 5\. What we're reading At the Free Press this week, Kat Rosenfield looked at , despite the seeming lack of objective evidence that she deserves it. “As a longtime Democratic voter,” she writes, “I had serious concerns about Harris’s White House aspirations when she entered the national stage with a brief, abortive run for the presidency, during which she never consistently polled above 15 percent....Amid the unique madness of 2020, Kamala Harris seemed like, if not a great investment, then a tolerable associate. In 2024, the thought of her ascending to the presidency is enough to make a principled liberal nervous.” | | Broad + Liberty is funded exclusively by readers like you. Your generous support ensures that Broad + Liberty can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com. As always, gifts made to Broad + Liberty are 100% tax deductible! Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you. With gratitude, — The Editors at Broad + Liberty | | "Support Broad + Liberty" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2024 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved. You're getting Broad + Liberty updates due to your interest in our site -- and stories for free thinkers in the Philly region and beyond. To all the incredible mothers and grandmothers out there, I want to wish a happy Mother’s Day!

But I especially want to thank three women in my life: my mother, my mother-in-law and my wife.

My mother risked everything to come to America with me from communist Vietnam when I was just four years old. She didn’t know what was ahead of her - only that she wanted a better life for her children than she had.

If it weren’t for her sacrifice, I may not be alive today.

Next, I want to thank my mother-in-law for raising such an amazing woman who has been my best friend for the last twenty-five years. Finally, my beautiful and incredible wife April. Being a military spouse isn’t easy, and when I was away she raised five children and held down our home.

There is no greater calling than being a parent, and the sacrifices mothers around the world make for us are the greatest gift.

Take time today to give thanks for the amazing mothers in your life and be sure to wish them a happy Mother’s Day.
---
In Liberty,
---
[](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=28f21f93b2064791afb3fbd61d5982bc&_e=Gan4HWNFfMYoodNhQT0YbpRdKC-oYCIkzJJmy6EKQWp06haZIqoyg4tNUkZjxtUl10yWlX207-ZQVShsN7FKD6i-UraBF4kpDfjrz1NsTh9B_C7dOZXkQ9AkRpXF3DWl8gOH01qzDEJRqxibaqJlrRIU6BC5VRyTW9BF_2RyDpqRhmGMjaKKPUdHW6NFpml627V5KMEtB8J3E62wQwfEGtcN0kYotID25T39INY-vv1XAQXbRUrpgkIDjdWyOG9W0bFxWoCjWUVku8FbtzJERaK9eBA-i-C-JmLcyV3HE6do1msdqX3fUljEjFqYox3C)

Fellow American,

I don’t say this lightly, but our House majority is facing its greatest threat yet...

This is one of those times that I’m asking you not to doubt what I’m telling you.

_**Democrat Hakeem Jeffries’ Super PAC just announced an unprecedented 186 million dollar advertising blitz to completely drown out the GOP on the airwaves.**_

And those are just their initial ad buys! With more than six months left until Election Day, there is no telling how much money Jeffries, Pelosi, and their allies on the progressive left will spend to win the House majority.

**[This is an emergency donation request](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=026f78aaf4af441ebc3142850179e6d6&_e=zjt6IsKMqKYPRtQJauTZD1YtT_kiOBQvWrfrtmc6ljwjLLSa_azgfWk5bpdfsMCBgasVAMKrhC_F3KFXYVpKNJdln_jt7acNWBTUZoQnP7lbgzsMLrj1WAB1olsNsLvzMXgEwHpZiVzHlcK5eL8y1352_cOnTw3drsXaFQupkGGqxLfBfePe8rnumVzxZwQFXUqC1M21zqG7d6gRSyfPcj-1xf6YYCPx5Nra8rtm3s2txJ2uy1Y3wZGT1KnLqQ4PLSK8-Wz8mNFB_J0bKmJRtIKN01m4iNgFM2BXOWqWA7rXTOVP6fbbztbhi4o3evgAZo4sp5xUkTKCugHhm3Th6f8OB2_Ac-HWOzQeHcJ9mh8wKYWtRm-XRBimJJGSfrt4kOH-zPbm-gVkic_MYCAPqpllT4zrCg-pLOUQV2m8FvM%3D)** , Fellow American. | | | | | _Our friend Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District, and we’re working to support him.**I hope you’ll read the message below from him and consider[splitting a donation between Harry’s campaign and Blue Amp Action.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1a3f860f-b492-4ec0-a277-6230d2058aea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**_ Y'all – if we haven't said it in a while, we appreciate you more than you know. The support this campaign has seen is beyond what Harry ever thought would happen, but we knew that people would have an amazing response to an American hero running for Congress. We've garnered support from grassroots donors in all 50 states, all while keeping our average donation around $25. That's because Harry made a promise to serve the people, not big businesses. He's not taking a cent from corporate PACs, but that means he's being outspent on TV ads. _A billionaire funded super PAC is spending over $4 MILLION on ads for his opponent._ [**So if you've been waiting for a time to be a part of history and our record breaking campaign – now is that day. We've got just 2 days until the election, so we're operating at a full sprint. Please will you rush $25 to our campaign and Blue Amp Action to make history and elect Harry?** ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta553e7ff-c3a4-42c9-bec1-55540b25e917/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

subject: State Democrats fight election fatigue, while Republicans attack mail-in ballots … and everything else you need to know in the states.
body:
Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, May 12th, 2024 | | |

|

1️⃣ **_Wisconsin:_ Democrats rush $7 million to state races **
In Wisconsin, all eyes are on vital state legislative races this fall. [Democrats just committed $7 million to five key state Senate races to make sure our candidates have what they need to win and continue the fight for our fundamental freedoms → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYC6BcuuvsWbaf-lI7vjpLh5u7kz0ob3Tp9IQKAf_b1joTSoIuuhdwPtCEmdRDchBxgwlobEvxt3uaM5z3Oj6tZ5rtHy6tFl9iG5c0rp91YfdOKuzgDIFnV7T7-QH8zTk0hpEiUpF1wKi2KbIuryB8AcnCJGmG5yfSNkpzrSV4I0-nEbnK5uGx2cYkCyKPUkMj7qgUzeWsxrqqdW_GDW2oybTx_1LY96-zICIOPHCd0B2i8WbY9-gHw7Efp4U5m3Nj5JVho5BsPRi5Ip6rwsMs9W4G5qi3S_5aBPlGEQbKEQnJKGnJIZ8ejzbWtYpQ2qSiYE2Ithpa5LFhobS2imEbgbWMsWj_jbR4luZtDchEZtbRUAvRkoxsyVIZr7lgotvUNzJUWunwV7lsV59EaMXWk0rfG6YXzgk4SyfsdNTWFfGcFBUcHF-hVH2Nnzlw8sXfZbAHklad8P2DifjmpwnnB7U4VwI0R76IRQMAU-Pfa8SkL6hmByoiCKC49fqEVSlBzHaVTjEz40ERbA5N3Hx4XGhS74tx8kQo9Q1yrod8WyA0Dxgw16bVg2Ps4Sem1dFWY8r7DUH9qe_PwUX5D3ct5Ko3Ha_Byrrcfyewn1_sCm/46a/H6vw4jrISVKPC-zwXOuZ3w/h1/h001.5V5GAEdn0gWLbQ9grXYR0ko8HBtUYtMvUD-j1Lp4L5U)
2️⃣ **_Colorado:_ Check out what the state legislature has been up to **
In Colorado, the state’s legislative session came to a close this week with over 700 bills debated. [**Click here to check out a breakdown of the key bills state legislators have debated this session →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.EtNV8HBC60Tl7UuGmXS3sVdIL_pADM7ZzeFmfA9anHI0UWIpZdqaqhfx2rsCiLy8hov_gpkkSjomdydUziAm-3MPcS9gk1E2FmAMhaujVbVMwCMnDqFt6Q0GYuqkE3id71HSPmIyHb_-dFDu6CuVYf4v_fQUZYhDYeui5VvGa4Dmb83GmMl1IiWtbV7KjMK50OMAmy2p6wkw5N6DJdQpVul3G3fOLBgrzOZFWZruqCzN6NypbAjDzSPo_wezMw9c5ORi8uigTPceSL9idVAZdsWoTQzQcaTEp1baRQcLJbJWG2fQK69XdKnD6nSVbfJNtMcM73zpchROQ65ed5t11jgfMh_Xoex0yC4c_Wza2iIZ4Zt7tVQKkyxLDmx32rSHi8PZMqw-36VwInEVeu-3sMIPYXtUhBDOnM2KjCxuklkr00GBQnp9nkfgzAsgEpdgIPI0M1o778oeFnDSxyJpR5YDeEMm4byFPP2-l44Yj0jEzm3b4YwI86bvTI40uJS9px8v83zGeBZoWNw0nMPxFGZc4O2DE_6jEB02iszhXntfFz3cRmUbSLmsY6n4NQjF_pVEoFPICYMVenh4A4vm1w/46a/H6vw4jrISVKPC-zwXOuZ3w/h2/h001.JY0ms1Rr_sxVg5_9SO3UEIESVKHfcQhIjF5sPhcoOGk)
3️⃣ **_Nevada:_ Republicans challenge state law on mail-in ballots **
In Nevada, Republicans filed a lawsuit earlier this month challenging the state’s law that accepts mail ballots up to four days after an election. [**This is just the latest GOP attempt to suppress voters and restrict access to the ballot →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.NV3IV8RXB3BPG-RgoenRigJyeNuS95yGsW5DXamZlRpOEr0S6tgdeRmmPmEQN-ZmmXKWzGt_G7FbGEIUj1lS6FIw3_ZqUDktq4IOhV-Uyw1pzhLzayrRuEkcft9oDqDPIzq1NdBHRy27y1jvr93_IG07AaI2_qlH-i9MC7beYSADzbwfwDxqvg0OEpCByLnRRiznPLQPqWWFJKEMZSpm8XYZNMpQDnm_MjK30XXdwAUSilxCfUfVAu_CthtorlSSEWRs-GFliT-K_XEhryO9qL5io5w8k-G2wD4ZXZWJMxM1YCiRQO0h9nZ-o76Vxy6jNBhpJAphqMe_Fni_gGxypLUWGO755B07W8EQs0JFAoCpPSu9b-NAwUZus5rItGVmuoHkgcapzPp17BpsWmL0bdwvBlhFv33e5MgnXLHFu0YGnrG5-w6b4Tba7_a7oN_YGOAHW73dXTTgPSzawU4C3ChwnhQOOZ8SrIPQjt4QqFvK2ouAVYhYshdNg8zPuab7hmSXXI7pg9Szkx6wm5-j3rMQQZufGtFDjzEtD2CAod1G3W9xznLlkqJE_HM6-o--0_4TiN_A4JhYKmLK-62fyioxjvqyT0DpoaD9Oa5829FMRvqfxnm-GJEqfzcX6wN79Fst0YPhWzhH1A464wpAzf6FFWmue9ICBl7Y8-Z3w2f0__GlFni20gJN51Cc_UTjyeyMOtwD8vBOOVpXar-vbnexX5YID_dfhgM8GTQj1nJ6nTlTCuViq82LG76YC0fnQd-lqGQt70eQ_amrA9zwq1zuthiYZfLjGGUSpftJ4wI/46a/H6vw4jrISVKPC-zwXOuZ3w/h3/h001.9HxmSDKbyTE1QdbvAPUjjAmIeEZPycMqGxYTWvSc8T8)
📖 **_Read:_ Are State-Level Races the Antidote to Election Fatigue? **
The divide between red and blue states is widening, and state legislators are the decision-makers behind LGBTQ+ rights, book bans, school curricula, gun safety, and more. [**Click here to learn more about the key role the states are playing this year →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU8i2R0LYT9L5F1IDnXqJpeJv3H_N7yjy8mIhdVfBwniS_NJveakg9X4EXB5nao5ezlDl9zHRLaYoiaFe678bD4Sn73ZcrZiTiHxzSwJcDkeZsoqSaSq5AjcufZ0-DQHg0pXoh_7BiCyjEBf0QM9utQ_IuOHgvjZgkVhsGBxE2TwtLZhQLfOjnjKk9llAONRrI_cfj-z_LLf9ullm8UyUVyYs3sryQbc43-SzbqZ2rVLgsbuWKL3QlMhKKlgdID5oQ-YvigcIcExGBU9yBcM7z6AubtjTs481LhkSY6EExk_uGn9xTshGnz_4-kxRQ6KyyZiSrmnWIu05xcZ8L-y_gE9HmsLeZTsStMMZttCGQAV-wOlq382ryoL5MDqguFDn7Lr0GWXAkWsk3X2L3o5FeeJF9cSXH7TbpWlUW-f_gVHFRhV0EPUKK9Hkl_Caa5JS0DOTiIBlb2oIMlG004iDeQWCpVdO8I-9RQMPBjIrYWWb1N-Xso9NNNvsmm4bQwLbnCipdDGOiJLR3Y22VQnLDRHf-VvPS0hA5Kl1KvVIhj6bgXEgaYvFdRSBat225N7ad7kmG1SFN3OC7nEAkvNkQDPaJDDGCC9yBsD_93ViSKf/46a/H6vw4jrISVKPC-zwXOuZ3w/h4/h001.m9nmHOMK-CTqWSeoL_1YSqt9VUERe0adSvT7aln16jM)
