clean_body: Welcome to the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter, May 12th, 2024 | | | | | 1️⃣ Wisconsin: Democrats rush $7 million to state races In Wisconsin, all eyes are on vital state legislative races this fall. 2️⃣ Colorado: Check out what the state legislature has been up to In Colorado, the state’s legislative session came to a close this week with over 700 bills debated. 3️⃣ Nevada: Republicans challenge state law on mail-in ballots In Nevada, Republicans filed a lawsuit earlier this month challenging the state’s law that accepts mail ballots up to four days after an election. 📖 Read: Are State-Level Races the Antidote to Election Fatigue? disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:

When Joe asked me to be his running mate, I knew that campaigning for -- and becoming -- Vice President would be one of the most important things I’d ever do.
**Peter, I’ve never been one to shy away from a challenge.**
I was raised to take action. From the time I was in a stroller, my mom was out there marching and fighting for justice. Growing up, whenever I was worried about something, my mother would look me in the eye and ask, _“So what are you going to do about it?”_
That's why, when I saw a broken justice system, I became a district attorney to try and fix it. It's why, during the foreclosure crisis when the Big Banks were taking advantage of the American people, I took them on as Attorney General of California. It's why, as a United States Senator, I fought to keep judges off the bench who didn't support reproductive freedom. **And it’s why I am ready to get out on the campaign trail to defeat Donald Trump _again._**
[So, I’m coming to you directly: If you have been waiting for the perfect opportunity to join us in this fight, let me tell you there is no better day than today. Can I count on you to make a $25 donation to our reelection campaign? clean_body: We launched our campaign for reelection over a year ago, and I wanted to reach out to top supporters like you. | | | Peter, I am reaching out to share a special message with you. It's been over a year since President Biden and I launched our reelection campaign. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | When Joe asked me to be his running mate, I knew that campaigning for -- and becoming -- Vice President would be one of the most important things I’d ever do. Peter, I’ve never been one to shy away from a challenge. I was raised to take action. From the time I was in a stroller, my mom was out there marching and fighting for justice. Growing up, whenever I was worried about something, my mother would look me in the eye and ask, “So what are you going to do about it?” That's why, when I saw a broken justice system, I became a district attorney to try and fix it. It's why, during the foreclosure crisis when the Big Banks were taking advantage of the American people, I took them on as Attorney General of California. It's why, as a United States Senator, I fought to keep judges off the bench who didn't support reproductive freedom. And it’s why I am ready to get out on the campaign trail to defeat Donald Trump again. Thank you for your support -- today and every day. Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States

name: Republican Party in the Virgin Islands
subject: RPVI Updates, Events, Deadlines, and More
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/753fdf2ff670/rpvi-updates-events-deadlines-and-more?e=d30db4cde8)
---
| |
---
| | **RPVI News**
---
| | **State Committee Meeting Recap** The Republican State Committee met and elected John Patrick Yob of St. John as chairman in a 12-1 vote against Lilliana Belardo De O'Neal and Collister Fahie to replace outgoing chairman Gordon Ackley. Yob thanked Ackley for his success in getting the party on solid financial footing and recruiting candidates to run for office in 2024.
---
| |
---
_“I thank Chairman Ackley for his strong leadership and am appreciative of Lilliana and Collister's willingness to step up and offer themselves as candidates. Uniting the RPVI is my top priority. It's mission critical to deliver historic wins and provide competition to Democrat one-party rule.”_ —RPVI Chairman John Yob
---
| **A special thanks to those on State Committee:**

Gordon Ackley
April Newland
Colonel Johann Clendenin
Alexandra Bonthron
Major Vanessa Mull Coffen
Chip Engelhard
Krystal Flores
Andrea Hedrington
Michael Meluskey
Valerie Stiles
Randolph Thomas
David Weisher
Mark Zion
---
|
---
| **Don't Miss These Events**

The RPVI is hosting two meet-and-greet fundraisers to showcase some of the Republican candidates running in 2024. The events are in honor of the late Republican Senator Holland Redfield.
---
| | | **_St. John, May 14 Fundraiser_

When: **6 pm - 8 pm

**Where: **L'Autre Monde, John’s Great Cruz Bay Villa
---
|
---
| [Get Tickets](https://republicanpartyinthevirginislands.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=e85b6d4937&e=d30db4cde8 "Get Tickets")
---
| | **_St. Croix, May 22 Fundraiser_

When: **6 pm - 8 pm

**Where: **The Fred, St Croix
---
|
---
| [Get Tickets](https://republicanpartyinthevirginislands.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=765b528918&e=d30db4cde8 "Get Tickets")
---
| | **State Committee Meeting Notice**

A regular meeting of the Republican State Committee has been called for Wednesday, May 22, 2024, at 5:30 p.m. AST.

The meeting will be held at the Fred Hotel in Frederiksted on St. Croix. All state committee members are encouraged to join us for our fundraiser at the Fred that will be held directly after the meeting.
---
| _**Nominating Petition Filing Window for Candidates**_
**12 p.m. May 14 to 6 p.m. May 21**

---
| **Interested In Running For Office?**

The filing window to run for office begins at 12 p.m. on May 14 and ends at 6 p.m. on May 21.

To run, candidates must make an appointment with the Election System and retrieve a packet for the desired office.

Please email [rpvi@republicanpartyinthevirginislands.com](https://republicanpartyinthevirginislands.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=030a054b10&e=d30db4cde8) with your name and desired office so we can coordinate as a party and help you get on the ballot.

You can find contact information for your local Election System office at [vivote.gov](https://republicanpartyinthevirginislands.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=c57552dd5b&e=d30db4cde8)
---
| **2024 Republican National Convention**

The Virgin Islands will have a full and equal voice on the national stage in Milwaukee. Your RPVI leadership is working very closely with the Trump campaign and the Republican National Committee to ensure that we send as strong of a delegation as possible to the national convention.

We had a powerful role in the nomination process as we caught the attention of the Republican Party’s most prominent presidential candidates. We are continuing this effort by hosting an event at the 2024 Republican National Convention. Details to come.
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Like our new Facebook Page!**_
---
| | | | [](https://republicanpartyinthevirginislands.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=85617aa19d&e=d30db4cde8)
---
| **'Dem Democrats' By Mighty Pat**

This song is catching on and getting attention across all of our island communities. Spread the word by sharing to your social networks.
---
| [ ](https://republicanpartyinthevirginislands.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=d2226cfd1d&e=d30db4cde8)

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: Happy Mother's Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84796881/472666332/-1295403277?refcode=AU_JH_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20240512_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGI0NjBiYS02MzEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1YSaGTdu2ye2VjwepnfWOiei6gSlVl0hmAaCbuQXcHQ=&emci=bd104370-d60f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=90b460ba-6310-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=15529135) | Happy Mother’s Day! To all of the moms who are the everyday heroes. I am humbled and truly grateful to be your Congresswoman and can assure you that I will always advocate on your behalf and moms and families will not be left behind. I honor moms by pushing for legislation like the expanded Child Tax Credit which cut child poverty in _half_. Fighting for things like women’s reproductive health, expanding Medicaid coverage for mothers and children and expanding SNAP and WIC for Women, Infants, and Children are just a few more ways I show my appreciation for all that our mothers do. Today, I want to reaffirm my commitment to all of the moms out there. As a mom, I believe it is critical that the Congress has more representatives who understand the realities of raising kids. That is how we will advance policy that helps ALL moms and make the lives of their children better. Thank you, moms, for all that you do. Take the day off...you deserve it. With love, Jahana
---

clean_body: | | Happy Mother’s Day! To all of the moms who are the everyday heroes. I am humbled and truly grateful to be your Congresswoman and can assure you that I will always advocate on your behalf and moms and families will not be left behind. I honor moms by pushing for legislation like the expanded Child Tax Credit which cut child poverty in half. Fighting for things like women’s reproductive health, expanding Medicaid coverage for mothers and children and expanding SNAP and WIC for Women, Infants, and Children are just a few more ways I show my appreciation for all that our mothers do. Today, I want to reaffirm my commitment to all of the moms out there. As a mom, I believe it is critical that the Congress has more representatives who understand the realities of raising kids. That is how we will advance policy that helps ALL moms and make the lives of their children better. Thank you, moms, for all that you do. Take the day off...you deserve it. With love, Jahana | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. Keep up with the latest from Jahana on and . ---|--- Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. | | If you can believe it, we’re less than 48 hours away from Maryland’s Democratic Primary, Peter! With so little time, and so much to do, my team and I are making the most of today by doing whatever we can to talk to voters before they cast their ballots. _We’re making phone calls, organizing teams of volunteers to knock on doors, hosting events, and working non-stop to win this race._ **[Are you ready to win on Tuesday, Peter? If so, please consider chipping in a quick $25 (or whatever you can) towards our GOTV efforts!](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/24110?t=12&amount=25&akid=1624%2E52803%2EIqcQxt)** | | | [Donate $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/24110?t=13&amount=25&akid=1624%2E52803%2EIqcQxt)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/24110?t=14&amount=35&akid=1624%2E52803%2EIqcQxt)
---
While we’ll obviously be doing everything possible to reach voters tomorrow and Tuesday, Peter, the reality is that today is our best chance to really connect with Maryland voters.
Fewer people work on Sundays, which means we’ve got a better chance of reaching folks on the phones, at their front doors, and in the community.
**This is our best opportunity to share our Maryland-first message with folks, and make the case that I’m the candidate best-equipped to take on Larry Hogan in November.**
_We have to make the most of today, Peter._
**[Can you please make a last-minute grassroots donation so we can keep up the good work during the final couple days of this critical Democratic primary?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/24110?t=15&amount=25&akid=1624%2E52803%2EIqcQxt)**

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: A Mother's Day gift for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Before I disconnect to enjoy time with my family, I want to pass on some love by way of one of my most cherished passions: food!
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240512-3868-footer&t=1&akid=3868%2E420207%2Eg5YYUp)
Happy Mother's Day, Peter!
Before I disconnect to enjoy time with my family, I want to pass on some love by way of one of my most cherished passions: food!
There is nothing better than some good comfort food to help tide you through stressful times — like a Presidential election. Here’s a photo of some paneer tikka masala I made the night before the 2020 election.
I am sure that more even paneer will be made this year in the Jayapal household — especially as we gear up to run a competitive re-election campaign — but for now, **we’re doing something special to celebrate Mother's Day:**
I am going to send you my three most coveted comfort food recipes in the ActBlue receipt to anyone who makes a donation to our campaign today. [**Donate here to unlock some delicious recipes from my kitchen!**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240512._cQDwi&refcode=em20240512-3868&t=2&akid=3868%2E420207%2Eg5YYUp)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240512._cQDwi&refcode=em20240512-3868&t=21&akid=3868%2E420207%2Eg5YYUp)**
Your donation is more than these delectable recipes, Peter. Your donation helps power our campaign and fight back against far-right extremism.
Thank you for all your support, and I hope you enjoy these recipes as much as I do. And be on the lookout for new recipes coming soon!
Love,
Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240512-3868-footer&t=22&refcode2=3868_420207_g5YYUp&akid=3868%2E420207%2Eg5YYUp)**

clean_body: Before I disconnect to enjoy time with my family, I want to pass on some love by way of one of my most cherished passions: food! Happy Mother's Day, Peter! Before I disconnect to enjoy time with my family, I want to pass on some love by way of one of my most cherished passions: food! There is nothing better than some good comfort food to help tide you through stressful times — like a Presidential election. Here’s a photo of some paneer tikka masala I made the night before the 2020 election. I am sure that more even paneer will be made this year in the Jayapal household — especially as we gear up to run a competitive re-election campaign — but for now, we’re doing something special to celebrate Mother's Day: I am going to send you my three most coveted comfort food recipes in the ActBlue receipt to anyone who makes a donation to our campaign today. Your donation is more than these delectable recipes, Peter. Your donation helps power our campaign and fight back against far-right extremism. Thank you for all your support, and I hope you enjoy these recipes as much as I do. And be on the lookout for new recipes coming soon! Love, Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

Friend, if you've been waiting for the perfect time to make your first donation to my Senate reelection campaign, today is that day – because there is still so much work to do to make a real, meaningful difference for people across Nevada and the country.
* If we're going to protect and restore reproductive freedom nationwide, I need your help.

* If we're going to take on powerful special interests to lower everyday costs for working families, I need your help.

* If we're going to take commonsense steps to prevent gun violence, I need your help.

* If we're going to uphold our democracy in the face of far-right attacks, I need your help.

**Mothers are the backbone of our families and the heart of our nation. ** Their love, strength, and unwavering commitment to our children and communities inspire us every day. We recognize their sacrifices and the countless ways they contribute to the well-being of our families and our country. Their tireless efforts to create a better future for America's children are a testament to their resilience and dedication. On this special day, we want you to know how much we appreciate and value everything they do. As you celebrate this Mother's Day, we hope you'll take a moment to relax, enjoy the company of your loved ones, and bask in the warmth of their appreciation. Thank you for all that you do, and I hope you have a wonderful Mother's Day! For American Families, Terry Schilling
President | American Principles Project

subject: On Mother's Day...
body:
We're fighting for the right to decide | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84799874/472676014/2141984067?sourceid=1149569&utm_campaign=24emfr052407aax&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=mothersday&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmQ4N2Q1Ni02ODEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7GLwCQQrYFmH-Ip0dJiWrX7li6nI5OeKqaBi3DDcJ6w=&emci=df5aad59-610e-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=96d87d56-6810-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84799875/472676015/2141984067?sourceid=1149569&utm_campaign=24emfr052407aax&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=mothersday&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NmQ4N2Q1Ni02ODEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7GLwCQQrYFmH-Ip0dJiWrX7li6nI5OeKqaBi3DDcJ6w=&emci=df5aad59-610e-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=96d87d56-6810-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=954237)
---|---
| Peter,

Today is Mother's Day in the United States, a day that can evoke a wide range of emotions. Whether you are celebrating or struggling today, know that our hearts are with you.

The Center for Reproductive Rights is fighting to ensure that every person can decide if and when to become a mother—and that no matter where you live, you have access to the essential reproductive health care you need.

That means access to abortion care, prenatal care and postpartum care, and lifelong reproductive health care. _**But as you know, access isn't guaranteed.**_

... Pregnant people in Texas, Tennessee, Idaho, Oklahoma and beyond are fighting for the right to access essential and life-saving abortion care. People like Amanda Zurawski, the lead plaintiff in our case against the state of Texas’s inhumane abortion bans, who spent three days fighting for her life in a Texas ICU after being denied reproductive health care.

... In Hawai'i, we are challenging a law that prevents pregnant people from receiving prenatal and birth care from trusted, skilled midwives. Our lawsuit seeks to expand access to maternal health care and end this restrictive law that particularly harms Native Hawaiian midwifery practitioners and families of color.

... In partnership with Lift Louisiana, Physicians for Human Rights, and Reproductive Health Impact, the Center released a report documenting the devastating harms caused by Louisiana’s extreme abortion bans. The study details how Louisiana’s laws have changed the day-to-day practice of medicine and the devastating impact they have on people seeking reproductive health care, their communities, and the people who care for them.

The Center stands firm that when it comes to health and access inequities—more reproductive autonomy is the solution, not less. Your commitment to the Center fuels our mission to ensure everyone, everywhere, is able to make decisions about their health, bodies, and futures.

clean_body: We're fighting for the right to decide | | ---|--- | Peter, Today is Mother's Day in the United States, a day that can evoke a wide range of emotions. Whether you are celebrating or struggling today, know that our hearts are with you. The Center for Reproductive Rights is fighting to ensure that every person can decide if and when to become a mother—and that no matter where you live, you have access to the essential reproductive health care you need. That means access to abortion care, prenatal care and postpartum care, and lifelong reproductive health care. But as you know, access isn't guaranteed. ... Pregnant people in Texas, Tennessee, Idaho, Oklahoma and beyond are fighting for the right to access essential and life-saving abortion care. People like Amanda Zurawski, the lead plaintiff in our case against the state of Texas’s inhumane abortion bans, who spent three days fighting for her life in a Texas ICU after being denied reproductive health care. ... In Hawai'i, we are challenging a law that prevents pregnant people from receiving prenatal and birth care from trusted, skilled midwives. Our lawsuit seeks to expand access to maternal health care and end this restrictive law that particularly harms Native Hawaiian midwifery practitioners and families of color. ... In partnership with Lift Louisiana, Physicians for Human Rights, and Reproductive Health Impact, the Center released a report documenting the devastating harms caused by Louisiana’s extreme abortion bans. The study details how Louisiana’s laws have changed the day-to-day practice of medicine and the devastating impact they have on people seeking reproductive health care, their communities, and the people who care for them. The Center stands firm that when it comes to health and access inequities—more reproductive autonomy is the solution, not less. Your commitment to the Center fuels our mission to ensure everyone, everywhere, is able to make decisions about their health, bodies, and futures. In solidarity and health, Nancy Northup President & CEO | "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

name: Lily Tang Williams
subject: A Death Threat from Beijing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lily4Congress Committee
body:
| [Unsubscribe](http://links.rightwaypress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_s=15bb7eb706714acd8d66658615416bcb&_t=hr4DBnF9EhbXStT9UkQX9STZvWZmOK8l82ihDRkT6dYuIWfqYt28AcGD5ULJ3rZVVFxKP_EdPKhPzPvt0K029Jo_fT400WHXbWemWjSWjJo%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.rightwaypress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_s=15bb7eb706714acd8d66658615416bcb&_t=hr4DBnF9EhbXStT9UkQX9STZvWZmOK8l82ihDRkT6dYuIWfqYt28AcGD5ULJ3rZVVFxKP_EdPKhPzPvt0K029Jo_fT400WHXbWemWjSWjJo%3D)

Fellow American,

[](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=15bb7eb706714acd8d66658615416bcb&_e=YYMIKlIvdHFEfDodv72gGy21T0vUYPuy7YrSPeMeSv3v43h9DMS6i_jegE_ar2wuj-lMXHXVqXgs_arskLdErKOHy9haSzSguSWUBYtBk0GTXjtzLMB1buNnLYvyXuvftmq58Q7PE4vcl-2evyeGz-AX0W-4K-vMyIf_4o3fIHLWpVIGbSblEvQPMUoaP3Z-NPviHnl-m8l3jiTMqhDKQnPjgsl5WQuJ1OUq8uQetrKOF3E-9icMqxxQJxKfe9y4invcjjpKRYSWrcElOtrZp8_4iod_Tk-FM12Ac2q_DJP9chLdhzybnC7ljrXXQRgP4Bl8atrKrFNtTM6W1T7kubzTl1Na66dZXnyQCSML0Du2MckQDzNkAISJfOnFFwjJX4Yxgpy6Wd6JlLUwWzI2s0E4nRbzUaf1dQ995VgbMRo%3D) Yes. I received a death threat from Beijing because I love Liberty, Freedom, and the United States of America. More on that in a minute.

Right now, I want to introduce myself.

_My name is Lily Tang Williams, and I fled Communist China and escaped the evil Communist indoctrination. I'm running for Congress because I fear the country I love is becoming like the country I left._

You see: I was born to illiterate working-class parents in China's western Sichuan province just before Mao's Cultural Revolution. I grew up in extremely poor living conditions with food rationing, social chaos, and indoctrination into Communism.

At a young age, I learned a hard lesson about surviving in a Communist regime: conform and keep your thoughts private. Do not trust anyone, even your friends.

Everything changed when an American exchange student showed me a pocket-sized version of "The Declaration of Independence." Even with my limited English skills, I could understand most of these words: "We hold these truths to be self–evident...." It's like a lightbulb came on. I had never heard such beautiful words before, and I loved them so much that I spent many hours with my American friend to learn more about these new concepts and America.

_**I had a new dream: I wanted to go to America.**_

In 1988, I made it to America with only $100 in my pocket, which I borrowed, along with a $1,200 loan from my sponsor. I spoke very little English. In the 33 years since I have enjoyed living in this great country. I received a graduate degree, got married, raised three children, started my own business, and was naturalized as a U.S. citizen in 1995.

Fast forward to today: I've spoken out against Communism and Socialism appearing on Fox News, Tucker Carlson Tonight, Fox Business, Newsmax, Timcast, Huckabee TV, John Stossel, Joe Pags Show, Gothix TV, Shawn Ryan Show, Epoch Times TV, and Glenn Beck Radio.

I've authored opinion articles for The Epoch Times, Town Hall, National Review, Union Leader, Concord Monitor, and Granite Grok.

_And here's where the death threats from Beijing started: when I decided to run for Congress._

The Democrats don't want my story to reach the ears of my fellow Americans because they hope to enact their Socialist Agenda.

But more importantly, you and I cannot afford to let the woke liberal elite plunge the America we know and love any further down the dark path of Communism and trample on our God-given rights.

**[Please, will you stand with me and make a special donation of $25, $50, or $100 to stand with me?](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=15bb7eb706714acd8d66658615416bcb&_e=YYMIKlIvdHFEfDodv72gGy21T0vUYPuy7YrSPeMeSv3v43h9DMS6i_jegE_ar2wuj-lMXHXVqXgs_arskLdErKOHy9haSzSguSWUBYtBk0GTXjtzLMB1buNnLYvyXuvftmq58Q7PE4vcl-2evyeGz-AX0W-4K-vMyIf_4o3fIHLWpVIGbSblEvQPMUoaP3Z-NPviHnl-m8l3jiTMqhDKQnPjgsl5WQuJ1OUq8uQetrKOF3E-9icMqxxQJxKfe9y4invcjjpKRYSWrcElOtrZp6jXwrGUEeWc6vah2IQB0pv01CsjRJ_8U28XfGmSWUAWgW04KNFCencmf4ksof792hRbGlQf05efZo0Gd25ByjwL4vcOYpDaTQAxHkogTFEMqBefmxvqbmTIT5QInyF0JkVPZUMSvVjF80_cAwEIW1g%3D)**

_Believe me. I'm not fear-mongering when I say you cannot imagine the horrors of Socialism and Communism. It is evil._

**[That's why I need you to stand with me and preserve the freedoms and values of our American heritage.](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=15bb7eb706714acd8d66658615416bcb&_e=YYMIKlIvdHFEfDodv72gGy21T0vUYPuy7YrSPeMeSv3v43h9DMS6i_jegE_ar2wuj-lMXHXVqXgs_arskLdErKOHy9haSzSguSWUBYtBk0GTXjtzLMB1buNnLYvyXuvftmq58Q7PE4vcl-2evyeGz-AX0W-4K-vMyIf_4o3fIHLWpVIGbSblEvQPMUoaP3Z-NPviHnl-m8l3jiTMqhDKQnPjgsl5WQuJ1OUq8uQetrKOF3E-9icMqxxQJxKfe9y4invcjjpKRYSWrcElOtrZp340yjo_kpuChJtCd1P9PWshItJic0AdPDLM3usE-HzCf7vlfnOyqEiEITfLovuMRZHwVo7c3XZkDk0oaQZ0hic804zdJaJstmqFonO5Oh9e9u64E4fnE-sOMQUd5yL4SCVQ__xs8YLVvH0vAYbP6uE%3D)**

For freedom,
Lily Tang Williams

**[P.S. Even if all you can afford is $5 — I will use every penny wisely in my campaign to defeat my liberal opponent who has been a rubber stamp for Biden's America-Last agenda. We can win this together.](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=15bb7eb706714acd8d66658615416bcb&_e=YYMIKlIvdHFEfDodv72gGy21T0vUYPuy7YrSPeMeSv3v43h9DMS6i_jegE_ar2wuj-lMXHXVqXgs_arskLdErKOHy9haSzSguSWUBYtBk0GTXjtzLMB1buNnLYvyXuvftmq58Q7PE4vcl-2evyeGz-AX0W-4K-vMyIf_4o3fIHLWpVIGbSblEvQPMUoaP3Z-NPviHnl-m8l3jiTMqhDKQnPjgsl5WQuJ1OUq8uQetrKOF3E-9icMqxxQJxKfe9y4invcjjpKRYSWrcElOtrZpytPEo9RS0YLB6uW5ybLjeiJFIZwcWYQsdFE5GhzqNOkEziH36ezX7n58l0hw4ASvJF9dYEri643Ifm6pqp2FUgpQMvkdqGsBcsMubApgzI6Q2f0Box_y0j7PNJDswoGsDMqyvHuZz9yVdVy6PVPpmI%3D)**

| _I fear that the country I love is becoming like the country I left. That's why I am running for Congress.

_It's time for the majority to speak up and defend our country from the radical left and keep the American Dream alive for our children_._

name: Becca Balint
subject: What motherhood means to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
Today can be challenging for many people. If you are struggling, please feel free to skip this message.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84800385/472677745/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjljNjJlNS02ODEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8FPduUXTCkeRD_eaD_bzKHJRu2HmGNNpDfDpRz8ylZo=&emci=b54bef4b-120f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=a69c62e5-6810-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=43402272) | _Mother’s Day can be a challenging time for many of us — especially for those who cannot be with their moms or who have lost loved ones. I am thinking of you today. If you are struggling, please take care of yourself and feel free to skip this message._ Peter, I wanted to take a moment to wish every mom on this team a Happy Mother’s Day! After the past few years we’ve had, each and every one of you deserves a trophy — or at the very least, a moment of peace and celebration. Motherhood is unconditional love, sacrifice, immeasurable joy, and complications. It is hard work that’s often overlooked and undervalued in our society. It is resilience and courage. _**Peter, I’m committed to fighting like a mom in Congress for our families.**_ _As a mom,_ I’m fighting for paid family leave, because I know how critical it is that new parents are able to spend precious time with their infants. As a mom, I’m fighting to defend reproductive freedom and access to contraception, because decisions about when and how to grow a family are deeply personal and belong to individual people – not politicians. As a mom, I’m fighting to improve and expand affordable housing so that parents can put a roof over their children’s heads. As a mom, I’m fighting to fund our public schools, because I know that education is a springboard for setting our kids up for a lifetime of personal and financial success. As a mom, I’m fighting to make progress on America’s mental health crisis, because I know that both teens AND adults need support to navigate the challenges and stressors that come with everyday life. Fighting like a mom means passing policies that will uplift America’s working families and make life easier for moms, dads, parents, and step-parents across the country. **To anyone out there who is a mom or a mother-figure: Please know that I am in your corner and fighting for you.** Happy Mother’s Day! — Becca Balint Becca is the first woman, the first openly LGBTQ+ person, and the first mom representing Vermont in Congress. She’s fighting for working families and a better future for generations to come. clean_body: Today can be challenging for many people. If you are struggling, please feel free to skip this message. | | Mother’s Day can be a challenging time for many of us — especially for those who cannot be with their moms or who have lost loved ones. I am thinking of you today. If you are struggling, please take care of yourself and feel free to skip this message. Peter, I wanted to take a moment to wish every mom on this team a Happy Mother’s Day! After the past few years we’ve had, each and every one of you deserves a trophy — or at the very least, a moment of peace and celebration. Motherhood is unconditional love, sacrifice, immeasurable joy, and complications. It is hard work that’s often overlooked and undervalued in our society. It is resilience and courage. Peter, I’m committed to fighting like a mom in Congress for our families. As a mom, I’m fighting for paid family leave, because I know how critical it is that new parents are able to spend precious time with their infants. As a mom, I’m fighting to defend reproductive freedom and access to contraception, because decisions about when and how to grow a family are deeply personal and belong to individual people – not politicians. As a mom, I’m fighting to improve and expand affordable housing so that parents can put a roof over their children’s heads. As a mom, I’m fighting to fund our public schools, because I know that education is a springboard for setting our kids up for a lifetime of personal and financial success. As a mom, I’m fighting to make progress on America’s mental health crisis, because I know that both teens AND adults need support to navigate the challenges and stressors that come with everyday life. Fighting like a mom means passing policies that will uplift America’s working families and make life easier for moms, dads, parents, and step-parents across the country. To anyone out there who is a mom or a mother-figure: Please know that I am in your corner and fighting for you. Happy Mother’s Day! — Becca Balint Becca is the first woman, the first openly LGBTQ+ person, and the first mom representing Vermont in Congress. name: Kat Cammack
subject: HAPPY MOTHER’S DAY!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS ](https://links
body:
All the moms across our great country should be celebrated today.

| | | | [ ](https://links.katcammack.com/els/v2/PWDrtE0vaVCD/YVZRbmR6NXhmalBDYVRzYUUzZWUweHM4aVMzYUF6Umx1TytVV0dRUm41N0NkeFN5STc3ancxMThmZW40RDlhbHQwL3R5SEd3OXh0aWVjd0laOXpJcFF3V3FaN09STFNmbDhlNGtUdFNsYms9S0/)
---
| | Fellow Patriot, My Mom****_**hardly**_**** had an easy ride when it came to raising me and taking care of our family. So I want to wish a****_**HAPPY MOTHER’S DAY**_ _****_ to my beautiful mother – and all the great moms across America.
---
| | [ ](https://links.katcammack.com/els/v2/3r_GcRV3PvfE/YVZRbmR6NXhmalBDYVRzYUUzZWUweHM4aVMzYUF6Umx1TytVV0dRUm41N0NkeFN5STc3ancxMThmZW40RDlhbHQwL3R5SEd3OXh0aWVjd0laOXpJcFF3V3FaN09STFNmbDhlNGtUdFNsYms9S0/)
---
| | _**Back during the Obama-era housing crisis, my Mom and I were**_ _**EVICTED**_ _**from our family ranch and left _homeless_.**_ But like any great mother _– she never gave up_ when it came to giving me the best life she possibly could. Now, I’m fighting the evils that lurk in our nation’s capital on **HER** shoulders. And in the same way that she never gave up on me –**I’ll never give up on the fight for her and America’s future.** _**Happy Mother’s Day again to America’s moms – I appreciate you immensely and you should be celebrated _EVERY_ day.**_
---
| | Enjoy this wonderful holiday,
---
| | [ ](https://links.katcammack.com/els/v2/-G7KCLYN7eC4/YVZRbmR6NXhmalBDYVRzYUUzZWUweHM4aVMzYUF6Umx1TytVV0dRUm41N0NkeFN5STc3ancxMThmZW40RDlhbHQwL3R5SEd3OXh0aWVjd0laOXpJcFF3V3FaN09STFNmbDhlNGtUdFNsYms9S0/)
---

---
| | **_Meet Kat_** Kat is currently serving her second term representing the Sunshine State in Congress, throughout her time in office, she has proven to be a conservative fighter with unapologetic grit. A third-generation commercial sandblaster who grew up on a small cattle ranch, Kat has never shied away from hard work. Kat had hoped to take over her family business, but shortly before graduating from college, a failed Obama-era housing program forced her family to lose it all. A program that eventually resulted in millions of Americans losing their homes through no fault of their own. As a result, Kat was left homeless. Living out of her car and cheap motels with her mother, she was motivated to fight back against the failures of big government that left her family with nothing. Kat pulled herself up by her bootstraps and dedicated her life’s work to defeating Washington’s overreach and advancing individual freedoms. Kat is a proud wife to her husband Matt, a first responder who serves with the Gainesville Fire Rescue as a firefighter / paramedic and SWAT medic. They are proud to call the “Gator Nation” of north central Florida home. Go Gators!
---
| |
---
| | ** A Message From Congresswoman Kat, to You** Fellow Patriot, it has been my greatest accomplishment getting to serve the American people and I want to be able to continue to defend our beautiful country, but I need your help. In the years since Biden has taken office, we have seen the cost of living go up tremendously - middle class families are struggling to get by. We have seen our freedoms being threatened, the Constitution being looked at as a guideline as opposed to law. I need **YOU** to help continue this fight. _**Can I count on you to pitch in just $5 to help me win this November? >>>>>**_

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: I'd like you to get to know my mom, Imelda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
She's my inspiration for running for U.S. Senate
| | |
---
Happy Mother's Day, friend. Whether you're a mother yourself or celebrating a mother figure in your life, I hope you're having a wonderful day.
I wanted to take a moment to speak with you about my mother, Imelda. Who she is speaks to who _I am —_ as a woman and as a mother. She's also my inspiration for running for U.S. Senate.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84801498/472681271/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1206-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjA4NjNmYjYtNmExMC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0NKPk2l0VzWJWcnj5oLmB6WFZPJMi1Hx_XluvEqkSQ4=)
Some of my earliest memories of Mom are her working incredibly hard to provide a good life for my sisters and me. Even before we emigrated from Ecuador, Mom worked full time to raise us. That was pretty uncommon in Ecuador back then.

Eventually, Mom made the brave decision to bring my sisters and me to America — to escape living under a dictatorship in Ecuador and ensure we had every ounce of freedom and opportunity to succeed. That was the American promise for her. _The American Dream. _

She continued to work her heart out. In those early days, I remember her taking on double shifts at work and somehow still fitting in English classes at night. She inspired all of us kids to step up to help make ends meet and build a home in our new country.
My mom took risks, worked hard, and traveled thousands of miles to a country where she knew few and didn't even speak the language — all to give her family _freedom_ and _opportunity_. It's a beautiful example of love and sacrifice that I try to celebrate not just today, but all the time.

It was Mom's sacrifice and Mom's courage that allowed me to go to college, start a career giving back to my community, and eventually become the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress.

But now, when I think about that opportunity and freedom my mom sought out, I think about extremist politicians like my opponent, Rick Scott, who are hell-bent on taking freedom away and handing opportunity to the rich and powerful like himself.

**Rick Scott is attacking and taking away our freedoms, so much so that, as a mother, I must now watch my own children grow up in a country with fewer freedoms than I did.**
My mom blessed me with so much, not least of all her drive and determination to build a better life for those she cares about. It's why I refuse to sit on the sidelines and allow politicians like Rick Scott to destroy our state and our country. **Mom, you inspired me to run for Senate. Thank you, and I love you.**
The stories of our mother figures are _our_ stories. They make us who we are today. Thanks for taking the time to learn a little more about mine, and I hope you continue to have a lovely Mother's Day.

Warmly,

— Debbie
|
* * *
| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84801499/472681272/-31196584?refcode=jtk1206-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjA4NjNmYjYtNmExMC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0NKPk2l0VzWJWcnj5oLmB6WFZPJMi1Hx_XluvEqkSQ4=)

She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

Fellow Conservative,

Hollywood funding Democrat candidates for Congress is a tale as old as the movie industry itself.

You and I both know how rare it is for a celebrity in Hollywood to support conservative candidates for federal office - it’s even more rare for them to offer their support publicly. But quite frankly, I couldn’t care less about winning the support of Hollywood actors, directors, or anyone involved with the entertainment industry.

**My opponent, on the other hand, is actively soliciting their financial support.**

I have received emails from actress Glenn Close on two occasions. In her fundraising appeals on behalf of Jon Tester’s campaign, she writes, _**“Jon Tester is running for reelection in Montana—it’s the most important race on the map. This election will determine the future of our country, and I can’t sit on the sidelines with stakes as high as these.”**_

name: Chair Jaime Harrison
subject: A few reflections on this Mother’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
I wanted to take a moment to share a few reflections with you as we celebrate this day and honor the mothers and mother figures in our lives. | |
---
Happy Mother’s Day, Derek! I wanted to take a moment to share a few reflections with you as we celebrate this day and honor the mothers and mother figures in our lives. My mom was young when she had me. But I’ve never seen someone work so hard and do so much after starting with so little. She kept me happy when I was sad and kept me focused on my purpose -- doing good! My grandma helped her raise me, and she was always teaching me and showing me how to be the best Jaime I could be. She is the rock and heart of our family.

I’m also extremely fortunate to be married to a modern-day Renaissance woman. My wife’s dedication to our two sons is unmatched -- all while she succeeds in her own independent endeavors: She is a scholar, artist, author, amazing mother and wife, and one heck of a cake and cookie decorator! And she has a heart of gold. My family’s spirit of decency and selflessness guides me every day. They're a huge part of the reason that I’m working so hard here at the DNC to help folks get ahead, as we fight for families across the country. I firmly believe that no matter what your family looks like, everyone should have a fair shot. Families like yours and mine are why we’re working every day to elect leaders who will fight for accessible, affordable child care and health care, who will defend key services like Social Security and Medicare that families across the country rely on, and who will prioritize creating good-paying jobs. **Uplifting all American families is what our party’s all about.** So today, I want to say thank you from the bottom of my heart for being a part of this work -- not just this Mother’s Day, but every day. It really means the world. Jaime Jaime Harrison
Chair
Democratic National Committee

clean_body: I wanted to take a moment to share a few reflections with you as we celebrate this day and honor the mothers and mother figures in our lives. | | Happy Mother’s Day, Derek! I wanted to take a moment to share a few reflections with you as we celebrate this day and honor the mothers and mother figures in our lives. My mom was young when she had me. But I’ve never seen someone work so hard and do so much after starting with so little. She kept me happy when I was sad and kept me focused on my purpose -- doing good! My grandma helped her raise me, and she was always teaching me and showing me how to be the best Jaime I could be. She is the rock and heart of our family. I’m also extremely fortunate to be married to a modern-day Renaissance woman. My wife’s dedication to our two sons is unmatched -- all while she succeeds in her own independent endeavors: She is a scholar, artist, author, amazing mother and wife, and one heck of a cake and cookie decorator! And she has a heart of gold. My family’s spirit of decency and selflessness guides me every day. They're a huge part of the reason that I’m working so hard here at the DNC to help folks get ahead, as we fight for families across the country. I firmly believe that no matter what your family looks like, everyone should have a fair shot. Families like yours and mine are why we’re working every day to elect leaders who will fight for accessible, affordable child care and health care, who will defend key services like Social Security and Medicare that families across the country rely on, and who will prioritize creating good-paying jobs. Uplifting all American families is what our party’s all about. So today, I want to say thank you from the bottom of my heart for being a part of this work -- not just this Mother’s Day, but every day. It really means the world. Jaime Jaime Harrison Chair Democratic National Committee Text JOIN to 43367 Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. name: Mike Lee
subject: Illegal immigrants are being registered to vote. . .
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
ONE CITIZEN. ONE VOTE.

|
---
Friend,

I introduced the SAVE ACT - which will protect American voters and prevent illegal aliens from voting in federal elections.

But across the country — illegal immigrants are being registered to vote. ONE CITIZEN. ONE VOTE.

That's the way it's been and that's what federal law requires.

The SAVE ACT would stop this and it should pass unanimously — by both Republicans AND Democrats who believe in democracy and FAIR ELECTIONS.

In fact, the only reason to oppose this that I can think of is if you're comfortable with or want non-citizens to vote. Or want non-citizens to influence the outcome of our elections.

There are estimates putting non-citizens in this country somewhere approaching 30 MILLION.

This is a major threat to our democracy and the SAVE ACT is our last chance to protect our elections.

**[Will you chip in just $1 so I can prove there is support behind my efforts: leeforsenate.com/save-act](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=41466b96c08146378851eb514978a9de&_e=gDdyDF1Z-3rGEY1hrpfvO2YEzPAKP2ZJYTdkiMu3yAt24tqB68WEhCK7Y_cq7YRLQ43YGp2fvLSTKwWFtSGUI4R7kDa3465dQFBKklEXobNxCCjx8DEVc_9UppwlZgui6MJDsJcgSrLo9UdRi6fA3ucWyDAmSBJxsQND--v5wjLwgRXScmKbSTnPncEO9C7olGCl1tBBGXytIFXPXVXeQ-3K_ttgZMfEk35eVPAFfeYmCpbSQu4Pu22A0T-evSXQvBiLMglpFMANK2ygiE9HvOopSJ7f7HINweYUzRAJlSbMbOj41Uvk2HnJYX2LOjkn8TexnvQbi6UZ9n5N1cB9wMlFSci4IJN7XC6mXAiu5tCdYp1k_OSI52fehk6BDuf6SCqbNSby390hisfnjLBE8A%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Happy Mother's Day to All Moms

name: Bob Casey
subject: Happy Mother’s Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2943%2E552475%2Edi5uQq)
Peter,
I wanted to take a moment to wish all moms and mother figures across the Commonwealth and the country a happy Mother's Day, and, especially to those in my own family.
To Terese, thank you for being my strongest supporter and a wonderful mother to Elyse, Caroline, Julia, and Marena. Our daughters hit the jackpot with you as their mom. We would all be lost without you.
To Elyse, you have become an amazing mother to your two beautiful boys.
I’m also thinking of my own mother, Ellen Harding Casey, whom we lost last year. As we celebrate this first Mother’s Day without her, we remember her example of serving others and her resolve that family would always come first.
The extraordinary mothers in my own life inspire me to fight so hard to help deliver an expanded child tax credit, a child care credit, increased unemployment benefits for people who lost their jobs, and checks that helped pay the bills, to help moms take care of their families during these last trying years.
In the Senate, I will continue doing everything in my power to ensure that all mothers and families receive the support they need and have access to the affordable health care every one of us deserves, and increase efforts to substantially reduce maternal mortality.
We all can and must do our part to thank the mothers in our lives, to help ease their burden, and to celebrate them.
Thank you, and happy Mother's Day,
Bob

name: Clay and Adrienne
subject: Happy Mother’s Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
Susan knows the struggles that working families and moms across the Lehigh Valley and throughout the country are facing.

| Peter, Happy Mother’s Day!

As many of you know, our mom, Susan Wild, has been a tireless advocate for the people of PA-07. Her dedication to our community and her commitment to improving the lives of working families across the country inspire us every day.

Susan knows the struggles that working families and moms across the Lehigh Valley and throughout the country are facing. That’s why she’s been a champion for affordable childcare. She believes that every family deserves access to high-quality childcare so that parents can work and children can thrive.

Not only that, Susan has fought hard to protect reproductive rights and ensure that women have access to family planning technologies, including access to in-vitro fertilization (IVF). She understands the importance of reproductive healthcare and has worked tirelessly to ensure that all families have the support and resources they need to grow and thrive.

So, this Mother's Day, we want to honor her hard work and dedication by ensuring that she can continue working in Congress to support working families and mothers across the country. Susan's seat is crucial for our community, and we need your help to protect it in November.

body:
We were honestly hoping for better heading into our mid-month fundraising deadline.
#

We were honestly hoping for better heading into our mid-month fundraising deadline.
Please look at this chart. Blue is the amount raised by day. The line is the number of donations by day.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may24.hD4hyN&refcode=em240512-1-160&t=1&akid=2315%2E734936%2ElCgEjJ)
You can see the rise and the drop-off that happened. Not great.
We need to close the gap, and Ruben Gallego (and everyone who cares about this democracy) is counting on people like you who understand the stakes of this election.
Because if we don't have the resources to win, we won't. It will be six years of Kari Lake and likely another four of Donald Trump. It's honestly that simple.
That may seem like a lot of pressure, but the good news is you are not alone. Lots of people are donating today — and they’re hoping you will too.
[**Can you please use this link to contribute $3 to Ruben Gallego's Senate campaign by midnight tonight? We're looking for A LOT of donations to help us close the gap on our fundraising goals.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may24.hD4hyN&refcode=em240512-1-160&t=2&akid=2315%2E734936%2ElCgEjJ)

_Our friend Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District, and we’re working to support him. We hope you’ll read the message below from him and consider splitting a donation between Harry’s campaign and Defeat Republicans._
Peter, it's Harry Dunn – I’ll keep this short.

My team just informed me that we’re falling short of our fundraising goal to keep our ads live.

I have a slim lead over my top opponent, but that lead will disappear if we have to pull our ads down.

And to be frank, we simply can’t let that happen. Many voters are still undecided. If the only ads those voters see are attack ads from a GOP Super PAC supporting my Democratic opponent, we will lose.

[Our election is in just 2 days. That’s why this goal matters. I’m humbly asking you to contribute any amount to me and Defeat Republicans to give me a fighting chance before midnight. Ruben Gallego (thanks to his Democrat dark money) is beating me in the polls by 2%. His propaganda campaign finally moved the needle. If we don't do something now, this will only get worse.

2% may seem like nothing, but we can't afford to trail behind Ruben. 2% can become 3%, which can become 5%, you get the picture. The further ahead in the polls he is, the more money the left will throw at him, and the more ads he will run depicting himself as a "moderate" despite his 100% radical record in Congress.

This is why my midnight deadline is so important. I want to launch a HUGE ad campaign that will show the people of Arizona the TRUTH about radical Ruben Gallego. The road to the Senate Majority and the Presidency runs right through Arizona.

clean_body: BY TWO | Patriot, I'm officially losing in the polls, and to catch up, I'm asking Patriots like YOU to step up and help me reach my emergency midnight deadline. | Ruben Gallego (thanks to his Democrat dark money) is beating me in the polls by 2%. His propaganda campaign finally moved the needle. If we don't do something now, this will only get worse. 2% may seem like nothing, but we can't afford to trail behind Ruben. 2% can become 3%, which can become 5%, you get the picture. The further ahead in the polls he is, the more money the left will throw at him, and the more ads he will run depicting himself as a "moderate" despite his 100% radical record in Congress. This is why my midnight deadline is so important. I want to launch a HUGE ad campaign that will show the people of Arizona the TRUTH about radical Ruben Gallego. We can't afford to let Joe Biden keep the Senate and give him another radical ally in Ruben Gallego. They would destroy this country and sell YOU out to the Liberal Establishment in a heartbeat. The road to the Senate Majority and the Presidency runs right through Arizona. I'm counting on your support. Anything and EVERYTHING you could spare makes a HUGE difference in the fight to Take Back America and SAVE ARIZONA! Thank you, Kari Lake Candidate for U.S. Senate in Arizona Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate If you'd like to donate by mail, .

name: Team Bennet
subject: Supporting working moms
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_051224_MothersDay_p_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_051224_MothersDay_p_act]
Friend,
On behalf of Michael, we wanted to say: Happy Mother’s Day.
Michael and his three daughters are celebrating Susan today. She is the best mom to Caroline, Halina, and Anne — and of course, Bandit and Captain Flint.
https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_101924_ctc_act [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_101924_ctc_act]
Today, we also recognize the challenges that too many mothers face in our country. In an economy designed to work for the people at the very top, too many working moms are left struggling to make ends meet to support their kids.
That’s why Michael is working to expand the Child Tax Credit permanently.
When Congress temporarily expanded the Child Tax Credit in 2021, it cut the child poverty rate nearly in half and benefitted 16 million kids. It meant that moms had just a little extra money for school supplies, a new winter coat, and school lunches.
Congress failed to renew the expansion in 2022 — but Michael hasn’t given up.
This Mother’s Day, you can support moms across the country by signing on to our petition to permanently expand the Child Tax Credit. Let’s put an end to child poverty and build an economy that works for everyone >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_101924_ctc_act]
Thank you — and happy Mother’s Day!
Team Bennet

_This is a personal message from Jared Moskowitz in honor of Mother's Day. If this holiday is a difficult time for you or your family, please do not hesitate to leave or delete this email._
* * *
Folks, I'm wishing your family a very Happy Mother's Day. Today, we're celebrating my wife, Leah. She's the mother of our two boys (three if you count our dog, Obi) and my best friend. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84803744/472687236/569902138?source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.05.12_B1_MothersDay_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTRmZDFlNy02ZTEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DCRhALkXw420qsMUMxKZrGRaG65qoKPLSD11DqUmTKM=) Every day, she shows our kids what it means to be kind, empathetic, and stand up for what's right. Our kids couldn't ask for a better, more caring mother. And I couldn't ask for a better partner. To all the mothers reading this email: I hope your day is filled with the love and appreciation that you deserve. You make the world a better place. Enjoy the rest of your Mother's Day, \- Jared

name: Team GIFFORDS
subject: ☀️ Sharing some good news with you 🗞️
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
The Vermont legislature just passed sweeping, commonsense gun safety legislation
#

Hey there, we’ve got some good news to share from Vermont:
This past week, the Vermont legislature passed sweeping, commonsense gun safety legislation which addresses ghost guns and protects polling locations from armed intimidation. This veto-proof bill will make Vermont safer and stronger.
While President Biden took executive action to curb the proliferation of ghost guns with the passage of the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ , it’s also critical that individual states pass laws to stop the production of these untraceable “DIY” guns.
In recent years, we’ve seen political violence and armed intimidation on the rise as well—with the most extreme example being the horrific attack on our nation’s Capitol on January 6, 2021. We’re proud of the Vermont legislature for taking real action to protect Vermonters from armed political intimidation.
This victory wouldn’t have been possible without the dedication of supporters like you—the people who care about ending our nation’s gun violence crisis.
We must keep up our work to see more successes like these in every single state across our nation. Thanks for being with us in this crucial fight.
All our best,
The team at GIFFORDS
* * *

**👋 One more thing before you go:**

If everyone reading this donated just $20, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives -- that makes it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to chip in what they can.

If $20 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to [**contribute to GIFFORDS today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may24.vNbcqy&refcode=em240512-1-sma&t=1&akid=8079%2E3935704%2EHdtWOq)

_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://go.giffords.org/go/45845?c0=giffords-em-may24.FFIM70&refcode=em240512-1-sma&t=2&akid=8079%2E3935704%2EHdtWOq)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-may24.lpOBpz&refcode=em240512-1-sma&t=3&akid=8079%2E3935704%2EHdtWOq)**
---
****

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=8079%2E3935704%2EHdtWOq) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Kari Lake
subject: He says it like it is!

body:
I'm honored to receive his endorsement

| [ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=02a64658454a4631b667318bf69f9f7f&_e=Kgkz_smPMN4wo4UsVDw2lWU2cCLGhgP8NHJi4LUGu9QKZ5a_wjJqDacVAkXJJONgyhyLnSYqREIQiaKXgdjhQW7BAnksbkllzpw-bROcl47ettNqAYR4QM5mt-FCOk90gKGZ9Z5q0JAj6I5L0uqIakotHBHpd73iSCZB7m520hEVnk-F9o_rq7brWEVxR7rXJ2s3VfApIyTC03upgUne5-ferTcxfP-4r3ih3J8oOl6PfR4nlsczIhSG769ITLQAAjZ1B3UZzY19jPP4gNMnWZiqmQiOCZ-yAe066bI9FLL5M6d6wYPVptC1MnsZPChodIjOm4ia1g3gEYtwaTaTNhpWJCcuQspu_sGW7jXWTlQMESlQW07IEcG5GWGITdlnZkt5bDxWru5W6R_CdpRFAw%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

I've always been a huge fan of Senator John Kennedy...

He reminds me a lot of myself. Doesn't put up with any nonsense, says it like it is, and isn't afraid of the powers of the establishment.

**I am honored to have his endorsement.**

I can't wait to throw punches alongside Senator Kennedy in the Senate. We must prove to the American people that there is still a fight left in us to save this country.

****My race is going to decide the majority in the Senate, and we can't afford to take our foot off the gas.**

**Will you contribute to my campaign to Save America?

subject: Happy Mother’s Day!
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84804437/472689881/664783965?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTk3MWE0YS03MDEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v6qsUJ1wcKoi0xOdYrP0jojKC4MuOO9cHyyfjJLD5vA=&emci=b2e4f967-eb0e-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=ea971a4a-7010-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=864787)
Happy Mother’s Day, Peter!
We have so much appreciation for all mothers and mother figures, so many of whom are **family caregivers and care workers** , who often put the needs of others before their own, giving the essential care that helps families thrive.
[**_Sign our Mother’s Day card now to thank the mothers and mother figures in our lives:_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84804438/472689883/-1039633710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTk3MWE0YS03MDEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v6qsUJ1wcKoi0xOdYrP0jojKC4MuOO9cHyyfjJLD5vA=&emci=b2e4f967-eb0e-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=ea971a4a-7010-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=864787)
[SIGN THE CARD](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84804440/472689885/-1039633710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTk3MWE0YS03MDEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v6qsUJ1wcKoi0xOdYrP0jojKC4MuOO9cHyyfjJLD5vA=&emci=b2e4f967-eb0e-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=ea971a4a-7010-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=864787)
Many care workers are also caregivers for their loved ones, meaning they have to balance caring for their family with their job. We’re fighting to ensure these caregivers, **_who do the work that makes everything else in our lives possible_** , are properly valued and acknowledged in our society.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84804441/472689888/-1039633710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTk3MWE0YS03MDEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v6qsUJ1wcKoi0xOdYrP0jojKC4MuOO9cHyyfjJLD5vA=&emci=b2e4f967-eb0e-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=ea971a4a-7010-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=864787)
[**_Can you sign our card to thank the moms and mother figures who care for our loved ones?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84804442/472689890/-1039633710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTk3MWE0YS03MDEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v6qsUJ1wcKoi0xOdYrP0jojKC4MuOO9cHyyfjJLD5vA=&emci=b2e4f967-eb0e-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=ea971a4a-7010-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=864787)

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: Happy Mother’s Day 💐
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
I'm reaching out today to wish you all a very Happy Mother’s Day

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84804502/472689985/-1747597063?nd&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.05.12_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjUyMjg1MC03MDEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jKzDyJKmEDqJ_v3YDYo_zxqP2mzwpZ691aNqJlNrhVc=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84804503/472689986/-1747597063?&amount=13&refcode=em_fr_2024.05.12_b1_es_all&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjUyMjg1MC03MDEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jKzDyJKmEDqJ_v3YDYo_zxqP2mzwpZ691aNqJlNrhVc=) **Hi Peter, I'm reaching out today to wish you all a very Happy Mother’s Day. 💐** It might be hard to believe, but that little girl in the picture is me with my mom. Growing up, I saw my mom jump through so many hoops to give me opportunities to succeed––and her leadership in our community continues to inspire me and my work every day. I know so many moms in Northeast Ohio who work tirelessly for their children––they are some of the hardest working people that I have ever met. In Congress, I have pushed to give back to every mom in the community by working to put money back in the pockets of our families, support better health outcomes for new moms and babies, and advocate for policies to support women and mothers. I will always be a champion for the hard working mothers in the district. **To all the moms, aunts, grandmothers, and motherly figures in our lives––today and every day, I say, “thank you.” It's all of you that makes the work I do so important.** Happy Mother’s Day! _Emilia Sykes_

| **A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Emilia's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84804504/472689988/-1747597063?nd&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2024.05.12_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjUyMjg1MC03MDEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jKzDyJKmEDqJ_v3YDYo_zxqP2mzwpZ691aNqJlNrhVc=) | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84804505/472689990/-1747597063?-nd&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2024.05.12_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjUyMjg1MC03MDEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jKzDyJKmEDqJ_v3YDYo_zxqP2mzwpZ691aNqJlNrhVc=)

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vshDzPjWNk

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oshDzPjWNk

Dear
Friend,

In the
annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been
attributed to a host of factors-material resources, manpower,
pre-war strategies, and tactical doctrine all play a part in
determining the victors and the vanquished.

However,
as we delve deeper into the past, we uncover a truth that
surpasses conventional wisdom-a truth of extraordinary
significance.

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the
remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated
by the savior generals-visionary leaders displaying unparalleled
expertise.

Today,
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite
your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian
and Hoover Senior Fellow, Victor Davis Hanson, has authored a
groundbreaking eBook-Victory and the Savior Generals-a
captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional
leaders.

You can
secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Inside
its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the
defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity,
contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into
seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict,
rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment
with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is
your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most
influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate
even in the present day.

Claim
your complimentary copy of Victory and the Savior Generals now
through this secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Wishing
you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Hoover
Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA
94305

name: Matt Cartwright
subject: I am blessed to have a wonderful wife who is an exceptional mother to our children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cartwright for Congress
body:
On this Mother's Day, I encourage you to take the time to thank the mothers in your life and to share your love and appreciation with them.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84806291/472694382/1790176412?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2Q4MDI2Yi03MTEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QfzMqz8QXq2FjUSpjgq_sUiR_Y9NGOMFZFiCqf3Vh_8=&emci=74a2ad25-100f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=03d8026b-7110-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=23311593) | Peter, I want to take a moment to wish all the moms and maternal figures out there a very **Happy Mother's Day!**

Mother's Day is a special time to celebrate and honor the incredible contributions that mothers make to our lives and society as a whole. It's a day to reflect on all that they do to shape future generations and to express our gratitude for their unwavering love and support.

**Personally, I feel truly blessed to have a wonderful wife who is an exceptional mother to our children.** Her love and dedication know no bounds, and I am grateful for her each and every day. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84806293/472694383/-235138187?refcode=em24_240512_momday_enask_gq_act___mc_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240512_momday_enask_gq_act___mc_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode2=03d8026b-7110-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2Q4MDI2Yi03MTEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QfzMqz8QXq2FjUSpjgq_sUiR_Y9NGOMFZFiCqf3Vh_8=) On this Mother's Day, I encourage you to take the time to thank the mothers in your life and share your love and appreciation with them. Whether it's with a phone call, a heartfelt message, or a special gesture, let them know just how much they mean to you.

**Happy Mother's Day to all the incredible moms out there! Your love and sacrifices are truly appreciated and cherished.**

– Matt Cartwright | In 2022, Matt Cartwright was one of only 5 Democrats to win a House race in a district that Donald Trump carried in 2020. name: Madison Stone
subject: My mom, Kristen McDonald Rivet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kristen for Michigan
body:
My mom is running for Congress in Michigan’s 8th District.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84806349/472694495/1433120897?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODA5ZGNiMy03MTEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TRAKapD-WYbjK7D-i4O36fMNY5vx-dicrlcUln1UNUk=) Hi there, my name is Madison. I’m a lifelong Michigander and special education teacher — _**and the proud daughter of Kristen McDonald Rivet.**_

My mom is running for Congress in Michigan’s 8th District. I could list a bunch of reasons why supporting my mom is so important for the fate of our country — Republicans are desperate to flip this seat and this race is a tossup that’ll very likely determine who controls Congress. **[But instead, I want to tell you more about who my mom is, and then kindly ask you to donate to support her campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84806350/472694496/480327972?refcode=email_051224_Madison&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODA5ZGNiMy03MTEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TRAKapD-WYbjK7D-i4O36fMNY5vx-dicrlcUln1UNUk=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84806351/472694497/480327972?refcode=email_051224_Madison&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODA5ZGNiMy03MTEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TRAKapD-WYbjK7D-i4O36fMNY5vx-dicrlcUln1UNUk=) My mom is the smartest and toughest person I know — and she’s the reason I am who I am today.

One time when I fell during a ballet recital and didn’t want to go back in front of the audience, she somehow found me backstage, held my hand and asked me “What is your name?” In that moment, she reminded me who I am. I’m not a person who quits. I’m a person who can get back on stage and push through.

“What is your name? Who are you?” That’s our big mantra. And I still ask myself that to get through tough moments now.

**My mom has always known in her heart what is right for people.** That’s why she got up and went to work every day to fight for Michigan’s kids and families. She’d tell us about students she worked with in Detroit who weren’t getting the resources they needed, and how important it was to ensure every kid gets a good education.

My mom inspired me to be a teacher, and I know she’s helped so many other families across Michigan achieve their dreams.

My mom is exactly who we need more of in Congress. Someone who is kind, smart and always stands up for what’s right — not to mention someone who can wrangle six kids in one household.

**[I’m asking you to donate to her campaign today because my mom is tough, but she can’t win this race on her own. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: my mother and grandmother made me the person I am today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
This Mother's Day, support Off the Sidelines
| | |
---
In honor of Mother’s Day, friend, I’m emailing to ask you to **_[please make a donation to support Off the Sidelines](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84806822/472695914/1171552977?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5024-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjgyNDg2Ni03MjEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jt38RvEyzupbuGQUyinyfGVx3naxUITJAfL523nzieY=)_** — my organization that is dedicated to electing more women to public office and ensuring their voices are heard in the halls of Congress. **But before I do that, I want to tell you a little bit more about two women who made me the person I am today: my mother and grandmother.**
Back when I was growing up in Albany, New York, it was still uncommon for a mother to have a career of her own. But my mom was a lawyer — one of just three women in her law school's graduating class. And my grandmother, Polly, was a political powerhouse in her own right, fiercely committed to Democratic campaigning and organizing in the state capital.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84806823/472695915/1171552977?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5024-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjgyNDg2Ni03MjEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jt38RvEyzupbuGQUyinyfGVx3naxUITJAfL523nzieY=)
_My mom at her graduation_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84806824/472695916/1171552977?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5024-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjgyNDg2Ni03MjEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jt38RvEyzupbuGQUyinyfGVx3naxUITJAfL523nzieY=)
_My grandma Polly and me_
**These strong, independent women raised me to believe in myself, to be bold and to always fight for my community.**
So today, on Mother's Day, I am holding my mother, my grandmother and all the wonderful moms in my life in my heart. But I am also thinking about how much we still need to do — how much progress still needs to be made — for moms and families.
We _must_ protect and restore reproductive rights nationwide — so that women have the power to decide when we have children, under what circumstances we are having children, and how many children we have. We _must_ pass national paid family and medical leave and ensure families have access to quality, affordable childcare. We ___must_ __ create a country where our voices and our perspectives are truly represented in our government.
**That's where Off the Sidelines comes in: We’re providing game-changing female candidates with the financial support they need to run for office — and win.** I never would have been elected without the networks of women and grassroots donors who supported me throughout my first campaign. And in an election year with more at stake than ever before, I'm proud that Off the Sidelines will be there for women with the support they need, in the moments they need it most.
**_[So please, in honor of Mother's Day, I'm personally asking you: Will you please make a donation to Off the Sidelines to help elect more women up and down the ballot this November? Your support will go a long way toward ensuring that our voices — the voices of mothers — are heard in the halls of government.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84806825/472695917/1171552977?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5024-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjgyNDg2Ni03MjEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jt38RvEyzupbuGQUyinyfGVx3naxUITJAfL523nzieY=)_**
