| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84806830/472695922/1575385346?refcode=jtk5024-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjgyNDg2Ni03MjEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jt38RvEyzupbuGQUyinyfGVx3naxUITJAfL523nzieY=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84806831/472695923/1575385346?refcode=jtk5024-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjgyNDg2Ni03MjEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jt38RvEyzupbuGQUyinyfGVx3naxUITJAfL523nzieY=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84806832/472695924/1575385346?refcode=jtk5024-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjgyNDg2Ni03MjEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jt38RvEyzupbuGQUyinyfGVx3naxUITJAfL523nzieY=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

clean_body: This Mother's Day, support Off the Sidelines | | | In honor of Mother’s Day, friend, I’m emailing to ask you to = — my organization that is dedicated to electing more women to public office and ensuring their voices are heard in the halls of Congress. But before I do that, I want to tell you a little bit more about two women who made me the person I am today: my mother and grandmother. Back when I was growing up in Albany, New York, it was still uncommon for a mother to have a career of her own. But my mom was a lawyer — one of just three women in her law school's graduating class. And my grandmother, Polly, was a political powerhouse in her own right, fiercely committed to Democratic campaigning and organizing in the state capital. = My mom at her graduation = My grandma Polly and me These strong, independent women raised me to believe in myself, to be bold and to always fight for my community. So today, on Mother's Day, I am holding my mother, my grandmother and all the wonderful moms in my life in my heart. But I am also thinking about how much we still need to do — how much progress still needs to be made — for moms and families. We must protect and restore reproductive rights nationwide — so that women have the power to decide when we have children, under what circumstances we are having children, and how many children we have. We must pass national paid family and medical leave and ensure families have access to quality, affordable childcare. We _must create a country where our voices and our perspectives are truly represented in our government. That's where Off the Sidelines comes in: We’re providing game-changing female candidates with the financial support they need to run for office — and win. I never would have been elected without the networks of women and grassroots donors who supported me throughout my first campaign. And in an election year with more at stake than ever before, I'm proud that Off the Sidelines will be there for women with the support they need, in the moments they need it most. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Off the Sidelines will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Wishing you and your loved ones a very happy Mother's Day, Kirsten Gillibrand | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

It doesn’t stop, friend.
From cursing in court to the tomes of alleged crimes that would even make _The Godfather_ sweat, Trump knows no bounds.
To make matters worse, The American Conservative, one of Project 2025’s writers, has been floating the idea of allowing Trump to serve a _third_ term.
Let us rephrase: They want a loud-mouthed, racist, homophobic, misogynistic lunatic who’s already promised to be a dictator on _day one_ of his nonexistent second term, to be allowed to have a **_THIRD TERM_**.
_Woof...that was a mouthful._
Now more than ever, we need the support of young voters to ensure that Trump does not step foot in the Oval Office again. [Right now, will you stand with us in the fight for our democracy and pledge to vote against Trump?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84807025/472696454/647334477?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTMyMmMxOS03MzEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jDHStS-QGxliWHsrjFGVW6ybH4lyzcfQdSmkcrmuKNY=&emci=827f28fb-1c0e-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=11322c19-7310-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=6787172)

Consolidating power in the hands of Trump completely undermines the foundations of our democracy. Unfortunately this isn’t obvious to enough people. We don’t want anti-womxn, anti-science, anti-democracy criminals in the White House, and **_DEFINITELY_** not three times.
With court dates being “indefinitely postponed” and lawyers doing their thing, the fight to ensure Dictator Don doesn’t become President again will be at the polls.
Together, we can ensure that isn’t a problem this election year or ANY election year. The youth vote showed out in 2020 and we can do it again, but it’s going to take all of us. name: Amelia
subject: Can I take a moment to tell you about my mom?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84807735/472698762/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWZkMjJjYy03MzEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HwS4ujNRWu166EP7zpJDH_096S5DW_4M4Z6QrFF5R3A=) Hi there, since it’s Mother’s Day, I wanted to take a moment to tell you a bit about my mom, Andrea Salinas. Like so many people across the county, I was furious and devastated when the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, ripping away our fundamental rights. And I turned to my mom, who promised me this wasn’t the end of the story, and that we’d keep fighting. Here’s what my mom did next: **she got elected to Congress, where she’s fighting every day to restore our rights and help people across our country.** Friend, my mom has always had my back. And I’m so proud of the kind of leader she is in Congress — compassionate, tough, and willing to work as hard as possible to build a better future for me, for our community, and for all Oregonians. Believe me when I say, she will never back down, no matter what kinds of obstacles she faces. **[In short, she’s a great mom, and I think she’s a pretty great member of Congress, too. If you agree with me, and you’d like to support her campaign, I’d be so grateful, Friend, and I know she would be, too.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84807736/472698769/1744833800?refcode=email_051224_MothersDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWZkMjJjYy03MzEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HwS4ujNRWu166EP7zpJDH_096S5DW_4M4Z6QrFF5R3A=)** Thank you so much, Amelia _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84807737/472698776/1744833800?refcode=email_051224_MothersDay&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWZkMjJjYy03MzEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HwS4ujNRWu166EP7zpJDH_096S5DW_4M4Z6QrFF5R3A=)

Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. Fellow Conservative,

Hollywood funding Democrat candidates for Congress is a tale as old as the movie industry itself.

You and I both know how rare it is for a celebrity in Hollywood to support conservative candidates for federal office - it’s even more rare for them to offer their support publicly. But quite frankly, I couldn’t care less about winning the support of Hollywood actors, directors, or anyone involved with the entertainment industry.

**My opponent, on the other hand, is actively soliciting their financial support.**

I have received emails from actress Glenn Close on two occasions. In her fundraising appeals on behalf of Jon Tester’s campaign, she writes, _**“Jon Tester is running for reelection in Montana—it’s the most important race on the map. This election will determine the future of our country, and I can’t sit on the sidelines with stakes as high as these.”**_

Please consider a contribution to my campaign today. **[We don't need a bought-and-paid-for Hollywood Senator representing American interests any longer.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=975f2d146c794eaea7c48bfedb59d38c&_e=JcFWrmpiJaYVm45KQjwMGN36ics3XD_onIJoGIuqdlSNaSNMhtR-_wp2goi3Z8p-72pe7qiUqZdIzGFAD1c3NrqmyDiFyKQjO5mRNv18gVTnEFdRDZ4pY82Z65CI8FS72bXnLolh5DTt-QQSYDWzx-UknBDjaqzauLt_8ozvMi4Gvuvc6QL6HXGFe9E77GT1cGV-mXcuMBaCoyPWSFH2VNuiKHv3DNmdOeJUlauJ4lbyEbTon1iE_qJNAJi7Y6Y8xP8O_wt4d3_jBSt0kIKKymNMCWf4OuZIIu-0L1DjLH1mtyyseXxHYAJFn5fww-750wCNcon1R6lDtuw-xX9XaanKXYS8XibykyjbaLSHQP2rUpYpVsPUfy70jM9TeXxm3qJYclQJREP3M1NbNAZpXqBj11x8GRPFvLLUVye7EcY%3D)**

[**HELP ME DEFEAT CALIFORNIA'S FAVORITE SENATOR ->** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=975f2d146c794eaea7c48bfedb59d38c&_e=JcFWrmpiJaYVm45KQjwMGN36ics3XD_onIJoGIuqdlSNaSNMhtR-_wp2goi3Z8p-72pe7qiUqZdIzGFAD1c3NrqmyDiFyKQjO5mRNv18gVTnEFdRDZ4pY82Z65CI8FS72bXnLolh5DTt-QQSYDWzx-UknBDjaqzauLt_8ozvMi4Gvuvc6QL6HXGFe9E77GT1cGV-mXcuMBaCoyPWSFH2VNuiKHv3DNmdOeJUlauJ4lbyEbTon1iE_qJNAJi7Y6Y8xP8O_wt4d3_jBSt0kIKKytgNmnz2WqeLhJOWjmy5q440KW7m83PPgQcUTWhiofCKPABZddUcMKoE95GGLrgy5Oz15ACll0JfcI6u4-HaNAGIMAZnAVc-3UnMrXB8msgK_rEvhjO8wmzUW2IFQrqUKTF-XfOtXUdfuhq0VCWdOHE%3D)
**
Is it the Hollywood, coastal California elite like Barbara Streisand, or the people of Montana who sent him to Washington to be their voice? **

With A-LIST Hollywood celebrities on his team, _**there is no telling the amount of resources Tester will be able to marshal over the next six months.**_

body:
Today on Mother’s Day and every day, I promise to fight for all women alike regardless of their sexuality, religion, race, or socio-economic status.

Janelle Stelson has spent her career advocating for truth and integrity, and now she's running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/57CdP-wFgkuQm58EpOgxvQ2?unsubscribedata=hKX%2BWFNONF0w9z9q0DF9L%2F1KkcdNQXl4l7Ccg%2BYmZ40zy0Q9kwWsCMwM1AE0SyhixDtdncNZvwGz9dMjE94TIouW%2Fz3JjY3adqTPCqYyDhXV7MDb9wtcgiWW3C3DZFI%2FJPd04d2Rm7NHBXac0TIXBVddAqSrDe1I8xUtA%2FVa8SS9D09E80SQlnCRULOmn%2FeWTb6L6BkbvJSuzTtL7R9WDfm5XWiA5em1KwpvQzCZE%2FbIOywsy0CYjzAYQC5RMBck9QVeOiwi3GNKch04xDWfLP%2FzW5ti7ARi58JcKxym3ztS7Q2XlRS4il9AHHbzbOBqoe4Otp8fNO69oFlMBvHCuJMjeAZnCuhb2uxdIQYK5vUXzEiOUB6m8gfmYoe8raQwsHhUeNZsATsKlVsf6FRKbre%2Fg2VzpQxqjxF7q2kmRnzVOo0%2BMV6D8raKeQwpuUuh)

| | My mother is an incredibly special person. Growing up, she taught my three sisters and me to follow our dreams, to always tell the truth, and to serve others. When my father passed away in 2019, he had one request for me: Take care of your sisters and take care of your mother. Part of the reason I’m running for Congress is to be a voice for not just my mother and sisters but for all Pennsylvania women who have been left behind by MAGA extremists like Scott Perry. It’s no secret that right now reproductive rights are under attack in our country. From rolling back Roe v. Wade, to the dozens of states that have implemented statewide bans, to our very own Congressman Scott Perry — who has co-sponsored a national abortion and IVF ban every Congress since 2018 — Republicans are trying to legislate who should and should not become mothers. To that I say, enough is enough. It’s time we send a champion for bodily autonomy to Congress to fight for women’s rights. Rights that our mothers, aunts, sisters, and friends fought so hard for us to have. Today on Mother’s Day — and every day — I promise to fight for all women regardless of their sexuality, religion, race, or socio-economic status. Because every woman deserves the opportunity to choose how to best build her family. Happy Mother’s Day! Janelle Stelson has spent her career advocating for truth and integrity, and now she's running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | My mother is an incredibly special person. Growing up, she taught my three sisters and me to follow our dreams, to always tell the truth, and to serve others. When my father passed away in 2019, he had one request for me: Take care of your sisters and take care of your mother. Part of the reason I’m running for Congress is to be a voice for not just my mother and sisters but for all Pennsylvania women who have been left behind by MAGA extremists like Scott Perry. It’s no secret that right now reproductive rights are under attack in our country. From rolling back Roe v. Wade, to the dozens of states that have implemented statewide bans, to our very own Congressman Scott Perry — who has co-sponsored a national abortion and IVF ban every Congress since 2018 — Republicans are trying to legislate who should and should not become mothers. To that I say, enough is enough. It’s time we send a champion for bodily autonomy to Congress to fight for women’s rights. Rights that our mothers, aunts, sisters, and friends fought so hard for us to have. Today on Mother’s Day — and every day — I promise to fight for all women regardless of their sexuality, religion, race, or socio-economic status. Because every woman deserves the opportunity to choose how to best build her family. Happy Mother’s Day! Janelle | | = | | | ---|---|--- = Janelle Stelson has been speaking directly to the people of Central Pennsylvania for more than three decades as an Emmy-award-winning journalist. Now, Janelle is taking on Scott Perry and fighting for what we deserve — good-paying jobs to support our families, abortion rights, the highest quality healthcare and education, and someone we know we can trust. Janelle needs your support to unseat MAGA extremist Scott Perry and flip Pennsylvania's 10th District blue.** | = = Paid for by Friends of Janelle Stelson Friends of Janelle Stelson P.O. subject: I wanted to take a minute this Mother’s Day to share why I’m proud of Sarah
body:
It's Sarah's mom.
#
Hi, it’s Sal — Sarah’s number one fan!
I love Sarah, and I wanted to reach out to you this Mother’s Day to share why I’m so proud to be her mom.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240512-1?refcode=em20240512-1-361&refcode2=361_21716_RLH1Ab&akid=361%2E21716%2ERLH1Ab)
**Sarah is a hard worker, brave, and compassionate. She has guts and a backbone.** Her love for Delaware and her determination to lift up those too often left out and overlooked in our government fueled her fight to win a seat in the Delaware State Senate and make history.
**From there, Sarah got to work and hasn’t slowed down.**
As State Senator, she passed paid family and medical leave, gun safety reform, and protections for workers across our state. And I know she’ll continue to be a fierce advocate for all of us in Congress.
**I’m so proud of Sarah, and I can’t wait to call her our Congresswoman!**
But there are only a few months left in this election, and there’s no time to waste. To win this race, she needs YOU.
[**So please consider making a gift to help Sarah power her campaign for Congress.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240512-1?refcode=em20240512-1-361&refcode2=361_21716_RLH1Ab&akid=361%2E21716%2ERLH1Ab)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240512-1?refcode=em20240512-1-361&refcode2=361_21716_RLH1Ab&akid=361%2E21716%2ERLH1Ab)**
Thank you,
Sal McBride aka Sarah’s Mom
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20240512-1&t=1&refcode2=361_21716_RLH1Ab&akid=361%2E21716%2ERLH1Ab)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=361%2E21716%2ERLH1Ab)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=361%2E21716%2ERLH1Ab)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=361%2E21716%2ERLH1Ab)

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: I wouldn’t be who I am today without my mom
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR BY
MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
My mom and grandma have been my pillars of strength, guiding me through life's challenges and celebrating its joys. Their endless sacrifices and boundless love have inspired me to always strive to be the best version of myself.
I want to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude to all the moms and mother figures out there on this special day.

Growing up, I was incredibly fortunate to have two strong mother figures in my life: my mom and my grandma. **Their unwavering love, kindness, and support shaped me into the man I am today.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84810787/472705642/132774807?refcode=em24_240512_momday_fnd_gq_act___mj_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240512_momday_fnd_gq_act___mj_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e4e1aa94-7610-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGUxYWE5NC03NjEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDt1ZQvz5B17aXQzmpyMNMYUCyqpyTD5Hn-s2Sf7t2I=) My mom and grandma have been my pillars of strength, guiding me through life's challenges and celebrating its joys. Their endless sacrifices and boundless love have inspired me to always strive to be the best version of myself.

**So, to all the moms and mother figures who pour their hearts into nurturing and caring for their loved ones, I want to wish you a very Happy Mother's Day.** Today, we celebrate you and all that you do.

– Mondaire Jones

clean_body: My mom and grandma have been my pillars of strength, guiding me through life's challenges and celebrating its joys. Their endless sacrifices and boundless love have inspired me to always strive to be the best version of myself. I want to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude to all the moms and mother figures out there on this special day. Growing up, I was incredibly fortunate to have two strong mother figures in my life: my mom and my grandma. Their unwavering love, kindness, and support shaped me into the man I am today. = My mom and grandma have been my pillars of strength, guiding me through life's challenges and celebrating its joys. Their endless sacrifices and boundless love have inspired me to always strive to be the best version of myself. So, to all the moms and mother figures who pour their hearts into nurturing and caring for their loved ones, I want to wish you a very Happy Mother's Day. Today, we celebrate you and all that you do. – Mondaire Jones | Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He's ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he's doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. = = **= ** PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591

name: Adam Schiff
subject: To my wife, Eve, and all the wonderful mothers out there
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=6440%2E5257348%2EYeftYo)
Hi Derek,
I wanted to take a moment this morning to wish a happy Mother’s Day to all the moms who help nurture and provide for our families.
I especially want to celebrate my wife, Eve, an incredible mother to our children Lexi and Eli, and someone who has supported and taken such good care of our family.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202405-mothersday.WVwnj-&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240512_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=6440%2E5257348%2EYeftYo)
It’s no exaggeration to say that I would not be here, serving in Congress, or running for U.S. Senate, without Eve’s support. She’s been my rock through good times and bad, and my kids and I agree that she’s the best mom in the world.
**[Derek, to make Eve’s day extra special this year, I’m hoping you will sign the Mother’s Day card I’ve prepared for her. She means so much to me and to our family, and this campaign would not be possible without her. Please take a moment to add your name, and a short note if you’d like, today._](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202405-mothersday.WVwnj-&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240512_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=6440%2E5257348%2EYeftYo)**
[SIGN THE CARD](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202405-mothersday.WVwnj-&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240512_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=6440%2E5257348%2EYeftYo)
---
I’m wishing a happy Mother’s Day to the amazing moms out there. I hope you have a joyful, restful day.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/4126?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240512_AM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=6440%2E5257348%2EYeftYo)

To all the mothers out there!

Happy Mother's Day, Peter! Growing up, my mom was the backbone of the house, wrangling me and my five siblings. She balanced raising us while also working as a healthcare professional. I couldn’t be more grateful to her for all she has done for our family. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84811407/472707741/1938203091?refcode=240512_ew_mothers_day_img&ms=240512_ew_mothers_day&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmI5M2UxZDgtNzcxMC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=STRu8b9l46Ng_-mRaF2_8dVgpdoNrlrqAZk_lX4RAfY=) My story is not unique. I’ve heard countless stories from across WI-03 of strong women and mothers who play a vital role in the lives of their families. As I have run for Congress, these stories have inspired me and opened my eyes to the struggles that so many mothers face on a daily basis. **[I am running to be an advocate for ALL Wisconsinites in Congress and will fight to ensure that our mothers receive the support that they deserve. [Upgrade to paid](https://substack..CMIsC5WbOuoCcM7mp-DTozaWDZFwbeex7TitAQe11SY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=144558562)
Global Disaster Briefs are your weekly (or more often, if needed) summaries and headlines from around the world about natural and man-made disasters, climate change, disease and health, and international conflict. See endnotes for resources used in putting this report together. Data is retrieved and summarized on the day of publication unless otherwise noted.
**NEW SECTIONS!** I've added a disease monitor section to include global news about sustained and emerging infectious diseases. Additionally, I've added a tropical cyclone summary that I'll continue to report on throughout hurricane season (through Nov. 30).

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: Happy Mother’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84812138/472709989/1072501871?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGQ1OTNjYWYtNzgxMC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=38PfJcqyHwO90KmmpuvZb3wMJ1HgGsWwfwMDCbqmlHc=)
---
Happy Mother's Day! To the mothers reading this email, I hope you have a beautiful day surrounded by love and family. We appreciate you, not just today, but every day.

Today, I think about all the mothers who have taken care of us, advocated for us, and believed in us when we needed it most. I think about my wife, Monica, who our twin daughters are very lucky to have as their mother. I think about my mother, who worked so hard as a farmworker in the fields and at home to create a better life for our family.

My mom used to say that our family was “poor in money, but rich in love” and she was right. Her steady and dedicated love for my siblings and me carried us through tough times and pushed us to be the best versions of ourselves.

My mom knew that getting an education was the best way to get a professional career so that I wouldn’t have to work in the fields in the desert heat like she and my dad had to. She believed in my dream of becoming a doctor and returning to the desert to help people and encouraged me every step of the way. She prayed before every exam and interview I had throughout college, medical school, and medical boards, and before every election. Her support guided me to where I am today and brightens the path in front of me.

To all the mothers I represent in Congress and across the country, we thank you. You make everything possible.

For those of you who are struggling today, you are in my thoughts. I pray this day brings you hope.

Sincerely,
Raul

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Town halls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
[ photos ] This is what I heard from Missourians across the state
#
Peter,
Over the last few weeks, I’ve been holding town halls across the state to meet with Missourians and hear about the issues that are most important to them.
In Ste. Genevieve and St. Charles, and South Kansas City and Parkville, everyday people have similar concerns — **and this morning,[before I ask you to make a donation to my campaign,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49808?refcode=em20240512-5497&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5497%2E614464%2EcIs5ET) I want to take a few minutes to tell you about them.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49808?refcode=em20240512-5497&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5497%2E614464%2EcIs5ET)
We kicked things off in Ste. Genevieve, where people shared with me their worries about plans to “sunset” Social Security, like the ones brought forward by Senator Rick Scott. This is something I heard at every single stop across the state.
While Josh Hawley would put Rick Scott in charge of the Senate, I’ll fight like hell to protect every dollar people like you spend their lives working to earn.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49808?refcode=em20240512-5497&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5497%2E614464%2EcIs5ET)
Then we were off to St. Charles, where a crowd of more than 150 people showed up to talk about our chance this year to end the Big Brother control of our bodies and lives that politicians like Hawley never seem to want to give up.
From his personal crusade to overturn Roe v. Wade to his corrupt family business aimed at outlawing the abortion pill in all 50 states, Josh Hawley has made it his life’s mission to strip away reproductive freedom. But with an initiative to enshrine abortion rights into Missouri’s constitution and an opportunity to hold Hawley accountable, Missourians are fired up to take back their power this November.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49808?refcode=em20240512-5497&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=5497%2E614464%2EcIs5ET)
We started this past week in South Kansas City at the Pipe Fitters Local 533 Union Hall. Even despite some storms, over 120 Missourians from all over the metro came out to share their thoughts with me.
They voiced concerns about attacks on working people — and the urgent need to pass legislation like the PRO Act to end “Right-to-Work” scams across the country. Organized labor built the middle class, and they continue to be the greatest advocate for America’s workers. I’m proud to stand with them in this race.
We ended the night with dozens of new volunteers, who are ready to knock doors, send texts, and make phone calls to turn out the vote this November.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49808?refcode=em20240512-5497&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=5497%2E614464%2EcIs5ET)
We closed things out on Wednesday up north in historic Parkville for a town hall at the American Legion. Over 100 people from all over the Northland — teachers, nurses, small business owners, students — came out to share their stories.
We talked about breaking up monopoly power, as it squeezes Missouri’s small business owners on everything from supply chain costs to insurance for workers.
I also heard from public school teachers, who told me about the serious lack of investment into salaries and education as a whole in this state. As Missouri’s U.S. Senator and the son of a retired teacher’s aide, they’ll always be able to count on me to fight for investment in our workers and public schools.
**Between now and November, I’ll continue hosting town halls and events all around the state because hearing from everyday Missourians is one of the most important parts of this grassroots movement.**
But this campaign also needs resources to keep traveling around, meeting with Missourians, and getting our message in front of voters — and since we’re not taking a cent from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil + Big Pharma execs, I’m relying on your help to do it, Peter. That is why I’m asking you:
**[Will you make a donation today to help us keep up this momentum tomorrow and every day until November 5? We’re building a truly people-powered movement, so your support is the only thing that will make that possible.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49808?refcode=em20240512-5497&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=5497%2E614464%2EcIs5ET)**

clean_body: [ photos ] This is what I heard from Missourians across the state Peter, Over the last few weeks, I’ve been holding town halls across the state to meet with Missourians and hear about the issues that are most important to them. In Ste. Genevieve and St. Charles, and South Kansas City and Parkville, everyday people have similar concerns — and this morning, I want to take a few minutes to tell you about them. We kicked things off in Ste. Genevieve, where people shared with me their worries about plans to “sunset” Social Security, like the ones brought forward by Senator Rick Scott. This is something I heard at every single stop across the state. While Josh Hawley would put Rick Scott in charge of the Senate, I’ll fight like hell to protect every dollar people like you spend their lives working to earn. Then we were off to St. Charles, where a crowd of more than 150 people showed up to talk about our chance this year to end the Big Brother control of our bodies and lives that politicians like Hawley never seem to want to give up. From his personal crusade to overturn Roe v. Wade to his corrupt family business aimed at outlawing the abortion pill in all 50 states, Josh Hawley has made it his life’s mission to strip away reproductive freedom. But with an initiative to enshrine abortion rights into Missouri’s constitution and an opportunity to hold Hawley accountable, Missourians are fired up to take back their power this November. We started this past week in South Kansas City at the Pipe Fitters Local 533 Union Hall. Even despite some storms, over 120 Missourians from all over the metro came out to share their thoughts with me. They voiced concerns about attacks on working people — and the urgent need to pass legislation like the PRO Act to end “Right-to-Work” scams across the country. Organized labor built the middle class, and they continue to be the greatest advocate for America’s workers. I’m proud to stand with them in this race. We ended the night with dozens of new volunteers, who are ready to knock doors, send texts, and make phone calls to turn out the vote this November. We closed things out on Wednesday up north in historic Parkville for a town hall at the American Legion. Over 100 people from all over the Northland — teachers, nurses, small business owners, students — came out to share their stories. We talked about breaking up monopoly power, as it squeezes Missouri’s small business owners on everything from supply chain costs to insurance for workers. I also heard from public school teachers, who told me about the serious lack of investment into salaries and education as a whole in this state. As Missouri’s U.S. Senator and the son of a retired teacher’s aide, they’ll always be able to count on me to fight for investment in our workers and public schools. Between now and November, I’ll continue hosting town halls and events all around the state because hearing from everyday Missourians is one of the most important parts of this grassroots movement. But this campaign also needs resources to keep traveling around, meeting with Missourians, and getting our message in front of voters — and since we’re not taking a cent from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil + Big Pharma execs, I’m relying on your help to do it, Peter. That is why I’m asking you: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: We really couldn’t do this without you. Thank you for your support. — Lucas | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

Happy Mother’s Day. To us, this day is not just about celebrating the mothers and mother-like figures in our lives — it's also a moment to pay homage to the trailblazing Founding Mothers of the voting rights movement.
With unwavering resolve, boundless courage, and a steadfast commitment to justice, these women played pivotal roles in nurturing and shaping our nation's democracy.
**We are honored to introduce (or reintroduce) you to these extraordinary Founding Mothers:**
**Mary Church Terrell** was one of the first Black women to earn a college degree in the U.S. In the late 1800s, she banded together with other women’s suffrage and civil rights leaders to form the National Association of Colored Women. After the 19th Amendment was ratified, she continued to fight for Black women’s suffrage and challenge segregation until her death in 1954.
**Fannie Lou Hamer** spent her career fighting back against systemic racism present in elections. After facing violence and intimidation as barriers to voting, she helped form the Mississippi Freedom Democratic Party and pushed for greater racial equality in the political process. She was a key organizer of the 1964 Mississippi Freedom Summer and helped found the National Women’s Political Caucus, which remains active today.
**Diane Nash** became a renowned organizer during the Civil Rights Movement. She initially got involved in the sit-in movement in Nashville as a student, helped to found the Student Nonviolent Coordinating Committee, and led the Freedom Riders to challenge segregation. Her role in the 1964 voter registration campaign in Selma, Alabama led to the passage of the Voting Rights Act of 1965.
**Margaret Sloan-Hunter** was a Black feminist, lesbian, and civil rights leader. As a teenager, she worked with the Southern Christian Leadership Conference to march and advocate for voting rights. A former editor of Ms. Magazine and first chairwoman of the National Black Feminist Organization, she was a key advocate in challenging racism and sexism as intersectional oppressions.
We’re endlessly grateful to these Founding Mothers, who dedicated their lives to fighting for future generations’ freedoms. And we’re proud to continue that fight today — especially as extremists continue to place barriers between voters and the ballot box.

name: President Joe Biden Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: 📧 New Message:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
We have exactly 176 days until Election Day. If we want any chance of securing victory, we need to heed President Biden’s call and get the job done. So, can you chip in? | | |
---
| |
---|---

**🚨 There are _176 days_ until Election Day 🚨** 176 days – that’s all we have left to make an impact on Election Day. subject: Team, Hakeem Jeffries is a HERO
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
you’ve been handpicked to sign >>
| **Leader Hakeem Jeffries Puts Unified Democrats in Strongest Position to Retake Majority** Listen, Rep. Hakeem Jeffries has been an INCREDIBLE leader for Democrats while the MAGA mob has spent the entire year ripping itself to pieces.

**So we’re giving 500 top Democrats the opportunity to show Rep. Jeffries our appreciation for all his hard work!** [**We’re hand-delivering this card to his office at 8 AM tomorrow – so we need your signature by MIDNIGHT! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67754?t=6&akid=14488%2E878179%2ELE-8lc) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67754?t=7&akid=14488%2E878179%2ELE-8lc) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67754?t=8&akid=14488%2E878179%2ELE-8lc)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

MAGA Republicans have done nothing but tear themselves apart since they seized control of Congress. **Even potentially ousting ANOTHER Speaker!**

While they’re busy waging a civil war, you’ve stood strong for the American people, our democracy, and President Biden’s amazing agenda.

**Your continued strength puts Democrats in the best position possible to take back the House in 2024 and end the MAGA circus for good.**

**We’re so grateful to have you leading the way!** [**That’s why today I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my appreciation and to help Democrats flip the 4 seats we need to WIN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67754?t=9&akid=14488%2E878179%2ELE-8lc) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67754?t=10&akid=14488%2E878179%2ELE-8lc) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/67754?t=11&akid=14488%2E878179%2ELE-8lc)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=14488%2E878179%2ELE-8lc). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=14488%2E878179%2ELE-8lc).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=14488%2E878179%2ELE-8lc) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=14488%2E878179%2ELE-8lc). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=14488%2E878179%2ELE-8lc)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The dress that only came out for weddings, graduations, and funerals.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2169%2E4032634%2Eb632jw)
---
I hope you’re having a good Mother’s Day, and if this holiday hits you hard, my heart goes out to you. I’m thinking about my mother today, and I’m thinking about a time when she dug deep to take care of our family. After my daddy had a heart attack, he couldn’t work for a while. Bills piled up. We lost our family station wagon. It looked like the house would be next to go. At night, I’d overhear my parents talk, and that's when I learned words like “mortgage” and “foreclosure.” One day, I walked into my parents’ bedroom. My mother’s face was red and puffy. A dress was laid out over the bedspread — the dress that only came out for weddings, graduations, and funerals. "We are not going to lose this house,” she kept saying. “We are not going to lose this house.” She’d never worked outside the home. She was terrified. But she knew what she had to do. I watched her while she pulled it together, put that dress on, put on her high heels, blew her nose, walked to Sears, and got a minimum wage job. And that minimum wage job saved our house, but more importantly, it saved our family. This is a story that’s written on my heart. I’m remembering my mother’s courage this Mother’s Day — and I’m thinking about all the mamas out there fighting for their families. I’m also thinking about all the ways the deck is stacked against mothers and families like ours today. A mother in the same situation as our family today would not be able to work a minimum wage job and keep everyone afloat. Today, the federal minimum wage is $7.25 per hour — a wage that has not increased in about 15 years. With that, a family living on minimum wage today is living in poverty. And, without quality, affordable child care, mothers have been shoved out of the workforce. They will feel the consequences — in lost earnings, in lower Social Security benefits — for the rest of their lives. And, notably, most women who get abortions today are already mothers. Many are working multiple jobs that don’t pay enough to support their children. Abortion bans make it even harder for those families to make ends meet. I’m going to keep up the fight for higher wages, affordable child care, paid family leave, and reproductive freedom to honor my mother and mothers everywhere. And, look: I’m sure that social media right now is chock-full of Republican politicians waxing poetic about how much they love mothers. But I don’t want to see any tributes from them today unless they’re actually going to do something — anything — to improve the lives of mothers tomorrow. Thank you, for being a part of our grassroots movement to make real change — to put our government on the side of mothers and families. Elizabeth

---

name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: How I won my first Emmy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow American, When I won my first Emmy award, I was absolutely shocked. _**I never imagined a little girl who was a first-generation American would ever be able to make it this far. **_ **But I know that it wasn’t my doing: it was all God’s.**
---
Before I’m a Congresswoman or a journalist or a Floridian, I am first and foremost a woman of faith. I know I would never have gotten anywhere near to where I am today with my faith in our Lord. **But today, our faith is under attack.** The radical Left wants to replace our Judeo-Christian nation with a Godless socialist woke hellscape. From using the Biden DOJ to throw peaceful pro-life protesters in jail to attacks on faith-based learning and school choice, the radical Left takes any opportunity to smack our faith in the face. **It’s time for us to fight back against their Godless shenanigans.** _**[_**Will you join me today to defend our freedom to worship?**_](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=60b0882e447149b8bf219dd06a33a84e&_e=CTi2_mkAbpYG2NcMUuBxLNhqOEc3_yPXj8eOUtUxRscTid_4dBKu48r6w9Rfb302xub0yhbBbxENULPDBpWgkja7tcWZMqaIPKYApfGN7uP5DEZz04noVEY9qEKaZMnsfj4NE8cqCAFxjAoLyApJ6uww86hbypWMFL9UDHjPb6mVjaAD-nGtmmA9Um_Lams9WvyC5IzADBUO97ARD0ZnaHX3KSt1f8dOx8Flk91FuJLy3JJAX9OBxtYJsWlFUVlBebsLwWKA7TQZ5e4G7HZ9q1kINe9uBLNoTt9_Wzoz64pyL_NKAa2p1wOAbs1pjvBAh_bQckFt18-XUszIuAzgsA%3D%3D)**_
---
[**DEFEND RELIGIOUS FREEDOM**](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=60b0882e447149b8bf219dd06a33a84e&_e=CTi2_mkAbpYG2NcMUuBxLNhqOEc3_yPXj8eOUtUxRscTid_4dBKu48r6w9Rfb302xub0yhbBbxENULPDBpWgkja7tcWZMqaIPKYApfGN7uP5DEZz04noVEY9qEKaZMnsfj4NE8cqCAFxjAoLyApJ6uww86hbypWMFL9UDHjPb6mVjaAD-nGtmmA9Um_Lams9B5CsKqhpJi7via8YMwF0e-16V3B8Cqh86693_CNlo7fRMgWzOHaBxoACkwmTG_-6pUXK7C744vzeG36okrgny6Fo721q5_-Cae9spWbUUngfjRG0qYhBbaC-JeOF2EvZdl3NAqsYrFGZ6rsY0qMAeA%3D%3D)

I know I would never have gotten anywhere near to where I am today with my faith in our Lord. But today, our faith is under attack. The radical Left wants to replace our Judeo-Christian nation with a Godless socialist woke hellscape. From using the Biden DOJ to throw peaceful pro-life protesters in jail to attacks on faith-based learning and school choice, the radical Left takes any opportunity to smack our faith in the face. name: Jimmy Panetta
subject: Happy Mother’s Day! 💐
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2024, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84814750/472717234/-2113420158?source=EM_NBI_JP_20240512_ST_Mother'sDay_0_3MO_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_Mother'sDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTI0YzZlMC03YjEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q5ZZix1d1ilAIDxqA0BSRbdxbYFRPNem14uXed6RGVY=&emci=4daffc2e-490e-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=8524c6e0-7b10-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

**_Happy Mother’s Day!_**

I hope you will join me today in honoring _all_ who act as mothers, whether that be a mom, grandmother, stepmother, aunt, sister, friend, teacher, or mentor.

Mothers everywhere are the cornerstones of our families, our communities, and our society. So, today, let’s celebrate the women in our lives who raised us and those who continue to lift us up each day through their sacrifices, words of encouragement, and unconditional love. I am lucky to have so many different mothers in my life, from my mom Sylvia to my wife Carrie. I know I’m a better man because of them and I work to support and value mothers in my own life and across the country by advocating for legislation that helps moms everywhere.

Thanks for taking the time to celebrate selfless mothers across the country. And to all the mothers out there, I hope you have a wonderful, relaxing day and the chance to be celebrated more than once a year!

From my family to yours, I hope you have a loving, restful Mother’s Day spent showing love to the special women in your lives.

– Jimmy
---

name: The Team at No Dem Left Behind
subject: Happy Mother's Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
Let's celebrate Mother's Day by appreciating some of the most impactful mothers in American history.
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
## Happy Mother's Day!
---
This Mother's Day, let's take a moment to cherish the incredible mothers in our lives and celebrate their unwavering love, strength, and resilience. We can also take a moment to reflect on the profound impact that mothers have had on this country. Throughout history, there have been so many remarkable mothers who have not only shaped history, but also inspired generations with their dedication and courage. Today, we want to shine a spotlight on a few of these extraordinary women.
## Ketanji Brown Jackson
Ketanji Brown Jackson, the first Black woman to serve on the United States Supreme Court, exemplifies the remarkable balance of career and motherhood. Despite facing numerous challenges in her career, she has always prioritized her role as a mother. Her heartfelt message to her daughters, Talia and Leila, serves as an inspiring reminder of the dedication and resilience it takes to be a mother: _**"Girls, I know it has not been easy as I've tried to navigate the challenges of juggling my career and motherhood. But I hope that you've seen that with hard work, determination, and love, it can be done."**_ \- Ketanji Brown Jackson
## Abigail Adams
|
---
Looking back at the founding of our nation, we find incredible examples of mothers who led the way. Abigail Adams, the second First Lady of the United States, not only managed their farm and raised their children single-handedly, but also advocated for equal rights for women and the abolition of slavery. Her son, John Quincy Adams, who later became the 6th president of the United States, described her as an "angel upon Earth" and a "minister of blessing" to all.
## Michelle Obama
|
---
In more recent history, Michelle Obama has been an inspiration to mothers everywhere. Serving as the First Lady from 2009-2017, Obama spent a very impactful 8 years advocating on behalf of military families, helping working women balance career and family, encouraging national service, and promoting the arts and arts education. Her candid reflections on motherhood remind us of the challenges and joys that come with raising children. As she eloquently puts it: _**"Being a mother has been a master class in letting go. Try as we might, there’s only so much we can control. Motherhood has taught me that, most of the time, my job is to give them the space to explore and develop into the people they want to be. Not who I want them to be or who I wish I was at that age, but who they are, deep inside."**_
## Sojourner Truth
Born into slavery in 1797, Isabella Baumfree, later known as Sojourner Truth, became a prominent advocate for human rights in the nineteenth century. Despite enduring the hardships of slavery, she escaped in 1827 and became an itinerant preacher. Known for her powerful "Ain't I a Woman?" speech delivered at the 1851 Women's Rights Convention, Truth was a key figure in the abolitionist and women's rights movements. After escaping slavery with her baby daughter, Truth fought tirelessly for the freedom of her son, Peter. Her landmark legal victory against slavery and her advocacy for abolition and women's suffrage continue to inspire us today.
**This Mother's Day, let's honor the incredible mothers who have shaped history and continue to inspire us with their strength, resilience, and unwavering love. To all the mothers out there, thank you for everything you do. Happy Mother's Day!**

body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=RkqgZbjrC1wUNwYP%2FA8ezWxsSaMveMHPSGOcs5K7JdA6sxyfhNvOIV%2FdrWYfcIVTApKm7Hrv6T7c8oHE7T9C%2BKYj3cx%2FJf74S0tuZuVGW9HQ%2FKnsICtIuLuS28MIEQtrQJiRboOJVa%2FNjmM%2FiJUC6txdpzT%2F6Czbv%2F1jMH2nbUdjwEfFn5vjPcGuySb7x8UdrmhQ6Qsr3M9jFo1zPF0QISN%2BvbtcogfGhfJb%2BWu9HYy3a8nGGG8pE5HRhbdMpuFMmHAEJRYqJgUvRLK6MaOqyN%2FSS%2FgPdRbKQouedyRiqOrCHnNQo1MoXEhIZRBljozBbOASq2jjs3ZkukiXnZkG6znOiwcrXd1A7bM7q4aEaFnBvcvz6HaHZ5TufibmT0H96tiJ6irSv8byfSGSf6%2FFilq%2FSCfY%2BvZqVMX5NjXJi83WibaQy7r9PSOhQxKHsNMw)
---
| |
---
Hi Peter,

I hope you have a wonderful Mother’s Day with your family and loved ones! I wouldn’t be the person I am today without my mother Suzanne, or Julia - my wife and the mother of our wonderful children. We count on mothers to provide kindness, empathy, and support, even during challenging or stressful times. They sacrifice so much for us, and we hold immeasurable gratitude for all the encouragement and love they’ve shown us.

As a public servant, I feel that we have a distinct responsibility to work towards a society that supports our mothers and treats women as equal partners. We need strong schools, affordable childcare, and access to healthcare for all. When mothers are supported, we all do better.

I hope you’re able to spend time with your family today, enjoying time with loved ones and creating memories. It’s a beautiful time of year to enjoy Rhode Island’s natural beauty and celebrate our mothers!

All the best,

Seth

_**Then –**_ Donald Trump enthusiastically endorsed Moreno and held a massive rally for him in Ohio – and Moreno threw a lavish fundraiser at Mar-a-Lago to win the support of Trump's MAGA megadonors.
_**Today –**_ We're falling short of our critical daily fundraising goal. We're behind where we need to be to compete with Moreno's millions, just as polls show us neck and neck.
_**What's next –**_ We need a surge of support to close our fundraising gap immediately. That's where you come in. If you join the thousands of grassroots folks who've already given this week, we'll be on track to meet our critical goal and have the resources it takes to fight back and win.

Peter, few moments are more inspiring than the first few weeks of the New Year. It's a time for both reflection and looking forward, a time to weigh the ultimate question: "_How can we do better this year?_ "
And that's exactly why I'm reaching out to you now.
You see, we had a few wins for progress in 2023: States like Ohio and Minnesota moved to definitively defend reproductive rights, in California, lifesaving prescription drugs like insulin were made more affordable, and state leaders across the nation fought to protect and codify transgender rights.
But 2023 came with a series of devastating setbacks to our fight for justice too: More than a dozen states have banned abortions, book bans in schools and libraries in Republican-led states soared, our nation suffered from over 600 mass shootings, the conservative Supreme Court handed down a ruling that further striped away the rights and protections of the LGBTQ+ community, and we experienced the hottest year ever recorded.
**And 2024 is not going to be _any_ easier.

This year, we're facing another defining presidential election and a decisive year for our fight for progress. That's why I'm working tirelessly to ensure that regardless of who wins the White House, the Senate, or the House of Representatives, _your_ life gets better. But to do that, I need to know which fights you want to see prioritized.**

clean_body: Peter, I just checked, and it looks like you still haven't taken my . When I first called on this powerful community to help guide my work for 2024, the initial response was overwhelming. I received responses from hundreds of supporters across the nation, but I never saw yours come through. Peter, I'm committed to fighting for you as best I can this year, but I need to know which fights matter most to you. That’s why I've decided to reopen this survey to give you one more chance to make your voice heard – but the survey will only remain open until 11:59 p.m. tonight. So please, will you take 60 seconds now to respond to my 2024 Priorities Survey? Here’s the best link to access the form: Thank you, Letitia James \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Letitia James Date: Thurs, April 11, 2024 Subject: What are your priorities for 2024? | | | = | | Peter, let's make 2024 the year of progress. Please take my so I can prioritize the fights that matter most! | | Record your response to be one of the 500 people we need to complete the survey before 11:59 p.m. Peter, few moments are more inspiring than the first few weeks of the New Year. It's a time for both reflection and looking forward, a time to weigh the ultimate question: "How can we do better this year? " And that's exactly why I'm reaching out to you now. You see, we had a few wins for progress in 2023: States like Ohio and Minnesota moved to definitively defend reproductive rights, in California, lifesaving prescription drugs like insulin were made more affordable, and state leaders across the nation fought to protect and codify transgender rights. But 2023 came with a series of devastating setbacks to our fight for justice too: More than a dozen states have banned abortions, book bans in schools and libraries in Republican-led states soared, our nation suffered from over 600 mass shootings, the conservative Supreme Court handed down a ruling that further striped away the rights and protections of the LGBTQ+ community, and we experienced the hottest year ever recorded. And 2024 is not going to be any easier. This year, we're facing another defining presidential election and a decisive year for our fight for progress. That's why I'm working tirelessly to ensure that regardless of who wins the White House, the Senate, or the House of Representatives, your life gets better. But to do that, I need to know which fights you want to see prioritized. [That's why I'm counting on you and [500] other Fearless Fighters to share your top priorities of 2024. Your response will help me shape my fight for you this year, so please: Will you take my 2024 Priorities Survey before midnight?]() | | Thank you for your rapid response. Together, we will ensure that 2024 is the year for progress. – Letitia James | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: COURIER
subject: How would you grade the media’s coverage of Trump and 2024?
body:
We want to hear from you – how is the media treating Trump?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84817509/472725336/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTVlMDQ3MGQtODExMC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NINUpYjQZRA7KhE0D-TJWLYcR041u1mGUeBTf-PjriQ=&emci=2d9b7e8f-f30e-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=95e0470d-8110-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
**First** , during the 2016 campaign and throughout the Trump presidency, the media boosted Trump by incessantly covering his hateful, dangerous behavior because it brought a surge in viewers and online clicks.
**Then** , Trump lost in 2020. Fox News and the right-wing media responded by pushing the Big Lie that _directly_ led to the violence we saw at the Capitol on January 6th.
**Now** , Trump is the Republican nominee, and if you’re paying attention, you know he’s promising an autocratic second term that threatens our Constitution. It’s no exaggeration to say what the media does next will have a dramatic impact on the future of our democracy.
**2024 is the news media’s biggest test in the history of our democracy. The bad news is that there’s already evidence that they’re failing. The good is that COURIER’s talented teams of journalists are already working around the clock to pick up their slack.**
[**But we want to hear from you: what grade would you give the media so far in covering the incredible stakes of the 2024 election?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84817512/472725340/-612118516?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTVlMDQ3MGQtODExMC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NINUpYjQZRA7KhE0D-TJWLYcR041u1mGUeBTf-PjriQ=&emci=2d9b7e8f-f30e-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=95e0470d-8110-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=14016711)

clean_body: We want to hear from you – how is the media treating Trump? Peter, First , during the 2016 campaign and throughout the Trump presidency, the media boosted Trump by incessantly covering his hateful, dangerous behavior because it brought a surge in viewers and online clicks. Then , Trump lost in 2020. Fox News and the right-wing media responded by pushing the Big Lie that directly led to the violence we saw at the Capitol on January 6th. Now , Trump is the Republican nominee, and if you’re paying attention, you know he’s promising an autocratic second term that threatens our Constitution. It’s no exaggeration to say what the media does next will have a dramatic impact on the future of our democracy. 2024 is the news media’s biggest test in the history of our democracy. The bad news is that there’s already evidence that they’re failing. The good is that COURIER’s talented teams of journalists are already working around the clock to pick up their slack. Thank you! The COURIER team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

name: Eddie & EJ
subject: How dad met mom:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_051224_mothersday [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_051224_mothersday]
Hi Peter,
My name’s Eddie. I’m Raquel’s husband. In a minute, our son EJ and I want to tell you about how I met Raquel and just how awesome of a mom she is. But first, I need your help. I convinced Raquel to take the day off and told her I’d handle fundraising for today. Can you chip in $10, or whatever you’re able to give, to make sure Raquel has a great Mother’s Day surprise when she checks the numbers on Monday? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_051224_mothersday&amount=10]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_051224_mothersday [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_051224_mothersday]
Believe it or not, I first met Raquel when she knocked on my door while canvassing for her first race in my neighborhood. From that day onward, I have always admired and loved her tenacity, her passion and her devotion to her work. She is so deeply committed to advancing justice, fighting for working families and ensuring immigrant communities like ours are heard. As a working mom, she knows firsthand just how important these issues are for our families and our future.
So EJ and I want to say Happy Mother’s Day to the most amazing mom, Raquel. I’m reminded each day how lucky I am to have her as my partner, and how lucky our son EJ is to have Raquel as his mom. And to all the moms out there, thank you for the tremendous work and sacrifices you make, both big and small, for your children and your families.
Now, about that Mother's Day surprise for Raquel... [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_051224_mothersday]
Much love,
Eddie & EJ
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_051224_mothersday]

For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_051224_mothersday]

# [#]
Peter: It’s the Texas Organizing Project PAC here and we’ve got a request for you that doesn’t involve us asking for money. But more on that in a minute...

Last week, Trump did an interview with Time Magazine and it was UNHINGED. Here’s a brief recap:

• Trump claimed “a lot of people liked” the idea of him ruling as a dictator and the fact that he poses a danger to our Constitution.

• When asked if there would be violence if he lost, he said, “if we don’t win, you know, it depends.”

• He continued to perpetuate the Big Lie about the 2020 election, and said he would consider pardoning “every one” of the violent January 6th rioters.

Peter: If that doesn’t sit right with you, will you respond to our Q2 Trump Opinion Poll to send a message to MAGA extremists that Trump’s TIME is UP in 2024? [https://secure.everyaction.com/m9hbeEYS20SHcXGEYK3f4Q2]

TOP PAC: Q2 Trump Opinion Poll
Question 1: How would you grade Trump’s recent media interviews?

Taking this poll [https://secure.everyaction.com/m9hbeEYS20SHcXGEYK3f4Q2] will only take you two minutes, and it really helps us collect data and show collective strength to the extremists who want to tear our state apart.

Even small actions like this one help TOP PAC in our mission to fight for ALL Texans — regardless of our age, race, gender, or ZIP Code. Thank you, Peter.

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Happy Mother’s Day! 💐
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://support
body:
# [#]
Peter,

Mother’s Day is the perfect day to celebrate the women in our lives who raised us and continue to lift us up each day through their sacrifices, words of encouragement, and unconditional love.

# [#]
Mothers put the demands and choices of their kids before anything else, which is why they deserve representatives in Congress who will put their needs first. Today, and every day, I am focused on being a strong advocate for mothers and delivering meaningful change to improve their lives.

I hope you will join me today in honoring all who act as mothers, whether that be a mother, grandmother, stepmother, aunt, sister, friend, teacher, or mentor.

From my family to yours, I hope you have a loving, restful Mother’s Day spent showing love to the special women in your lives.

– Mike

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Reproductive justice from the U.S. to Palestine:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
This is reproductive genocide. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWBSRXJSRkOXUYwcjgeckUR8Oe-JAmDQsU4AWgPlKcW1bLCWYszvn4RVB9zLmI2aR4LrkXnGIhvqfLDtrD2b8dOba16fakS9thhAojz2bosUYQlmobPSG9lKdHdTnX02UA2SLc-tHEMstux-3aB8lHmB-8GxHw_jN67H391heiCOYg_w89KTuNcHhMasLHVA3d/46a/llaBJzgeSqSdc3VLMeSJJQ/h0/h001.-rWKCLwJyH_zXGEF7J95E9OAXzgybaNbsKUkpCLjR74)
---
Friend, This Mother’s Day, let’s continue the fight for reproductive justice from the United States to Palestine. **In Rafah, where 1.5 million internally displaced Palestinians are sheltering, Gaza’s last maternity hospital is under threat.** Over 150,000 pregnant and birthing people are going without prenatal care and giving birth without medical support, including C-sections without anesthesia. Blocking maternity kits and medical supplies as well as food and water, the Israeli government is starving over 1 million women and girls in Gaza. **Breastfeeding people are unable to supply milk for their babies, and they’re giving birth to babies who are already too small and malnourished.** In one heartbreaking story, Rania spent 10 years and 3 rounds of IVF trying to get pregnant, and finally gave birth to twins—who were both killed in an Israeli airstrike. With U.S. bombs and our tax dollars, Israel’s government has killed over 14,000 children, orphaned over 19,000 children, destroyed crucial health infrastructure like hospitals, and targeted ambulances as well as doctors. **This is reproductive genocide. This is a reproductive justice issue** , and**** any lawmaker who cares about women’s rights and reproductive justice should be demanding a permanent ceasefire and an end to Israel’s brutal blockade. In the United States, we’re also facing a maternal health crisis: the United States maternal mortality rate is rising, and due to systemic racism,**Black women are 3 to 4 times more likely to die from pregnancy-related causes than white women. Black infants are also 2 to 3 times more likely to die than white infants.** This is devastating, and preventable. It’s connected to the dehumanization of Black and brown people. We must urgently implement solutions, including policies within the _Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act_ , and create a more equitable society that values all life. I founded the Congressional Mamas Caucus with Detroit-based Mothering Justice to advocate for mothers of color and working class families who have too often been underserved by our government. **We’re pushing for much-needed policies like affordable childcare and paid family leave, and prioritizing Black maternal health and reproductive justice.** I will continue demanding our government stop sending billions of dollars to weapons contractors and the Israeli military, and instead invest in our communities, including by ensuring affordable healthcare and eliminating medical debt. I will continue the push to eradicate racial disparities in maternal and infant health, and to dismantle systemic racism in all our institutions. [**If you’re able to, can you chip in $5 or more to my re-election campaign today so I can continue to demand a world with freedom for all people—including equal access to abortion care and reproductive care?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqss1bxzmAf0iktCDicTtU6ad02gqcjCPzGXi67kB0q1uLqd0-WkDsIG7S91ylZbr767MrlsSJkt4FDpblINF6qNd0Oas6HvUBaIgqBSPgCt6dNnrCfRH6h9Rg5mR8uVeooutqVCrXaX8sWaXDH2I1E1Toawhzb9kxqzke7J1ZVoAyeWS0oQo3QeT7NymH4yBzcYnCDtN_O4s9u50a5fKoD5pK4D1O6iHO-r9lbGJZamBztTPyVvoyCrDxIEk8xHqUbPSRgGfi96J1fuMNL0RjUZwubZXOKc2OrUgAkSeYFP79lyrYQAbBq3ZOCgWlM2_uSRQeCoAnpOF_pUt9x-tTYxiG04T1nSa0u3T3bjbT4xtQ/46a/llaBJzgeSqSdc3VLMeSJJQ/h1/h001.YDGoCUS19kxoYUaH38X_Eu1FhNO4HCsI6qbTx4eDdJo) May is women’s health month, an important time to recommit to life-affirming policies that help marginalized women thrive. Together, we will keep building a society that recognizes that all people deserve safety, dignity, and bodily autonomy. In solidarity, Rashida | [DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqss1bxzmAf0iktCDicTtU6ad02gqcjCPzGXi67kB0q1uPggsziLLkKHqV-7l3ln7rDQPyuvV1RY-Ro5HGvFA2fjJ-0UHWv3SU8gGFfrcQB6EgO_sOH7hIHwwZgmrANXRoKUvYkNLPEWC2YslZ97xFxL6JwL9bcA-9RFjtvNWMoe1USNgKNI1_dFSrN3rPHDL31K3DAEqZdtACU2eJejQeJ0J90-W-EG4uhsqi8wMpYOwNcGFbnM5GmNLyEZrF_-vnB2MvFIb5r_rRikURAuJvapLH2im4STpGSNEPJKB4ek5poQ2qPBI-Kumz0oZ1H_OcnkW7oj__MAkcUmHDrvFoqtPA0LNrKvo1IBbNUy_N6ATw/46a/llaBJzgeSqSdc3VLMeSJJQ/h2/h001.mustIv4BpBh2Zj5mXEv9MxeleF-MKl-R551g9MV_aw8)

name: Team Kennedy
subject: RFK Jr. Calls Trump Out for a Debate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
This isn’t just any debate; it’s an opportunity to redefine what leadership looks like in America.

|
---
| | | [This isn’t just any debate; it’s an opportunity to redefine what leadership looks like in America.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_challeng_5_12_24_rs_nd1&n=1)

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_challeng_5_12_24_rs_nd1&n=2)
|

Dear Peter,
Exciting news: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has officially challenged President Trump to a debate at the Libertarian Convention, where they will both be keynote speakers.
Trump has repeatedly said he is not afraid to debate. Will he rise to the occasion?
The latest polls are clear: Americans want a substantial discussion about the future. Kennedy isn’t just exceeding expectations against Trump; _he’s consistently breaking the crucial 15% threshold for debate inclusion._
Voters want a leader who tackles real issues head-on, not just one who can stand on the stage repeating well-worn political establishment sound bites.
This isn’t just any debate; it’s an opportunity to redefine what leadership looks like in America. We need your help to prepare RFK Jr. to deliver a powerful, articulate presentation of our platform.
[Can you contribute $25, $50, or $100 today to help RFK Jr. prepare for a debate that could change the course of the election?](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_challeng_5_12_24_rs_nd1&n=3)
| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=25&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_challeng_5_12_24_rs_nd1&n=4)

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=50&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_challeng_5_12_24_rs_nd1&n=5)

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_challeng_5_12_24_rs_nd1&n=6)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_challeng_5_12_24_rs_nd1&n=7)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_challeng_5_12_24_rs_nd1&n=8)
---
Your support is vital. It will help us highlight the urgent need for leadership that not only promises change but also _has the clarity and vigor to make it happen_.
While Trump’s campaign might be calculating their odds, we’re ready to challenge the narrative and showcase a leader truly fit for our times.
Together, we can ensure this debate marks a pivotal moment in our campaign and for our country.
Team Kennedy
