clean_body: This isn’t just any debate; it’s an opportunity to redefine what leadership looks like in America. | | | | | Dear Peter, Exciting news: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has officially challenged President Trump to a debate at the Libertarian Convention, where they will both be keynote speakers. Trump has repeatedly said he is not afraid to debate. Will he rise to the occasion? The latest polls are clear: Americans want a substantial discussion about the future. Kennedy isn’t just exceeding expectations against Trump; he’s consistently breaking the crucial 15% threshold for debate inclusion. Voters want a leader who tackles real issues head-on, not just one who can stand on the stage repeating well-worn political establishment sound bites. This isn’t just any debate; it’s an opportunity to redefine what leadership looks like in America. We need your help to prepare RFK Jr. to deliver a powerful, articulate presentation of our platform. | Your support is vital. It will help us highlight the urgent need for leadership that not only promises change but also has the clarity and vigor to make it happen. While Trump’s campaign might be calculating their odds, we’re ready to challenge the narrative and showcase a leader truly fit for our times. Together, we can ensure this debate marks a pivotal moment in our campaign and for our country. Team Kennedy | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY Would you like help donating? Call: tel:8057289443 and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

name: Stand with Bernie
subject: Bernie awakened a progressive undercurrent in America and sparked a populist movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17254?t=1011?refcode=email-20240512&akid=5954%2E5885482%2Ed11Kh5 ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis — Bernie is
running for re-election to the U.S. Senate! [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17255?t=1052&akid=5954%2E5885482%2Ed11Kh5 ]If you can chip in to
support our work to protect and expand progressive power in 2024, donate
today.

Bernie Sanders has been one of the most important elected leaders in the
progressive movement for decades. When Bernie ran for President in 2016,
he awakened a progressive undercurrent in America and sparked a populist
movement.

He’s not running for himself, he’s running to advocate for all of us and
continue building our movement. Recently, Bernie spoke about the members
of Congress getting targeted by the millions in AIPAC and corporate super
PAC money: “These are some of the best people in Congress, and I’m going
to do my best to protect them and defend them.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17255?t=1053&akid=5954%2E5885482%2Ed11Kh5 ][IMG]

Bernie is running to lift all progressives like Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan Omar,
Jamaal Bowman, Pramila and Susheela Jayapal, and many others. He’s running
to continue fighting against the broken political system that is
prioritizing the ultra-wealthy while leaving working people behind.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17254?t=1048?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240512&akid=5954%2E5885482%2Ed11Kh5 ]Contribute today to stand with Bernie and help protect and expand
progressive power in Congress. 2024 is about taking on AIPAC,
billionaires, and corporate influence to defend progressive champions like
Bernie and build our movement!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17254?t=1035?express_lane=true&amount=12&refcode=email-20240512&akid=5954%2E5885482%2Ed11Kh5 ]CHIP IN $12 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17254?t=1036?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240512&akid=5954%2E5885482%2Ed11Kh5 ]CHIP IN $27
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17254?t=1037?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=email-20240512&akid=5954%2E5885482%2Ed11Kh5 ]CHIP IN $35 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17254?t=1038?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=email-20240512&akid=5954%2E5885482%2Ed11Kh5 ]CHIP IN $50
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17254?t=1039?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=email-20240512&akid=5954%2E5885482%2Ed11Kh5 ]CHIP IN $100 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17254?t=1040?&amount=12&refcode=email-20240512&akid=5954%2E5885482%2Ed11Kh5 ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

“This is the corruption of the American political system,” Bernie
continued, describing the way millionaires and billionaires can influence
elections. This system is why pro-Peace progressives speaking out for a
permanent Ceasefire and the end to U.S. support for Netanyahu’s atrocities
in Gaza are the targets of $100 million worth of attack ads from AIPAC.

When announcing his run, he spoke of the reasons why we need Medicare for
All: to guarantee the right to health care for all, and end the greed of
Big Pharma and health insurance CEOs. He spoke of the movement to end U.S.
complicity with Netanyahu’s atrocities in Gaza. He spoke of the urgent
fight to address climate change. He spoke of the need to counter the
right-wing attacks on abortion rights. He spoke of the fight for tuition
free public colleges. He restated his decades-long fight to tax the rich
to fund Social Security and Medicare.

The list goes on — Bernie is fighting alongside our movement.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17254?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240512&akid=5954%2E5885482%2Ed11Kh5 ]Can you chip in today to support Bernie’s fight for a better future?
Together, we will defend progressives and build a movement to counter
AIPAC, corporate super PACs, corporate Democrats, and right-wing attacks.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=5954%2E5885482%2Ed11Kh5 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=5954%2E5885482%2Ed11Kh5 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=5954%2E5885482%2Ed11Kh5 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=5954%2E5885482%2Ed11Kh5 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=5954%2E5885482%2Ed11Kh5 ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13135?t=1008&akid=5954%2E5885482%2Ed11Kh5 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

subject: I’m proud of my mom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84820665/472731606/396003515?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTQ5ODk0MC04NTEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fOsr9othejKqwgWo4gurVOrycACBcLe2KyWpktyIVz0=&emci=1710e1f9-d20f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=6a498940-8510-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=12898431)
---
| | Hi! It’s Helene, Kirsten’s daughter. Since it’s Mother’s Day, I wanted to brag about my mom a little bit.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84820667/472731608/1131851138?refcode=X_051224_MothersDay_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTQ5ODk0MC04NTEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fOsr9othejKqwgWo4gurVOrycACBcLe2KyWpktyIVz0=)
---
I have the best mom. Not only is she a wonderful, loving parent — but she’s also been fighting to build a better future for me since I was little. As an environmental lawyer, my mom took on big polluters and fossil fuel companies to fight for clean air and water and combat the climate crisis.
When she saw how Republicans' budget cuts were hurting Arizona’s public schools — including _my_ school — she ran for office.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84820669/472731610/1131851138?refcode=X_051224_MothersDay_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTQ5ODk0MC04NTEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fOsr9othejKqwgWo4gurVOrycACBcLe2KyWpktyIVz0=)
---
In the Arizona legislature, she fought for Arizona’s water security, criminal justice reform, and public education. **And now, my mom is running for Congress to make an even bigger impact.** I have fewer reproductive rights in Arizona now than my mom had at my age. I know how angry that makes her (and me), and I know she won’t stop fighting until we reverse the damage that’s been done. **This Mother’s Day, I told my mom to take the day off of fundraising — and that I would reach out to her supporters instead.** [**This race is so competitive that we can’t miss a day. That’s why I have to ask: will you help my mom flip AZ-06 blue and take back the House by chipping in now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84820671/472731612/1131851138?refcode=X_051224_MothersDay_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTQ5ODk0MC04NTEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fOsr9othejKqwgWo4gurVOrycACBcLe2KyWpktyIVz0=)
---

clean_body: | | | | | Hi! It’s Helene, Kirsten’s daughter. Since it’s Mother’s Day, I wanted to brag about my mom a little bit. = I have the best mom. Not only is she a wonderful, loving parent — but she’s also been fighting to build a better future for me since I was little. As an environmental lawyer, my mom took on big polluters and fossil fuel companies to fight for clean air and water and combat the climate crisis. When she saw how Republicans' budget cuts were hurting Arizona’s public schools — including my school — she ran for office. = In the Arizona legislature, she fought for Arizona’s water security, criminal justice reform, and public education. And now, my mom is running for Congress to make an even bigger impact. I have fewer reproductive rights in Arizona now than my mom had at my age. I know how angry that makes her (and me), and I know she won’t stop fighting until we reverse the damage that’s been done. This Mother’s Day, I told my mom to take the day off of fundraising — and that I would reach out to her supporters instead. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = | | Thank you so much! Folks, it’s official. I will be going up against Ryan Mackenzie this November.
Now that we officially have our opponent, this race is going to start heating up. I know because we’ve been here before.
National Republicans will start funneling millions of dollars in dark money into my district to launch nasty attack ads lying about my record in Congress and flying in top Republicans to support my opponent.
**There’s so much at stake in this election, team. My opponent is too extreme for PA-07.** He even wrote a letter trying to stop the certification of the 2020 election in Pennsylvania. Not to mention, he is an anti-abortion extremist who has boasted a 100% anti-choice voting record.
With abortion rights, gun violence prevention, voting rights, and _democracy itself_ on the line this year, we can’t afford to let Mackenzie anywhere near Congress.
**This TOSS-UP race is set to be one of the most competitive House races in the country, and with the GOP House majority hanging by a thread, we *must* protect PA-07 this November.**

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84820745/472731704/-1414337131?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDc0NzNlNTQtODUxMC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Tyzv_w2bASuVwGOzi_F1hepJzkK_cTmR_n63Axq5uSo=)
Happy Mother’s Day, team.

I hope you take time today to celebrate the mother or the person in your life who has shaped who you are today. **I want to take a moment to honor my own mother and her sacrifices that led me to where I am today – running for Congress in AZ-01 as the only mother in the race.**

I’m a proud first-generation American. My mom and dad fled communist Cuba in the 1960s for America to give our family a better life.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84820761/472731705/-1414337131?refcode=em-5.12.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDc0NzNlNTQtODUxMC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Tyzv_w2bASuVwGOzi_F1hepJzkK_cTmR_n63Axq5uSo=) _My mom, my daughter Ava, my aunt, and me._ This was anything but easy. My mother worked in a factory sewing buttons and zippers. She was thrilled to get a better, higher-paying job at another factory.

**After two months, she was promptly fired because her employer discovered that she was pregnant with me.** This anecdote is only one of the many stories that inspire me – because although it may seem like history, we are still fighting for some of these same rights today.

So this Mother’s Day, I’m thankful for my mother, my aunt, and my grandmother. And as a mom myself, I am doing all I can to make sure my children and future generations live in a country where everyone has the freedom and opportunity to live their best lives.

Thank you, and enjoy the day!

Marlene | ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84820762/472731706/-1414337131?refcode=em-5.12.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDc0NzNlNTQtODUxMC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Tyzv_w2bASuVwGOzi_F1hepJzkK_cTmR_n63Axq5uSo=)****

name: Jon Tester
subject: Mitch McConnell is watching like a hawk
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21387%2E4449941%2E0jLw2i)
---
Hey there, it’s Jon Tester. [**I need you to split a donation between my campaign and Fight for Reform before our most important FEC deadline yet so we can report strong numbers and they can elect state and local Democrats.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/43242?t=7&akid=21387%2E4449941%2E0jLw2i) We’re approaching a critical turning point in this race. Let me explain. Our final FEC deadline before the primary is on May 15th. That’s only 3 days away, and it’s the last time our numbers will go public before Montana’s general election officially kicks off.

Here’s why that matters: Mitch McConnell will be looking at our report when he decides where to spend his multi-million dollar war chest. If he thinks we’re weak, you can bet he’ll flood the airwaves with even more attacks during the most pivotal moment of our campaign so far.

But if our numbers are strong, we’ll show them that this Senate seat can’t be bought and that we’ve got a grassroots team that’ll fight them every step of the way.

**With polls tightening, we cannot afford to fall short here. That’s why I’m asking you to dig deep and help us hit our ambitious $500,000 fundraising goal.** [**Will you split a donation between my campaign and Fight for Reform to help us reach our most important FEC goal yet and report the strongest numbers possible? I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t necessary.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/43242?t=8&akid=21387%2E4449941%2E0jLw2i) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Jon Tester will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/43243?t=9&akid=21387%2E4449941%2E0jLw2i)

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/43242?t=13&akid=21387%2E4449941%2E0jLw2i)
Thanks,

Jon Tester

My family lost our mom to cancer in 2016, which led me to dedicate my thanks on today's holiday to the mothers among my friends, siblings, and in-laws.
Expanding my celebration of today's holiday beyond my own mother reminded me of the roots of Mother's Day. They emerge not only in celebrations of mothers within and across families, but also a set of convictions that once united mothers in the face of a shared threat to their children.
Beyond an opportunity to celebrate the people whose care and devotion made each of our lives possible, Mother's Day is also an opportunity to remember that life is the opposite of destruction, and that the militarism dedicated to destruction ultimately offends all of us.
### **Mother 's Day's forgotten roots**
Mother's Day was [first recognized as an official holiday](https://substack.com/redirect/26211bef-edfd-4060-8e8e-62f7361ef56e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in 1914, through a proclamation by then President Woodrow Wilson. Its origins, however, stem from [a previous proclamation in 1870](https://substack.com/redirect/12fa0117-8f0c-4c7a-87e9-a4634dc71b34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by social justice advocate and abolitionist Julia Ward Howe.
_Thank you for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform your friends by sharing this post._
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=144560548&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ0NTYwNTQ4LCJpYXQiOjE3MTU1MzU3MDgsImV4cCI6MTcxODEyNzcwOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.9Yn48Klaq6BORLXZJ4DYTk12_0QPy7x39sFTAz1FfZ4)
Howe worked as a nurse during the Civil War, and witnessed its carnage first hand. Recognizing that war not only maimed and killed soldiers, but also wounded military (and other) families, she remarkably worked with widows and orphans in both the North and South. Her proclamation reflects her recognition of the shared humanity offended by war.
She wrote:
> "Arise, then... women of this day!
> Arise, all women who have hearts,
> whether our baptism be that of water or of tears!
> Say firmly:
> We will not have great questions decided by irrelevant agencies.
> Our husbands shall not come to us, reeking with carnage,
> for caresses and applause.
> Our sons shall not be taken from us to unlearn
> all that we have been able to teach them of charity, mercy and patience.
> We, women of one country, will be too tender of those of another country
> to allow our sons to be trained to injure theirs.
> From the bosom of the devastated earth a voice goes up with our own.
> It says: Disarm, Disarm!
> The sword of murder is not the balance of justice.
> Blood does not wipe out dishonor,
> nor violence vindicate possession.
> As men have often forsaken the plough and the anvil
> at the summons of war,
> let women now leave all that may be left of home
> for a great and earnest day of council.
> Let them meet first, as women, to bewail and commemorate the dead.
> Let them then solemnly take council with each other as to the means
> whereby the great human family can live in peace,
> each bearing after his own kind the sacred impress, not of Caesar,
> but of God.
> In the name of womanhood and of humanity, I earnestly ask
> that a general congress of women, without limit of nationality,
> may be appointed and held at some place deemed most convenient,
> and at the earliest period consistent with its objects,
> to promote the alliance of the different nationalities,
> the amicable settlement of international questions,
> the great and general interests of peace."
> ~ Julia Ward Howe, 1870
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4af56e3b-5585-4e01-93f3-78dbe75c4c5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: The Peace Alliance, available at https://peacealliance.org/history-of-mothers-day-as-a-day-of-peace-julia-ward-howe/
### **The prescience of Howe 's plea for peace**
The First World War erupted about 50 years after Howe issued her historic proclamation, and just three years after President Wilson announced the national holiday inspired by it. That war was remarkable for many reasons.
WWI was the first time in history when the sophisticated machinery of the Industrial Revolution was turned to maiming & killing. Largely because tools like tanks and machine guns reduced experienced soldiers to literal cannon fodder, the First World War was [fought largely by children](https://substack.com/redirect/83b3f167-4fea-414a-bdc7-b054b5b45740?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The British Army alone recruited and deployed nearly a quarter million child soldiers.
A powerful song, "[Children's Crusade](https://substack.com/redirect/e7c55e14-6284-4d10-bbb9-aa0308058edb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)," recalls this sad and disturbing history. [Sting's lyrics](https://substack.com/redirect/579d02ff-cffb-4c5a-ae4f-12fafb9e1c7e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) include:
> Young men, soldiers, nineteen fourteen
> Marching through countries they'd never seen
> Virgins with rifles, a game of charades
> All for a children's crusade
> Pawns in the game are not victims of chance
> Strewn on the fields of Belgium and France
> Poppies for young men, death's bitter trade
> All of those young lives betrayed
Mothers at the time had many reasons to speak out--not only about the particular conflict that ended or ruined the lives of millions of their children, but also the concept of militarism itself that [enabled](https://substack.com/redirect/4b885334-463d-4a1c-b2b9-e11b5f4d96b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the war in the first place.

### **Forgotten legacies**
The legacy of World War I included the Second World War, which was made effectively inevitable by the [punitive sanctions](https://substack.com/redirect/e7bfeb3a-8bb2-44b7-91dc-7ad98214a9c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on Germany imposed by the victorious Allied powers at the end of WWI.
Meanwhile, the legacy of the Second World War was (at least supposed to be) the [creation of international law, and international institutions](https://substack.com/redirect/055fef05-a67b-446d-b5da-2b7d67c7355e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to enforce it. If the First World War represented the first time mechanized tools were used to destroy human life en masse, the Second World War represented the first time that nation states agreed to rules that would bind them all in the service of protecting the rights of their individual citizens.
I've written before about how America's idiotic resignation of executive accountability--under President Obama--effectively [lost the Second World War](https://substack.com/redirect/2c192565-50a7-4c95-b1b1-c9fc3825a0a5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), 60 years after our nation militarily triumphed over the axis powers. Not only were the Nazis [funded and equipped by American businesses](https://substack.com/redirect/e45679a8-8574-4bae-9d33-1f21ab26c286?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), but America ultimately came to embrace some methods pioneered by Nazi germany--from the [industrial slave labor strategy](https://substack.com/redirect/910126a0-d2fb-4e51-aa76-e66eab164981?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) visible in contemporary mass incarceration, to the dedication of government-funded research and development to [building ever more sophisticated weapons](https://substack.com/redirect/c1bd9540-1165-4bb7-87f5-5cdef526be95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Beyond an opportunity to celebrate the people whose care and devotion made each of our lives possible, Mother's Day is also an opportunity to remember that life is the opposite of destruction, and that the militarism dedicated to destruction ultimately offends all of us.
If nothing else, Mother's Day must entail a rejection of genocide, unless one is willing to reduce it to a Hallmark holiday. Given America's crass and consistent commercialization of holidays from [Valentine's](https://substack.com/redirect/ce4856ee-221b-4e51-95e5-fcdc18fb018a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Day to [Juneteenth](https://substack.com/redirect/910126a0-d2fb-4e51-aa76-e66eab164981?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), however, such amnesia is ultimately on brand.
Paid subscribers can access a poem I wrote for my mother in the weeks before she was taken from us. I share it sometimes with friends grieving their own parents, and have heard from many of them that it has offered them some solace...

name: Hilary Franz
subject: The safety and well-being of our children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz
body:
Happy Mother’s Day!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84822655/472735917/2121138121?refcode=BLU_TXT-S_HFFC_2024-05-12_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWZkNjlkNzAtODkxMC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jpF1VS9JOSrVeze7aCqTub10OnkA1Z8hEJdA8AiaORc=&emci=7a8f15ba-8510-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=efd69d70-8910-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=11003312)
---
| Peter,

Being raised by my father, I was fortunate to have a grandmother who had a very big role in my life. She taught me care and compassion, to value everyone and every day, and to find the gift in every moment and celebrate it. She helped me become the person, leader, and mother I am.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84822657/472735918/2121138121?refcode=BLU_TXT-S_HFFC_2024-05-12_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWZkNjlkNzAtODkxMC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jpF1VS9JOSrVeze7aCqTub10OnkA1Z8hEJdA8AiaORc=&emci=7a8f15ba-8510-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=efd69d70-8910-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=11003312)
It has been the greatest gift of my life to be a mother to my three sons. They taught me the true meaning of patience, humility, and empathy. They are a constant reminder that the work I do extends far beyond me or my lifetime. Every day, they give me my WHY: **Why we must do everything we can as fast as we can to address climate change; to bring everyone inside with a safe place to sleep; to ensure safe schools, fully fund education, and invest in childcare and early childhood education; and do more to support families everywhere.**

To the moms, grandmas, mother figures, and everyone else who courageously plays that role in someone's life – **Happy Mother’s Day!** Remember that motherhood is not an exercise in perfection. Motherhood is an exercise in true love – you for your child, your child for you. Let go of who you think you should be and embrace who you are: You are doing your best, you are making a difference, you are changing lives and changing the world.

And if this holiday is difficult for you, may the day land gently.

Onward,

Hilary

* * *
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84822660/472735920/2121138121?refcode=BLU_TXT-S_HFFC_2024-05-12_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWZkNjlkNzAtODkxMC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jpF1VS9JOSrVeze7aCqTub10OnkA1Z8hEJdA8AiaORc=&emci=7a8f15ba-8510-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=efd69d70-8910-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=11003312)

name: Kurt Kroemer
subject: Me and my opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kroemer for Congress
body:
Peter,
Mr. Rogers would always say that when a crisis strikes, “Look for the people who are trying to help”. Throughout my life, I’ve been on the scene of some of our country's most horrific tragedies. Seeing Americans come together in unity during these moments represents the best in us. What I see in Congress often represents the worst.
More than ever before, Arizona needs a helper in Congress. Our nation has real issues - ensuring a woman’s right to choose, reducing gun violence, and access to affordable healthcare. David Schweikert and his Republican colleagues are a direct threat to not only these issues, but our Democracy as a whole.
That’s why I’m excited to share my first campaign ad with you which highlights some of my stories and commitment to fighting every single day for Arizonans. Take a first look at the ad below: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kroemer_thehelpers]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kroemer_thehelpers [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kroemer_thehelpers]
It’s time we elect more helpers and fewer career politicians but I can’t do it alone. I need your support now more than ever, so we can continue to spread our message and fight against the extremism that is plaguing our country. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kroemer_thehelpers]
In the fight,
Kurt

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Peter, I hope you cherish moments like today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
As a daughter and as a mother... [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84822742/472736118/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWQ2OWQ3MC04OTEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xEBKlDjq8ESCHCHfv37bPEnfiP7IfpF3XiF9RZZZZvU=&emci=13dc49be-090f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=ead69d70-8910-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter, Happy Mother's Day!

Today, we honor and celebrate the women who have cared for us and raised us to be who we are today. Thank you for your love, hard work, and devotion.

I want to thank my own mom, Joan, for making my childhood a wonderful one, providing but not indulging, and giving me so many opportunities to try new things. My family has always believed in me and been such a wonderful foundation of support.

There’s nothing that makes you appreciate your own mother more than becoming one yourself! It is a joy and a privilege to see our son grow up, and I am incredibly grateful to David for being such a fantastic partner in parenting.

So, this Mother's Day, let's show our love a little more than usual by spending time with those we cherish. I hope you and your family enjoy this day.

Happy Mother's Day,

Best wishes,

Kim
Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. clean_body: As a daughter and as a mother... Peter, Happy Mother's Day! Today, we honor and celebrate the women who have cared for us and raised us to be who we are today. Thank you for your love, hard work, and devotion. I want to thank my own mom, Joan, for making my childhood a wonderful one, providing but not indulging, and giving me so many opportunities to try new things. My family has always believed in me and been such a wonderful foundation of support. There’s nothing that makes you appreciate your own mother more than becoming one yourself! It is a joy and a privilege to see our son grow up, and I am incredibly grateful to David for being such a fantastic partner in parenting. So, this Mother's Day, let's show our love a little more than usual by spending time with those we cherish. I hope you and your family enjoy this day. Happy Mother's Day, Best wishes, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat this November and take back the House. | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. body:
They are our first teachers, our fiercest advocates, and our greatest sources of inspiration.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84822853/472736359/-1382951898?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2024-05-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWQ2OWQ3MC04OTEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qeQVlkEaGK8rF10RQFXW-zpkIHAsB5YNRU_98OzTUBA=)
---
| Peter,

On this Mother’s Day, I am sending my love and gratitude to mothers, grandmothers, and mother figures.

Growing up one of seven children, I saw my mother’s tireless work to provide for us and set us up for a bright future. An elementary school teacher who furthered her education by attending school at night, she made sure all seven of us graduated from college. Thanks to her sacrifice, I learned the importance of dedication, hard work, and community–values I still uphold today.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84822854/472736361/-1382951898?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2024-05-12_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWQ2OWQ3MC04OTEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qeQVlkEaGK8rF10RQFXW-zpkIHAsB5YNRU_98OzTUBA=)
They are our first teachers, our fiercest advocates, and our greatest sources of inspiration. Their contributions to our families and our community are invaluable, and their strength and resilience deserve to be celebrated.

Let’s also recognize the ongoing challenges many mothers face and recommit ourselves to supporting policies that promote maternal health, paid family leave, childcare access, and equal opportunities for all mothers and caregivers.

Happy Mother’s Day** ❤️**

Linda

name: John Padora
subject: A day to celebrate mothers and motherhood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
Hey everyone, Happy Mother’s Day!! Growing up, my mom was my rock. She always believed in me and told me I could be anything and everything I set my mind to. She fostered a sense of confidence that I needed to get where I am today.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=1b26b83c19a74952b18972ced17121cd&_e=ttAg2nrHSRKwEGX6Z-hVT3HjIIBnFnuWtI7LOInd-dq0HfbWFLCXCkGfJNw8X_YQ70zU9HLgZzwnrPrGHVPEWhBTBuOd6fx-xs0lEr0gl-LFTIKG_7KFCoP7WP1OT8Xt9rOxqvScquIfNAWUtXoeBm53YQl-h6Fiii1-oiEtExYhAYP0SD6u4jFp27Ay-lNtbfJEyJZ1cCQ3KDDi85cDKKcrWCaiqyKVWskfzSsscqAQxMFWME3l8BKZb0DpxIKClJzdmIuQ9pQDI5jtvToWmdGGZxLSPoQItWWnfMtcga-32z8DDIx_s9s_gy8JEHtC8UyGPtuBEstohXCjcoZTMhx4CLKSQ8rE2hrNbI3u4HrEgQ3O_V5ZsoD6DIR4lnn2I7RXKS7ioCW0nMbTFoxZvA%3D%3D) Hey everyone, Happy Mother’s Day!! Growing up, my Mom was my rock. She always believed in me and told me I could be anything and everything I set my mind to. She fostered a sense of confidence that I needed to get where I am today. [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=1b26b83c19a74952b18972ced17121cd&_e=ttAg2nrHSRKwEGX6Z-hVT3HjIIBnFnuWtI7LOInd-dq0HfbWFLCXCkGfJNw8X_YQ70zU9HLgZzwnrPrGHVPEWhBTBuOd6fx-xs0lEr0gl-LFTIKG_7KFCoP7WP1OT8Xt9rOxqvScquIfNAWUtXoeBm53YQl-h6Fiii1-oiEtExYhAYP0SD6u4jFp27Ay-lNtbfJEyJZ1cCQ3KDDi85cDKKcrWCaiqyKVWskfzSsscqAQxMFWME3l8BKZb0DpxIKCbMAG9NDIJV-pwhw6nOYJPDSpGIOA4jJPOmuKDXeRvSo9o0WuhCqKcqVrSjW0cNJ3o2qwV2ReMbiWtVSUn5iVDidDE9qmsZODoOr5cYrLPxP3yi0cPsWKphSFqSi46K6BQRf3iD8uxeRPxcTdniIgWg%3D%3D) My Mom helped me get back on my feet after getting caught in the throes of addiction. She was a nurse, so she knew I needed her support to get through it. Today is a day to honor and celebrate all the mothers out there who have done so much for all of us. My wife, Amber, is an incredible mother and still surprises me every day. [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=1b26b83c19a74952b18972ced17121cd&_e=ttAg2nrHSRKwEGX6Z-hVT3HjIIBnFnuWtI7LOInd-dq0HfbWFLCXCkGfJNw8X_YQ70zU9HLgZzwnrPrGHVPEWhBTBuOd6fx-xs0lEr0gl-LFTIKG_7KFCoP7WP1OT8Xt9rOxqvScquIfNAWUtXoeBm53YQl-h6Fiii1-oiEtExYhAYP0SD6u4jFp27Ay-lNtbfJEyJZ1cCQ3KDDi85cDKKcrWCaiqyKVWskfzSsscqAQxMFWME3l8BKZb0DpxIKCejppE3wNoV26tjEMVq8s1HVaWZ3k551dTIwbq7duQK5KO8VxTPGEnZoTTwZe4OC6lvVd1VReXSI9hUdIgakQSs48rBHKiWVx4NSt7CsqF-6ObR59Ux5c7TO0Dg6_yqTpLYVI5KQF1ldvy1Qk1OvqRQ%3D%3D) We have the most beautiful family I could have hoped for, and I’m lucky to have been raised by a strong, compassionate woman. Today should also be a day where we reflect on what mothers go through for their children, and how we as a country and a state can better support them. We have the policy tools to improve mother’s lives. Paid family leave, affordable, accessible childcare, **and the right to choose WHEN you become a mother are positions that I wholeheartedly support and will fight for in Congress.** This Mother’s Day, I’m recommitting myself to those efforts, and to taking better care of our mothers in the Fourth District, in Colorado, and across the country. Thank you and Happy Mother’s Day. – Padora HQ I'm John Padora, a Democrat running for Congress in CD-04. Lauren Boebert recently jumped into my district in a desperate attempt to stay in DC. My campaign is powered by grassroots donations - donate anything you can monthly to keep Boebert OUT of this seat. [WEBSITE](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=1b26b83c19a74952b18972ced17121cd&_e=ttAg2nrHSRKwEGX6Z-hVT9cJw3TLmJaTG_CdwjVzhvWP973IR_uOSgFU--QDRiGid-4H-aXHT4T-zPf7rxXGOUr73IxQ7bDqgje-7BKfE6e-TDvamDUnDCh_I1XXHg4IdZ-ccgTOQSq7lq56jlqWliy1xTXmcyLEfjwVukvi15f4PyCdw_ZF7fQvymqLm3iOTUK4f20t894rI8IlIL_87Q%3D%3D) [DONATE MONTHLY](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=1b26b83c19a74952b18972ced17121cd&_e=ttAg2nrHSRKwEGX6Z-hVT3HjIIBnFnuWtI7LOInd-dq0HfbWFLCXCkGfJNw8X_YQ70zU9HLgZzwnrPrGHVPEWhBTBuOd6fx-xs0lEr0gl-LFTIKG_7KFCoP7WP1OT8Xt9rOxqvScquIfNAWUtXoeBm53YQl-h6Fiii1-oiEtExYhAYP0SD6u4jFp27Ay-lNtbfJEyJZ1cCQ3KDDi85cDKKcrWCaiqyKVWskfzSsscqDZURCpSk96q-MrwxmPg2IE_QcpfdtbFo7vZcZxmGZwzCQuA_V5FC3L0J7dtKfHxDRFs7iNWbqKvMc3RPNE84DzFt33zwwg_HDa6iSaRpK2j7Jgiag08hUtTqtxTvCkPYqTAS2K5_Dmip2zt4F_uQFzTOTo8Bru2sCmpOax03eC110xGL3-eFp013JbD1lbhU2GyF8e6LwSX4Q1WvyJB4ueENu9y4wYIX-Vxnze9b90Tg%3D%3D) Paid for by Padora for Colorado

name: Sen. Ted Cruz
subject: What it will take

Peter,

Now more than ever, we need to rally behind candidates who will help flip the Senate back to a Republican majority.

The Senate race in Ohio is arguably our best chance to do that.

[**That’s why I am proud to endorse him and join the effort to win this race.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=800064f0b15b48e4b894a4b55e06c5bf&_e=-HYA6IjXYUv_dP2tZjB0bcbeCPHxD6t_esrT4nc59F63o5yZIs_KiEafO6V2yyCUInzBYs3VkqTASbKmcEVE6q4-cTy3dGvjS5cJjVqt1qJOxPOgWQCcWKKwRqD2xmnH6B1z9eYMuhCEQazjiklH364nZOZbD1Yzk_9ciavkycsgaYi5uxLO5UHSVELBSajTIeCQAjn9_k_n5z3gXlTB-6e1EvQK5wcj4doKXUP7BFoZp82fJkMYO43eCDTaRmfgppVfxOXsZmveppzWlpWid61mCfrZ9j3N_ZsfqWenRWWINNJxmrYVP98bgfsSn1aRhs-2dqWtcCQxazkVKsyhnAKLVHIhcZ3MgAPy1FbQOwFDfg7JuOsbQLbmrxhbDd5FyjEJa3_dtZqKnCMvucQtQA%3D%3D)

Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84823613/472738884/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzYyODE5MS04YTEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YVp1puFnsFeqHGLPW2_J4Ms-tQ1chi-RkWDF3f_0Bz8=&emci=683040c0-080f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=8c628191-8a10-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=7878003)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84823615/472738886/2019301513?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzYyODE5MS04YTEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YVp1puFnsFeqHGLPW2_J4Ms-tQ1chi-RkWDF3f_0Bz8=&emci=683040c0-080f-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=8c628191-8a10-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=7878003) Hi, folks, Congressman Swalwell here. I’m reaching out to ask for your support in **electing David Trone to the U.S. Senate** , a proven leader who’s ready to serve Maryland and the nation. During his tenure in Congress, David has been a dynamic force for protecting our reproductive rights, lowering costs for families – including the cost of prescription drugs – and reaching across the aisle as needed to get stuff done. If you haven’t heard – **Mitch McConnell personally recruited Larry Hogan** to run for Maryland’s open Senate seat because he knows he can count on Hogan to support a national abortion ban, slash Social Security benefits and give Republicans the votes they need to enact their extreme agenda. clean_body: | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. Hi, folks, Congressman Swalwell here. I’m reaching out to ask for your support in electing David Trone to the U.S. Senate , a proven leader who’s ready to serve Maryland and the nation. During his tenure in Congress, David has been a dynamic force for protecting our reproductive rights, lowering costs for families – including the cost of prescription drugs – and reaching across the aisle as needed to get stuff done. If you haven’t heard – Mitch McConnell personally recruited Larry Hogan to run for Maryland’s open Senate seat because he knows he can count on Hogan to support a national abortion ban, slash Social Security benefits and give Republicans the votes they need to enact their extreme agenda. From workers’ rights to abortion rights, it’s all on the line this November – David is the fighter we need in the Senate. | Thanks, Congressman Eric Swalwell | | | = = Text ERIC to 43033 to get text updates! This new poll shows that we’ve got a narrow 1-point lead in Tuesday’s Democratic primary and can beat Republican Larry Hogan in November.
**But Peter, this is still _anyone’s_ race.**
If we want to hold and expand our lead between now and when the polls close on Tuesday night, we have to stick to what we’re doing to win this race.
**_That means even more outreach._** We need to make more calls, knock on more doors, recruit and train more volunteers, host more events... anything and everything.
**_It means more ad spending._** This poll is proof that our most recent ad blitz is working, but keeping our ads on the air will be very expensive.
**_It means that we need even more from you, Peter._** Your support is what got us here, and it will be what propels us to victory in the Democratic primary.
**[We need to capitalize on this moment and amplify our message more than ever, which is why I’m emailing you with an urgent request: Will you please chip in $25 TODAY so we can seize this golden opportunity, boost our message, and win big on Tuesday?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/24109?t=12&amount=25&akid=1623%2E52803%2EgLeq0m)**

| | Happy Mother’s Day — it’s Michelle Vallejo. My mother, Maribel, is a huge inspiration for me. She’s the main reason I am the woman I am today, and the reason why I’m in this race. She passed away in 2010 after fighting Multiple Sclerosis for 15 years. This was a hard loss for me, as she was my biggest advocate and cheerleader. I still wear her jewelry to have her presence and strength with me on the campaign trail. I remember having to travel across the border to Mexico with her to receive affordable healthcare, because of the lack of options here in South Texas. Unfortunately, this is still a reality for many South Texans — especially now with abortion _banned_ in our state. The hardships my mother and my community have gone through are not right. We deserve to live in a district where our representative fights for our basic healthcare, reproductive freedom, and social security benefits. I’m running to honor my mother’s legacy by fighting for a better future for working families like my own. I hope you can join me in the fight. clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Happy Mother’s Day — it’s Michelle Vallejo. My mother, Maribel, is a huge inspiration for me. She’s the main reason I am the woman I am today, and the reason why I’m in this race. She passed away in 2010 after fighting Multiple Sclerosis for 15 years. This was a hard loss for me, as she was my biggest advocate and cheerleader. I still wear her jewelry to have her presence and strength with me on the campaign trail. I remember having to travel across the border to Mexico with her to receive affordable healthcare, because of the lack of options here in South Texas. Unfortunately, this is still a reality for many South Texans — especially now with abortion banned in our state. The hardships my mother and my community have gone through are not right. We deserve to live in a district where our representative fights for our basic healthcare, reproductive freedom, and social security benefits. I’m running to honor my mother’s legacy by fighting for a better future for working families like my own. I hope you can join me in the fight. Michelle Vallejo | = | | | ---|---|--- = My name is Michelle Vallejo, and I'm running to represent TX-15 — the most competitive congressional seat in the state**. The stakes have never been higher! I hope that you'll join me in our movement to take back the district. | = = Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, . You can also =.

name: Wes Moore
subject: Happy Mother’s Day!
body:
Today, I celebrate my mom, my wife Dawn, and all the mothers across the country.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84824608/472743228/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzljMThhNC04ZDEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MdQl8XVWLWGrOCprhpfOoY7cx_PQpObibhfW2AECtbY=&emci=91560b47-8710-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=9c9c18a4-8d10-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=24635485)
Friend, from my family to yours, Happy Mother’s Day! To my mom, Joy: you have gone through trials that were unimaginable and unfair. But you taught us to be unafraid. My mom is the reason I am who I am. As a single mother, she raised my sisters and me after my dad passed away. She is strength, selflessness, and grace. She will always be one of the greatest blessings in my life. I love you, Mom. To Dawn, you are the heartbeat of our family. I couldn’t ask for a better partner in life. I’m grateful every day to be on this journey with you. You are my remarkable wife, the First Lady of the state of Maryland, and mother to our children. Also the best dog mom! I also want to celebrate Aruna, our Lt. Governor, and loving mom of three. I am grateful for your partnership as we work to make Maryland a better state for all mothers and their families. **[Will you join me in celebrating my mom, Joy, my wife, Dawn, and Lt. Gov Aruna by signing our Happy Mother’s Day virtual card today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84824614/472743230/-897662825?source=em20240512-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzljMThhNC04ZDEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MdQl8XVWLWGrOCprhpfOoY7cx_PQpObibhfW2AECtbY=&emci=91560b47-8710-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=9c9c18a4-8d10-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=24635485)** | **[Sign the card »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84824616/472743238/-897662825?source=em20240512-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzljMThhNC04ZDEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MdQl8XVWLWGrOCprhpfOoY7cx_PQpObibhfW2AECtbY=&emci=91560b47-8710-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=9c9c18a4-8d10-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=24635485)**
---
Lastly, I want to wish a Happy Mother’s Day to all the moms who wear sweaters so their children can wear coats, who protect and sacrifice, and who get it done daily. You are loved and appreciated. Today and always.
Elevate,
Wes
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Harry Dunn
subject: it could all be over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Listen, this could be the absolute end of our campaign.
A super PAC, who takes money from the same people bankrolling Donald Trump, just placed a new ad buy for my opponent.
We’re placing our next advertising buy at 9:00AM tomorrow, and anything we raise today will go directly toward our Ad Fund.
Will you please chip in to my campaign and Seth Moulton to help us fund our ads and defeat the billionaires attempting to buy this election? We're being outspent by more than 200% and the election is in 2 days >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Here's the facts:
❌ An outside group is spending over $3.2 million on silencing my voice because they know I'll stand up for our democracy.
❌ I've never taken a dime from corporate PACs and I never will. This race is about serving Maryland's 3rd District, not the people who write the biggest checks.
❌ But this puts our campaign in a really tough situation. We'll be drowned out on TV ads if we can't fight back.
Please: our democracy is on the line and if we don't act now, we're at greater risk of letting it be destroyed beyond repair. Will you split a donation between me and Seth Moulton before we place our next ad buy? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
-HD

name: America First War Room
subject: stop eating oatmeal and quinoa
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kE1TgzAQhn_NciuTbEIWDjmoHXpQe_HQ0VsgiU2HCA1Qpv56p1i97sfzPvOaOHTBXzXQIyAegx0BEcQDIJ7fl5jmU3zebQ67l-_NWe1jcdviEyBO18H9n94puYsmdLcpbTOrhbdMZk5z4kUhKpRldtTkWVnaRpC3rhKq9UXlSHje-MJwKVUWNDKUrODIS8kE5UiWZNkSGV8p5QVItubkJroUWsPHaTEp9X3M2z5mnT5O0zCuYjVgvaQ-_5rbzs3j71vbR8D6rgxYXwDrj7lpTq_u_HYBUa8tiO2eqauX--aQJW2HJXRdGBWBZJ9_mJ8AAAD__6_OYKw)

You've been told over and over in the media that foods like oatmeal and quinoa are good for you, and you should eat lots of them. But what most people don't realize is that these two particular foods contain compounds that can actually harm your health and your digestion in many ways...

And as your favorite Nutritionist, I'll explain why in this quick email, so you can avoid further harming your health and digestion with these so-called "healthy" foods...
**
1\. Oatmeal and Oat Milk**

While oatmeal is touted as a healthy carb and a source of fiber, unfortunately there are more cons than pros with this food...

The first problem with oats is that they are loaded with a compound called phytic acid (phytates) that significantly lowers your absorption of certain minerals and vitamins, such as calcium, magnesium, and zinc.

So whenever you eat oats, the phytic acid causes you to absorb less of these vitally important minerals which could cause health problems if you eat oats too frequently, since most people already don't get enough minerals like magnesium and zinc.

The second problem with oats is that they contain one of the highest residue concentrations of the **toxic herbicide glyphosate, which can damage your gut, and have been linked to other health problems like cancer** , hormone issues, and more.

The next major problem with oats is that they are a significant source of **mycotoxins** in the diet, which are mold based toxins that can cause an array of gut problems, hormone problems and more.

Lastly, oats can also contain high levels of the **toxic heavy metal** Cadmium, which is linked to health problems as this toxic heavy metal accumulates in your body.

**2\. Quinoa**

Quinoa is another food that is pitched as a health food or a "superfood". Unfortunately, this is another example of a food that has more downsides than good sides.

First off, quinoa is high in compounds called saponins, that have been shown in some studies to **cause gut damage and contribute to "leaky gut".**

Another problematic compound in quinoa are lectins, which are a type of antinutrient that can **damage the cells of your intestines** , and contribute to several gut disorders and immune system problems.

Many friends and colleagues of mine have reported feeling abdominal pain after eating quinoa, bloating, and loose stools or diarrhea, as well as triggering of autoimmune conditions such as skin conditions.

Now let's take a look at a fun little quiz below and a few more foods...

**Broccoli vs Kale vs Green Beans... (the #1 WORST veggie for your gut & energy)**
According to the best-selling author and world-renowned heart surgeon, Dr. Steven Gundry, there's one veggie people over 40 should never eat.

This veggie can **damage your gut and disrupt your hormones...** It contains a toxin that damages the lining of your intestines, causes bloating, embarrassing gas, and a bulging belly.

Do you know the veggie I'm talking about? Make sure you do by clicking the one below you think it is, and get the answer from Dr. Gundry himself on the next page:

[>> Green Beans

>> Broccoli

>> Kale

clean_body: You've been told over and over in the media that foods like oatmeal and quinoa are good for you, and you should eat lots of them. But what most people don't realize is that these two particular foods contain compounds that can actually harm your health and your digestion in many ways... And as your favorite Nutritionist, I'll explain why in this quick email, so you can avoid further harming your health and digestion with these so-called "healthy" foods... 1\. Oatmeal and Oat Milk While oatmeal is touted as a healthy carb and a source of fiber, unfortunately there are more cons than pros with this food... The first problem with oats is that they are loaded with a compound called phytic acid (phytates) that significantly lowers your absorption of certain minerals and vitamins, such as calcium, magnesium, and zinc. So whenever you eat oats, the phytic acid causes you to absorb less of these vitally important minerals which could cause health problems if you eat oats too frequently, since most people already don't get enough minerals like magnesium and zinc. The second problem with oats is that they contain one of the highest residue concentrations of the toxic herbicide glyphosate, which can damage your gut, and have been linked to other health problems like cancer , hormone issues, and more. The next major problem with oats is that they are a significant source of mycotoxins in the diet, which are mold based toxins that can cause an array of gut problems, hormone problems and more. Lastly, oats can also contain high levels of the toxic heavy metal Cadmium, which is linked to health problems as this toxic heavy metal accumulates in your body. 2\. Quinoa Quinoa is another food that is pitched as a health food or a "superfood". Unfortunately, this is another example of a food that has more downsides than good sides. First off, quinoa is high in compounds called saponins, that have been shown in some studies to cause gut damage and contribute to "leaky gut". Another problematic compound in quinoa are lectins, which are a type of antinutrient that can damage the cells of your intestines , and contribute to several gut disorders and immune system problems. Many friends and colleagues of mine have reported feeling abdominal pain after eating quinoa, bloating, and loose stools or diarrhea, as well as triggering of autoimmune conditions such as skin conditions. Now let's take a look at a fun little quiz below and a few more foods... Broccoli vs Kale vs Green Beans... (the #1 WORST veggie for your gut & energy) According to the best-selling author and world-renowned heart surgeon, Dr. Steven Gundry, there's one veggie people over 40 should never eat. This veggie can damage your gut and disrupt your hormones... It contains a toxin that damages the lining of your intestines, causes bloating, embarrassing gas, and a bulging belly. Do you know the veggie I'm talking about? Make sure you do by clicking the one below you think it is, and get the answer from Dr. Gundry himself on the next page:

body:
Hi there – it’s Chrissy and Ellis Bynum! You may know Janelle Bynum as a State Representative or a proud member of our community. But we get to call her mom! So this Mother’s Day, we wanted to reach out on our mom’s behalf.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84825230/472744762/476240567?refcode=em_fr_2024.05.12_b1_caeb_all-nd&amount=10&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQ2OTRhOTktOGYxMC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=COQebURwg3UlUcjXJCZ-OkKinf1JBQ2z16XBUbRzVMg=) Hi there – it’s Chrissy and Ellis Bynum!

You may know Janelle Bynum as a State Representative or a proud member of our community. But we get to call her mom! So this Mother’s Day, we wanted to reach out on our mom’s behalf. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84825231/472744763/476240567?refcode=em_fr_2024.05.12_b1_caeb_all-nd&amount=10&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQ2OTRhOTktOGYxMC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=COQebURwg3UlUcjXJCZ-OkKinf1JBQ2z16XBUbRzVMg=) Our mom is compassionate, kind, honest, and she’s the hardest worker we know. All of these qualities not only make her the best mom, but they’ll also make her an exceptional Congresswoman for Oregon’s Fifth District. As a small business owner and State Representative, we’ve seen her fight hard for our community all our life. **Take it from us, we can count on her to fight for all of us in Congress.** **[The best Mother’s Day treat for her would be seeing that we all have her back, just like she has ours. Is there any chance you can chip in a few dollars to our mom’s campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84825232/472744764/476240567?refcode=em_fr_2024.05.12_b1_caeb_all-nd&amount=10&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWQ2OTRhOTktOGYxMC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=COQebURwg3UlUcjXJCZ-OkKinf1JBQ2z16XBUbRzVMg=)** Since launching her campaign for Congress last year, our mom has been working around the clock. From reaching out to voters, to attending events in the community, to raising the money it takes to run for office, **she’s doing everything possible to _win_ this election and deliver results for families like yours and ours. ** But, from watching our mom throughout this campaign, it’s clear she can’t do it alone. name: Jill Stein
subject: I’m not celebrating Mother’s Day
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided to the murderers
body:
| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mothers_day&n=1)
---
Peter,

Today is usually set aside for family and gratitude. A celebration of life and those who give life. But how can I celebrate motherhood while Israel’s slaughter in Gaza continues?
****
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=hv8dYCeGJ9MVGszQlAtA3A5sopJvcU_WBnRaWPFx16GvkDlQl5UME9AYc1CWvO9y&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mothers_day&n=2)
---
Much has been said about the death toll in Gaza. We know at least 10,000 Palestinian women have been killed by Israeli forces in the last 7 months. We know at least 6,000 of them were mothers.

But since the occupying forces have systematically destroyed Gaza’s health infrastructure, the deaths are now compounding as women die of treatable injuries and preventable disease.

The latest figures from UNRWA estimate that 37 children lose their mothers _every day_ in Gaza.

And for the mothers who’ve lived? They are physically scarred by injuries and amputations. They are psychologically traumatized by relentless bombing, forced relocation, and incalculable grief. Over 150K pregnant or breastfeeding women in Gaza are struggling to survive without access to clean drinking water or sanitary items.

Many of these mothers have also lost their children, as nearly 14,000 babies and children have been murdered by Israel in the last seven months.

As I write this, American mothers are gathering safely in our homes, surrounded by our families, receiving gifts and flowers and cards.

As I write this, hundreds of thousands of mothers in Gaza huddle in makeshift shelters and tents, forced out of their homes full of precious memories.

They and their families are sick and starving, while Israel deliberately chokes off aid and aims their weapons squarely at them – weapons that our government paid for and provided to the murderers.

In the face of these horrors, I am uplifted by the historical origins of today’s celebrations in the 1870 proclamation of Mother’s Day for Peace by noted abolitionist and feminist Julia Ward Howe.
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=hv8dYCeGJ9MVGszQlAtA3A5sopJvcU_WBnRaWPFx16GvkDlQl5UME9AYc1CWvO9y&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mothers_day&n=3)
---
_Graphic by The Peace Alliance._
---
154 years on, her message still unifies us with the long struggle to abandon the violence of empire and oligarchy; to transition to the global village it takes to justly raise our children – within a beloved human community that puts people, planet and peace over profit.

Today, it is my fervent hope that mothers everywhere will rise up and put an end to this assault on our most core human values that is taking place before our very eyes in Gaza.

I draw strength and inspiration from knowledge that you and millions of others also see this genocide for what it is – and that we refuse to allow this to continue. May this day of motherly love strengthen our commitment and resolve needed more than ever in this hour of genocidal darkness.

In solidarity and gratitude,

Jill

P.S. In lieu of contributions to our campaign today, please donate to UNRWA to support the mothers left in Gaza struggling to survive Israel’s genocide.
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=hv8dYCeGJ9MVGszQlAtA3A5sopJvcU_WBnRaWPFx16GvkDlQl5UME9AYc1CWvO9y&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mothers_day&n=4 "Donate to UNRWA") [Donate to UNRWA](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=hv8dYCeGJ9MVGszQlAtA3A5sopJvcU_WBnRaWPFx16GvkDlQl5UME9AYc1CWvO9y&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mothers_day&n=4)
---

name: Rick Larsen
subject: What Mom really wants for Mother’s Day:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
This policy is not just about supporting mothers; but about supporting all families.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84826447/472749273/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTZkOTgxOC05MzEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YBtNvB4BsZMceh0kSAf3cel9NTbzfkRnH0r-vFyK5eU=&emci=dd606105-f10e-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=7a6d9818-9310-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=9494239)
---

| | As we celebrate Mother's Day, I want to take a moment to reflect on the invaluable role that mothers, parents, and caregivers play in our lives and what we can do to best support them. **One of the first things that comes to mind is paid family leave and similar programs that allow families to be together.** At some point, nearly every person needs to take time away from work for a serious illness or injury, or to care for a child or family member. No one should have to choose between a paycheck and caring for themselves or someone they love. Fortunately, Washington is one of the eleven states that have passed paid family and medical leave legislation. The Bureau of Labor Statistics found that only about 24% of the private sector workforce has access to paid family leave. I am working in Congress to fix that and provide better work-life balance for families:
* **I supported the Family and Medical Insurance Leave Act** , a bill that would establish a national paid family and medical leave insurance program and ensure that workers can take paid family and medical leave when they need it.
* **I am a cosponsor of the Healthy Families Act** which would require employers to provide up to seven days of paid sick leave for workers to care for themselves or a family member.
* **I support the Schedules that Work Act and the Strong Start Act** , the first of which would provide flexible, predictable, and stable work schedules so families can plan time together. The other would give workers access to high-quality, early-learning opportunities and more affordable child care, creating stability at home.

**Paid family leave is not just good for families — it also helps businesses.** Paid family leave yields higher employee retention rates, and reduces turnover costs for businesses. It also promotes gender equality and diversity in the workplace by leveling the playing field for those bearing the brunt of caregiving responsibilities. When everyone has the support needed to balance work and family, they can fully participate in the workforce, driving innovation and productivity. **As we celebrate Mother's Day, we should honor the mothers and caregivers in our lives and advocate for policies like paid family leave that support them and their families.** Together, we can create a more equitable and prosperous society for all. _Rick_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84826448/472749274/1596212816?refcode=2024-05-12-md&recurring=&amount=7&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=7a6d9818-9310-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTZkOTgxOC05MzEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YBtNvB4BsZMceh0kSAf3cel9NTbzfkRnH0r-vFyK5eU=) | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
| [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84826449/472749275/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2024-05-12-md&refcode2=7a6d9818-9310-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTZkOTgxOC05MzEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YBtNvB4BsZMceh0kSAf3cel9NTbzfkRnH0r-vFyK5eU=) | [$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84826450/472749276/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2024-05-12-md&refcode2=7a6d9818-9310-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTZkOTgxOC05MzEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YBtNvB4BsZMceh0kSAf3cel9NTbzfkRnH0r-vFyK5eU=) | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84826451/472749277/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2024-05-12-md&refcode2=7a6d9818-9310-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTZkOTgxOC05MzEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YBtNvB4BsZMceh0kSAf3cel9NTbzfkRnH0r-vFyK5eU=) | [$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84826452/472749278/1596212816?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2024-05-12-md&refcode2=7a6d9818-9310-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTZkOTgxOC05MzEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YBtNvB4BsZMceh0kSAf3cel9NTbzfkRnH0r-vFyK5eU=)

clean_body: This policy is not just about supporting mothers; but about supporting all families. | | | | As we celebrate Mother's Day, I want to take a moment to reflect on the invaluable role that mothers, parents, and caregivers play in our lives and what we can do to best support them. One of the first things that comes to mind is paid family leave and similar programs that allow families to be together. At some point, nearly every person needs to take time away from work for a serious illness or injury, or to care for a child or family member. No one should have to choose between a paycheck and caring for themselves or someone they love. Fortunately, Washington is one of the eleven states that have passed paid family and medical leave legislation. The Bureau of Labor Statistics found that only about 24% of the private sector workforce has access to paid family leave. I am working in Congress to fix that and provide better work-life balance for families: I supported the Family and Medical Insurance Leave Act , a bill that would establish a national paid family and medical leave insurance program and ensure that workers can take paid family and medical leave when they need it. I am a cosponsor of the Healthy Families Act which would require employers to provide up to seven days of paid sick leave for workers to care for themselves or a family member. I support the Schedules that Work Act and the Strong Start Act , the first of which would provide flexible, predictable, and stable work schedules so families can plan time together. The other would give workers access to high-quality, early-learning opportunities and more affordable child care, creating stability at home. Paid family leave is not just good for families — it also helps businesses. Paid family leave yields higher employee retention rates, and reduces turnover costs for businesses. It also promotes gender equality and diversity in the workplace by leveling the playing field for those bearing the brunt of caregiving responsibilities. When everyone has the support needed to balance work and family, they can fully participate in the workforce, driving innovation and productivity. As we celebrate Mother's Day, we should honor the mothers and caregivers in our lives and advocate for policies like paid family leave that support them and their families. Together, we can create a more equitable and prosperous society for all. name: Hill Harper
subject: Celebrating Mother's Day and Honoring Dr. Marilyn Hill Harper
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/421?t=1&akid=1244%2E62735%2ESZA5dw)
Peter,
Last week was truly special for me and my family as we celebrated Mother's Day in a very meaningful way. I had the immense honor of receiving an honorary doctorate alongside my mother, Dr. Marilyn Hill Harper, at her alma mater, Talladega College. It was an unforgettable moment—one that highlighted the profound influence my mother has had on my life.
Dr. Marilyn Hill Harper is not just a mother; she is a trailblazer and my guiding light. Her wisdom, strength, and resilience have shaped me in countless ways. From her groundbreaking book that inspired me to write my own, to her dedication to educating young minds, she has instilled in me the values of hard work, perseverance, and a commitment to making a difference.
As I reflect on her journey—a journey marked by intelligence, courage, and a relentless pursuit of justice—I am reminded of the countless barriers she has overcome, including the insidious forces of sexism and racism. Yet, through it all, she has remained steadfast in her resolve to build a better world for future generations.
**So today, I want to take a moment to express my deepest gratitude to my mother, Dr. Marilyn Hill Harper, for her unwavering love, support, and inspiration. Happy Mother’s Day, Mom! You are truly remarkable, and I am endlessly proud to be your son.**
As we celebrate this special occasion, I am reminded of the importance of family, community, and the values that unite us. It is with this spirit of gratitude and resilience that I continue to pursue my campaign for the U.S. Senate.
But I can't do it alone. As we strive to create a more just and equitable future for all Americans, I need your support more than ever. **[Your contribution—no matter the size—will help us amplify our message, engage with voters, and build a grassroots movement that empowers every voice.](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1503?t=2&akid=1244%2E62735%2ESZA5dw)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Express Donate: $5](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1504?t=3&akid=1244%2E62735%2ESZA5dw)**
**[Express Donate: $10](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1505?t=4&akid=1244%2E62735%2ESZA5dw)**
**[Express Donate: $25](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1506?t=5&akid=1244%2E62735%2ESZA5dw)**
**[Or, donate another amount](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1507?t=6&akid=1244%2E62735%2ESZA5dw)**
Together, we can build a brighter tomorrow—one where every child has the opportunity to thrive, where justice is not just a dream but a reality, and where the values of compassion, integrity, and equality guide our nation forward. As we celebrate Mother's Day and honor the incredible mothers who shape all of our lives, let us stand together in gratitude and determination to create a better future for generations to come.
Thank you for standing with me, and thank you for honoring the incredible women who have shaped our lives in ways beyond measure.
With gratitude and determination,
Hill Harper
Democrat for US Senate
[](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1417?t=7&akid=1244%2E62735%2ESZA5dw)
* * *
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_hh_email?refcode=bax_hh_emailfooter&t=8&refcode2=1244_62735_SZA5dw&akid=1244%2E62735%2ESZA5dw)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=9&akid=1244%2E62735%2ESZA5dw)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=1244%2E62735%2ESZA5dw)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)
PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN

clean_body: There's only 100 signed books left | | | | | Hey there Friend, Governor Kristi Noem here! "We don't complain about things, Kristi. We fix them." These words from my father have guided me throughout my life from the ranch of my youth to the South Dakota Governor's Residence. And in my new memoir No Going Back, I share stories about the chaos and function in DC, and the lessons I learned in South Dakota on how to fix them. Because America needs commonsense practical solutions, not more complaining from our leaders. So I 'd like to offer you an exclusive signed copy today. BUT I only have 100 left! "YOU CAN CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY HERE >>>" | No Going Backby Kristi Noem | | | "Generic Button" This memoir is the perfect read for everyone who cares about the future of America. Because if we are going to get America back on track, we must return to the values of grit and hard work that my youth and father instilled in me. BUT DON 'T DELAY - there are only 100 signed copies left. Plus, your contribution today will fuel our efforts to take back the House and restore Conservative leadership in Washington. Thank you for your support! | Kristi Noem Governor of South Dakota | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
