And Florida youth are bearing the brunt of his attacks - but we’re determined to make Ron feel the consequences of his actions.

**I started a student organizing team that will hold him accountable year-round.** Together, we’ve been on the ground with youth organizers on their college campuses, empowering other eligible students to register to vote.

**_We’ve even brought on paid fellows – all high school and college students – to join our team and fuel our youth-powered movement!_**

Powering our team means you’ll have a direct impact on how many students on college campuses are reached, register to vote, and change the course of action in Florida politics. We’ll have a real chance at change, but we can’t do it alone. [**_If we want to keep our organizing teams going across Florida, we need YOU to help power this movement before my End of Week deadline tonight. Chip in $27 to fuel my campaign’s efforts to mobilize more youth than ever before to defeat DeSantis’ fascist agenda >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/MkssMUbdPmqP6tj60UovgQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRoI5rJP0TYaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDUxMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9vcmdhbml6ZXJzLWRlc2FudGlzX2VuLXJzJmFtb3VudD0yNyZjZG1jPTJnSHRvTnZuM2xoMk9oV0VQUVNFakFoMWNvVyZyZWZjb2RlMj0yZ0h0b052bjNsaDJPaFdFUFFTRWpBaDFjb1cmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MmdIdG9Odm4zbGgyT2hXRVBRU0VqQWgxY29XVwNzcGNCCmYzyRVBZsjOfoRSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp) Over the past two years, Florida youth have had to endure DeSantis banning books in schools, directly attacking LGBTQ+ youth, and signing a permitless-carry law that will endanger thousands.

But young people have demonstrated that we are ready to fight back against these violations. We won’t stand on the sidelines and watch our Sunshine State go up in flames at the hands of a far-right extremist.

That’s why we are organizing across college campuses, right here in Florida, to give more young people a say in their future. But your support is critical in keeping up our work. **College campuses are just the start. We’re ready to help Florida youth build a bold movement and fight back against fascist attacks.** [**_But I need you, Peter! name: Jessica (personal)
subject: My Mom’s Approach to Feminism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress
body:
| | Although my mother raised two very strong, independent, feminist daughters, I never heard my mother rail against the patriarchy or complain about misogyny. In fact, she would have never described herself as a feminist at all (I think she viewed “feminism” as braless women in the 60’s). Her brand of feminism was to steadily create an armor for her daughters, making us impervious to messages of what women should or shouldn’t be, empowering us to be fully and unapologetically ourselves. My mom was a teacher, and growing up, she turned our world into a classroom. From an early age, she taught my sister and I to love the outdoors and to approach the world with curiosity and excitement. My earliest memories are splashing through tidepools and poking at sea anemones. When hiking and camping, I loved turning over large rocks to see the world of insects, worms and fungus, living beneath. As a result, my sister and I approach life with deep curiosity. When the show _Friends_ first aired, my Mom would have preferred her teenage daughters watch _Pride and Prejudice._ But rather than ban _Friends_ , she watched with us. During the commercials she asked us about the choices the characters made: “Yes, it was funny, but did Chandler treat that woman with respect?” she asked. “Rachel told Ross to go away, so is it appropriate for him to hide and spy on her?” Although this workshop-style viewing made _Friends_ significantly less funny, my mom transformed my sister and I into critical thinkers -- incapable of passively absorbing messages being thrown at us about our self-worth, identity or what it means to be a woman. Running for Congress is a never-ending exercise in people telling you who you are, who you aren’t and who you should be. The double standards and extra hurdles thrown up for women are blatantly obvious. And the constant drumbeat from Kiley asserting that there must be a man pulling the strings of my campaign, is amusing because he clearly can’t accept that a woman just out-fundraised him. And believe me, there are moments when I wish I could sit down with my mom and sort through the onslaught together. But as much as I miss her, I am not without her. This campaign is succeeding because of the foundation of strength, grace, and unconditional love she gave me. Happy Mother’s Day Mom. I miss you every day. And I’m doing my best to keep your love rippling through the world. Jessica
---|---
| Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress.
---

body:
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=929445f2f2c94c4db932779cd0233d92&_e=h0bYKroSpp8qEzcvHKRxtOFCw_IwpuYmqF4GzfxH1RmLheb7IQp7tGXC8lQGUVplY0EwRoBdj6PyO1i-buIcsa3GltC4D3eZI79o0zbLSqLfsb5YV53wiWwq5OOKarI2U02GFGtnCi-MMZ0aHTa9lau20H2-h583kVuVYI8JLs5eXhv2V9pwm33LYMD46wd8UidrNcRS155cXVix5W7jKHqdQ5tmyqB6fFQN8RZGlb4wVyYL9LAi_5zHQRuEJAT8c2S8J_yPUfdam9qOJAZRlw3zIe20nQ3MQZs81NSZsBGfy3it1Au9uk6NGhgHwaQkZ-YyJmp6Z_3Ux9fOXAVuByKvZjleghMBZk_GDY7vZSYAI_K46w1V5eIta0vNywRP9Juw8pdGaIy78j77H3-xoG_fl-t9MPm-V_2KJHLr4tnSxmwrjRvQBLEHBA5tk7_EedHwblHstuEleHFi5OTalQ%3D%3D "Tuttle Twins")

Peter,

This is unlike anything I've written you. It may seem long but I have to explain to you why I'm optimistic for the future of our nation, and If you stay with me here, then I will even deliver you a book.

Let's start by showing where our education system currently stands:
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=929445f2f2c94c4db932779cd0233d92&_e=h0bYKroSpp8qEzcvHKRxtOFCw_IwpuYmqF4GzfxH1RmLheb7IQp7tGXC8lQGUVplY0EwRoBdj6PyO1i-buIcsa3GltC4D3eZI79o0zbLSqLfsb5YV53wiWwq5OOKarI2U02GFGtnCi-MMZ0aHTa9lau20H2-h583kVuVYI8JLs5eXhv2V9pwm33LYMD46wd8UidrNcRS155cXVix5W7jKHqdQ5tmyqB6fFQN8RZGlb4wVyYL9LAi_5zHQRuEJAT8c2S8J_yPUfdam9qOJAZRlw3zIe20nQ3MQZs81NSZsBGqJa9hC-PXtE9fIlqZCTSHx4vOj2FAcVj2SosmeeF7zJu8z4XBTjSDMxC5SOb-YjgEzlPzx7ow8wqNS6oZtSst-OzxwlI2bei9vHMQo5iKiJnkMhmMzNIdQaF7eY1ZLJ8ziMAJngZ1kiAFKY5o4ME1zm02SsFr-DucFcqm5QrIlTL5pZ2iZi1-9xPn7LIIVb4%3D)
See the bright red line?

That's the growth of administrative staff... aka woke administrators who enforce D.E.I., CRT, and other nonsense onto our kids. Ever hear the phrase "Go woke. Go broke." That's our educational system.

Fortunately, there is a solution that is turning the tide to educate our country's youth against the dangers of socialism and teach young people about the ideas of liberty.

And this is why I'm optimistic. Because there are students standing up.

The solution? _The Tuttle Twins_.

_The Tuttle Twins_ teaches kids about free markets, individual liberty, limited government, and personal responsibility.

And it's working...

Before I give you real stories of students fighting back, I must first ask how you can help. My personal friend Connor Boyack is the author of _The Tuttle Twins_. He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books.

[I am humbly asking you to help me raise $50,000 to distribute copies of The Tuttle Twins to schools, libraries, and families. It costs roughly $10 to distribute one copy. Can you chip in $10, $20, $30, or even $250 today?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=929445f2f2c94c4db932779cd0233d92&_e=h0bYKroSpp8qEzcvHKRxtOFCw_IwpuYmqF4GzfxH1RmLheb7IQp7tGXC8lQGUVplY0EwRoBdj6PyO1i-buIcsa3GltC4D3eZI79o0zbLSqLfsb5YV53wiWwq5OOKarI2U02GFGtnCi-MMZ0aHTa9lau20H2-h583kVuVYI8JLs5eXhv2V9pwm33LYMD46wd8UidrNcRS155cXVix5W7jKHqdQ5tmyqB6fFQN8RZGlb4wVyYL9LAi_5zHQRuEJAT8c2S8J_yPUfdam9qOJAZRlw3zIe20nQ3MQZs81NSZsBHi8ooT3PubVknmSBiLPxU6FBD5NMQJlpXxqmU7jSdJNsaejhAi7ADF_N9LqyRMYHMi7IbWMRUU2e3pZTg9f3cVQPOKgXXmplGvPw4A0AiW_EBk4KaI3gZw0opUINH2aWcz3FeOQ94M7DLJPFJBAxS0u1g348O_OXhcniMtQ2c_9A%3D%3D)

The director at Vanguard School, where Jaiden attends, believed that this historical flag has "origins with slavery" and was "disruptive to the classroom environment." He told Jaiden's mother that the boy could not return to class unless the patch was removed.

Jaiden refused to remove the patch. Good for him!

In an emergency meeting, the school board voted to allow Jaiden to wear the patch. That was a quick victory!

Jaiden is a special kid. He stands up for his beliefs. More importantly, he stands up for the truth. As his mom explained to me, he's been reading the Tuttle Twins books for years and learning about freedom. Then, it came time for him to do something about it.

clean_body: "Tuttle Twins" Peter, This is unlike anything I've written you. It may seem long but I have to explain to you why I'm optimistic for the future of our nation, and If you stay with me here, then I will even deliver you a book. Let's start by showing where our education system currently stands: See the bright red line? That's the growth of administrative staff... aka woke administrators who enforce D.E.I., CRT, and other nonsense onto our kids. Ever hear the phrase "Go woke. Go broke." That's our educational system. Fortunately, there is a solution that is turning the tide to educate our country's youth against the dangers of socialism and teach young people about the ideas of liberty. And this is why I'm optimistic. Because there are students standing up. The solution? The Tuttle Twins. The Tuttle Twins teaches kids about free markets, individual liberty, limited government, and personal responsibility. And it's working... Before I give you real stories of students fighting back, I must first ask how you can help. My personal friend Connor Boyack is the author of The Tuttle Twins. He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books. As a special offer, if you donate $30 or more, my friend Connor will send you The Tuttle Twins Learn About The Law. Here's my favorite example of The Tuttle Twins inspiring the next generation: A public school in Colorado kicked Jaiden out of class. His crime? He wore a Gadsden flag patch on his backpack. The director at Vanguard School, where Jaiden attends, believed that this historical flag has "origins with slavery" and was "disruptive to the classroom environment." He told Jaiden's mother that the boy could not return to class unless the patch was removed. Jaiden refused to remove the patch. Good for him! In an emergency meeting, the school board voted to allow Jaiden to wear the patch. That was a quick victory! Jaiden is a special kid. He stands up for his beliefs. More importantly, he stands up for the truth. As his mom explained to me, he's been reading the Tuttle Twins books for years and learning about freedom. Then, it came time for him to do something about it. What if we could teach an entire generation to be like Jaiden? We can. If Congress had read The Tuttle Twins as kids, I bet we wouldn't be bankrupting our country and giving the Deep State warrantless spying! The time to start building the future is now, and your support is critical to our mission. Thank you. Mike Lee P.S. I've included a heartwarming letter below from a kid who was also inspired by The Tuttle Twins. This is how we can change the future. Paid for by Libertas Institute

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: Our plan to protect reproductive rights:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YASSAMIN ANSARI FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yassaminansari_em?refcode=wrpr_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yassaminansari_em?refcode=wrpr_hdr] Peter, I've spent the better part of my career on the front lines of the fight to protect reproductive rights. When the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade, I led the charge to keep Phoenix doctors and their patients out of jail for practicing and receiving basic healthcare. Since that outrageous decision, things have only gotten worse. Just last month, the AZ Supreme Court reinstated a total abortion ban that was written during the Civil War. And it's not just here that our civil rights are being rolled back and stripped away. Across the country, nearly one-fifth of all women are living under total abortion bans like Arizona's. Peter, as this fight grows more and more urgent, our resistance is only growing stronger. https://yassaminforcongress.com/policy/reproductive-rights-womens-health-policy-plan-2024/ [https://yassaminforcongress.com/policy/reproductive-rights-womens-health-policy-plan-2024/] I've never shied away from our biggest policy problems. From climate change to housing, I've made it my mission to tackle them head-on, working with experts and community partners to find effective and innovative solutions. The fight for reproductive rights is no different. Last month, I released our comprehensive Reproductive Justice and Women's Health Plan, a step-by-step platform of the actions I will take in Congress to protect our fundamental rights and our bodily autonomy. You can read it right here, Peter, and then if you'd like, you can chip in to support our campaign for reproductive justice for ALL. [https://yassaminforcongress.com/policy/reproductive-rights-womens-health-policy-plan-2024/] Chip In [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yassaminansari_em?refcode=240512_ya_repro_platform_b1] Thanks for being part of this fight, Peter. — Yassamin Yassamin Ansari is the former Vice Mayor of Phoenix and the youngest woman ever elected to the Phoenix City Council. From helping deliver the historic Paris Climate Agreement at the United Nations to her time serving Phoenix, she has championed housing and healthcare affordability, reproductive freedom, education, and workers' rights. Yassamin is a trailblazer who has dedicated her life to serving her community. She's now running to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress and needs your help. Will you support her campaign? Contribute Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yassaminansari_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=d5a74f95-9610-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096] GIVE Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yassaminansari_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=d5a74f95-9610-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096] PAID FOR BY YASSAMIN ANSARI FOR CONGRESS

name: Jude, Siena, and Willow Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Our Mom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
With you on Mom's team, we know she'll win big.
| | |
---
Hey, friend — happy Mother's Day! You're looking at a photo of us — Jude, Siena, and Willow — with our mom, Debbie.

**On Mother's Day, the three of us wanted to write to you about why we're so proud of our****mom and supporting her 100% in her race to defeat Rick Scott and become Florida's next U.S. senator.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84827274/472752071/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1207-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWI5MTA1YjgtOTYxMC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ih7icfGPCeq-Ewyzg2NrQZGQReneNi5y43I1th48mv4=)
Mami has never _not_ had a lot on her plate. After all, she's somebody who worked at a doughnut shop when she was our age to help support her immigrant family.
On top of serving in Congress and now running a battleground Senate race — in addition to giving love and attention to our family's two dogs and bunny — she never loses sight of us. She's always in our corner, being a #1 mom and fighting for each of us to have every opportunity to succeed. She’s at every school event, and will always drop everything when we need to Facetime her for advice.
The same love, drive, and devotion that Mom gives us, she brings to the campaign trail. It's what she brought to her service in Congress. It's what she'll bring for all of Florida as our next U.S. senator. We’ve watched her give voters across our state the same care and compassion she shows us.
But every generation knows that Mom's opponent, Rick Scott, is once again going to spend tens of millions of dollars of his own money to buy this Senate seat. Unlike our mom, he always puts himself first. **It's why we have a special ask of you, for our mom, on Mother's Day:

[Will you help our mom, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell, win Florida's Senate race by chipping in a donation of $5 or whatever you can spare on Mother's Day? Your support ensures she has the resources to fight a grassroots campaign to defeat Rick Scott.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84827275/472752072/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1207-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWI5MTA1YjgtOTYxMC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ih7icfGPCeq-Ewyzg2NrQZGQReneNi5y43I1th48mv4=)**
We're so proud of our mom — and it's so cool to see the grassroots team she's building to win such an important race. We've seen firsthand that she can accomplish whatever she puts her mind to. With you on Mom's team, we know she'll win big.

Thanks!

Jude, Siena, and Willow
|
* * *
| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84827276/472752073/-31196584?refcode=jtk1207-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWI5MTA1YjgtOTYxMC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ih7icfGPCeq-Ewyzg2NrQZGQReneNi5y43I1th48mv4=)
---
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7CGTHFDMeUWW_Wz2yFDujA2?unsubscribedata=UQDwbIa9ENvbJdH%2BEKDMfdPf%2BeLcuLhJVTaQ%2Fj1WxUkNNdhZ%2FmsdXdhf4cH9dRs%2FdH4LQMBojl3uNWPQu1FHNlnmCXHjz8yQDpxF5sRpAv1GGF2o%2BiLOzGpQIH3KdUN2ZN5pGDdD0nhyfDvEKwzTMcCFXbhhviMDdCKSK%2Bay5RdraaKbpAFbmZx240AJ5EQQLvYQ1kHzwI47mxhwDJrPcdQZe5VjUDpKnpj95Vd7dWfINagS7C%2BxB8TOF3W6eO3Dmy07eZZFNEfUmoeYuryV5qGxff94ZaVzpqNVSLwki96FKFTHft88f%2FgSj%2FT%2Fx52LISoeVJc20bgpWIZlk%2Bv0zuRE0ibwCiSHkOqqzVGx4yMUvExF58mciPIaT3nyTXgPofgglDFFnTW7zF2N9joJ2z32ab%2FeQBbwUaevl0bv0rhhLQrOcKVgQrRAp%2FGTerOV) from Debbie's email list.
Paid for by Debbie for Florida.

## Special Guest Speaker Coming To Sheridan.Church
---
|
---
Over the last several years, we have been blessed at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4907.1.c8b98bef7ed847f59c1a0e72c7229f26) with some tremendous guest speakers such as [Rabbi Jonathan Cahn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4908.1.7c72e4fca7313030350a9a2e8de702f7), [Lara Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4909.1.99cd8f8ad829f6b02c94d069e059ddfa), Perry Stone, [Darryl Strawberry](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4910.1.f98631a4d639b49b0a24c7b66feab24f), [Mayor Rudy Giuliani](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4911.1.fdc3dd789cb6af734507b457f9facbab), [Roger Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4912.1.64450d95450747aec240eac9b79c8d91), Rodney Howard-Browne and so many others. In the future we have [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4913.1.5f91074d49f0c2941c236b0be6420ccc), [Tim Tebow](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4914.1.6decc9d60e96702ee9fb95f2e44d5b38) and [Riley Gaines](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4915.1.2eab48ca049b689df4845576dcbeb283) coming to share. But one guest that I am super excited to share with you who is coming to [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4916.1.3303292e39e9ea4bbb4d9b6d1b6e8a4e) is a former professor of mine from **Oral Roberts University**. **Dr. John Swails** is the director of ORU's _Center for Israel and Middle East Studies_. **Dr. Swails** earned an A.B., M.A., and Ph.D. in history from the University of Georgia as well as an M.A. in near east studies from Brandeis University. He has been nominated as a _Who's Who_ among American Teachers for multiple years, I learned so much by sitting in many of **Dr. Swails** lectures that I know this service will bless you. Join me on **Wednesday, June 12 at 7pm** for a [LIVE Q&A w/Dr. John Swails](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4917.1.c1d55914916d2a37718241994c61b901). **Address** : 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK 74145 For more information visit: [www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4918.1.0d7c7bcfa32c7e0b5a7bf5e404864c2a) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer

## General Flynn Wants To Meet YOU!
---
America's General, [Michael Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4920.1.8681df225a0f42e7f744ce704fb585fe), is doing a **Nation-Wide Tour** for his new movie! [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4921.1.3f1df1f33fc8c9865657a4c73a597c70) wants to invite you to join him in a city that is close to you. At the end of each showing, there will be a live Q&A w/[General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4922.1.4d1d078b60012c20c10531ed1ea65844). View the locations of the [Flynn Tour](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4923.1.de4065f160f5d2154687e3549a03c966): [www.flynnmovie.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4924.1.eac00c9f759d117ff4bd383009fb897b) General Flynn will be coming to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4925.1.0c01eb350855ff608878f9bafa9bc3da) Tulsa for the premier of the [NEW Flynn Movie](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4926.1.d95eec7efe967d170e7d7776738ad20f)! **Date** : Monday, May 20, 2024
**Meet & Greet**: 5:00pm
**Show Time** : 6:30pm

## The Cross + The Crescent
---
Yesterday at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4934.1.964a578ae607397f306fbf93d661d885), I paused our WKND series over the [Book of Acts](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4935.1.a62a714e9281babc94c3c515707a8f3a). I sensed led to address the _chaos happening in America_ and the **GREAT** deception spreading like cancer throughout our college campuses. There is a battle right now between the **Cross** \+ the **Crescent**. This battle has been raging for nearly 1400 years and it is **THE** battle of the present + future. In this message I addressed **Islam** and what the response of a Christian should be right now. Watch THE CROSS + THE CRESCENT here: [https://youtube.com/live/LZMb2AQOuBw?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4936.1.84d6698eb52544c929b5bab05e240c0c) **Upcoming Events At Sheridan:** -Mon, May 20 @6:30pm - **General Michael Flynn**

-Fri, June 28 @6:30pm - **Tim Tebow**

-Fri, July 26 @6:30pm - **Riley Gaines**

-Thur, Oct 24 @6:30pm - **Pete Hegseth** RSVP at:[ https://www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4937.1.eae330329be4e0c1db3555d2a4033434) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4938.1.08de04e7b4553721bb593e3bb344714a)

I am super excited to share with you the release of a _new project_ I have been working on. 2 years ago, I did a _32 part series_ over the **Book of Revelation**. Since then, the Lord has shown me so much about **Revelation** that I did not know when I first taught the series and a TON has changed in our world since then. _Therefore_ , I sensed led to redo the series over the **Book of Revelation** with the new insights. This new teaching series will take each chapter of **Revelation** and break it down _verse-by-verse_. _"Blessed is the one who reads aloud the words of this prophecy, and blessed are those who hear it and take to heart what is written in it, because the time is near"_ **\- Revelation1:3** I know this teaching will bless you. I have also included the teaching notes for you to follow along. Watch Revelation 1 here: [https://youtu.be/VfS_4Aii2hE](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4940.1.872a2c9c4059c17beed6ff70fdfac1a8)

We have been blessed to host: [Lara Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4944.1.408fa93fd58bc61dd5cbaa021cd0ed85), **Perry Stone** , [Rabbi Jonathan Cahn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4945.1.2fafa1ceef1e650d91c6b60d9e55d3df), **Rodney Howard-Browne** , [Darry Strawberry](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4946.1.b8b7dc84132cffe4c3ccc1579d47f2f5), [Mayor Rudy Giuliani](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4947.1.22f34a82ece1b78e8c7d32948c543637), [Roger Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10454003.4948.1.05511d196590090627ea668c0d469fe9), **David Barton** and others in the past. name: Elyse Casey
subject: This Mother’s Day I’m telling my story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2944%2E552475%2Eu1c06A)
It’s Elyse, daughter of Bob and Terese Casey and mother to two young boys. This Mother’s Day, I wanted to share how I became a mom, as many parents share my story.
I was only able to give birth to my two healthy boys because of IVF. After learning that I have a condition that makes it much more challenging to become pregnant naturally, I had no choice but to undergo numerous fertility treatments to become a mom.
Despite the challenges I faced, I was very fortunate to have had access to the fertility treatments I needed to have my boys. I know the challenges and barriers many women and families across the country face when trying to start a family, because I lived it.
Everyone who wants to become a parent should be able to. Yet, across the country, reproductive technology, like IVF, is under threat by national Republicans. Battling fertility challenges is difficult enough, we don’t need politicians adding even more barriers for women and families to have healthy children.
[**I’m emailing you because being a mom is the most important job I will ever have, but if Republicans win the Senate in November, Pennsylvanians won’t be guaranteed basic family planning tools, like IVF. That’s why I’m asking if you’ll join me in supporting my dad’s re-election campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240512-2?refcode=em20240512-2&refcode2=2944_552475_u1c06A&akid=2944%2E552475%2Eu1c06A)
My dad has spent his career fighting for Pennsylvania’s children and families. As his daughter, that has always made me extremely proud. Now, as a parent myself, I have a deeper appreciation of how vital his work is to ensure that every Pennsylvanian has the support they need to live the best life possible.
To all the mothers, grandmothers, mother figures, and women trying to become mothers -- my dad sees you and will fight for your rights every day.
Happy Mother’s Day.
Elyse
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240512-2?refcode=em20240512-2&refcode2=2944_552475_u1c06A&akid=2944%2E552475%2Eu1c06A)**

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2944%2E552475%2Eu1c06A)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2944%2E552475%2Eu1c06A)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Mira Bohannan Kumar
subject: My mom, Christina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christina Bohannan for Congress
body:
It’s Mother’s Day, so I’m popping back in to tell you about my mom.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84828404/472755482/182211867?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTdjZDhjMC05YTEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ISuy3leBqx8TwSIp5zKgKpzeIh4EVsZ6VXK6gSPpCcc=)
Happy Mother's Day, Peter!

This is Mira, Christina’s daughter. It’s Mother’s Day, so I’m popping back in to tell you about my mom. My mom has been looking out for me for much longer than I can remember. From making sure I was always dressed in style (see below photo of us looking _very_ fashionable) to helping me with my homework to listening to all my problems, **I was lucky to grow up knowing my mom would always be there for me.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84828405/472755483/182211867?refcode=em24_240512_momday_enask_gq_act___mbk_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240512_momday_enask_gq_act___mbk_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&refcode2=f57cd8c0-9a10-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTdjZDhjMC05YTEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ISuy3leBqx8TwSIp5zKgKpzeIh4EVsZ6VXK6gSPpCcc=)
As I’ve gotten older, my mom has been working hard for the people of Iowa, just like she works hard for me. She served as my representative in the Iowa House, looking out for the interests of every Iowan — including young people like me — by supporting education, healthcare, reproductive rights, and environmental action.

Even though there’s a lot more on her plate now, she has never stopped being an amazing mom. **That’s how I know she’ll be an incredible representative: because she cares, she listens, and she shows up for every single person in Iowa’s 1st District, just like she does for me.** _(Although she might not pick out Easter hats for anyone else. That honor is still reserved for me.)_

As we celebrate Mother's Day today, let's not forget to thank all the incredible moms out there who work tirelessly to make our lives better every day.

— Mira Bohannan Kumar

P.S. Lately, my mom has been working especially hard to raise money for her congressional campaign, and I’m hoping to help. Would you be willing to support the campaign of an amazing mom and future incredible congressperson this Mother's Day? clean_body: It’s Mother’s Day, so I’m popping back in to tell you about my mom. | = Happy Mother's Day, Peter! This is Mira, Christina’s daughter. It’s Mother’s Day, so I’m popping back in to tell you about my mom. My mom has been looking out for me for much longer than I can remember. From making sure I was always dressed in style (see below photo of us looking very fashionable) to helping me with my homework to listening to all my problems, I was lucky to grow up knowing my mom would always be there for me. = As I’ve gotten older, my mom has been working hard for the people of Iowa, just like she works hard for me. She served as my representative in the Iowa House, looking out for the interests of every Iowan — including young people like me — by supporting education, healthcare, reproductive rights, and environmental action. Even though there’s a lot more on her plate now, she has never stopped being an amazing mom. That’s how I know she’ll be an incredible representative: because she cares, she listens, and she shows up for every single person in Iowa’s 1st District, just like she does for me. (Although she might not pick out Easter hats for anyone else. That honor is still reserved for me.) As we celebrate Mother's Day today, let's not forget to thank all the incredible moms out there who work tirelessly to make our lives better every day. — Mira Bohannan Kumar P.S. Lately, my mom has been working especially hard to raise money for her congressional campaign, and I’m hoping to help. Would you be willing to support the campaign of an amazing mom and future incredible congressperson this Mother's Day? = = Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, former engineer and state representative, and DCCC Red to Blue candidate. name: JD Vance
subject: I made a promise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
I was elected to put America First, defend and support Ohioans, and Make America Great Again. I promise to use my power to CONTINUE fighting the Left and their socialist ideas. I promise to protect our Democracy from collapsing. I promise to stand up to Joe Biden and the Left.
When you hired me in 2022, I made a promise...

| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=2568bc040f3d4a589b8d55375febe83b&_e=3vMtFA681-Frhb6WYmVlnJ_toGd1DiQDqeqfqAybQwmN38b9oweELLLaEnE64Ok1PxThtanSSm2qkXKJiNTzUHoqWhISn_7dq2s01d0J_6fK5is7CRxBj5AGW_uo1lXTOu7RBJeUNvI0N6wwiPSbwpGJG9VqzWk0CXDoYRg7VtEZURmrJ54CDeMSOGBlAgr2qq4L7rJy35A-NudEC7y8jHNM7Dza6RVjzAzKZNi-6Hbbz_ISWPGQv6IpgBUC8Kp0rEtG44xdeLZShHyDyTrHfMEsFOgtjFSAlzCbLE56n7hbyp4mBUOw8s9Q91muL_0qGOwKozqwnfvFuRY37fbOZA%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

When you hired me in 2022, I made a promise.

_I promised to put America First and defend Ohioans. I promised to work towards our shared vision of letting our great State prosper and grow to become the best place for Americans to grow, live, work, and raise families._

In the past two years, we've worked on that goal together. The Left has slowed our progress, but when a true American Patriot, DJT, takes the Oval Office in January, I can promise we will put the America First Agenda back in the driver's seat. Including: ****

****
* Finishing the wall and securing our border

* Putting parents back in charge of their children, including their education

* Investing in our law enforcement and military to reduce crime and become a world power once again

* Fixing Bidenflation and putting money back into YOUR pocket

* Getting control of our nation's opioid crisis and getting help for those affected

| [**STAND WITH SENATOR VANCE**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=2568bc040f3d4a589b8d55375febe83b&_e=3vMtFA681-Frhb6WYmVlnJ_toGd1DiQDqeqfqAybQwmN38b9oweELLLaEnE64Ok1PxThtanSSm2qkXKJiNTzUHoqWhISn_7dq2s01d0J_6fK5is7CRxBj5AGW_uo1lXTOu7RBJeUNvI0N6wwiPSbwpGJG9VqzWk0CXDoYRg7VtEZURmrJ54CDeMSOGBlAgr2cVL8CnuO6UiqrKQbohHyYdpt128-2L5OxW2xq9XUY_SE-oZxYqkXs7wVNS4Fn8Nu5IKwS-fJbEMzbHwJ5xD-SNWWN1KVN6GMe_wqWBldTqPnE2Zmki_1BLxcoqOBR3mODogC3O6p3C5kpr0J-4SILQ%3D%3D)
---

We can fix all of this together, not because it's the Republican, but because it's what will fix America and put Americans First!

_All of this is threatened by the Democrats and Joe Biden. We 've seen how the last couple of years turned out - can Americans really afford another four years of this? _

**As your Senator, I refuse to let this happen.** These past two years, I've been at the front - calling out and blocking the Left from their outrageous ideas. Unfortunately, with Joe Biden in the White House and Democrats in control of the Senate - Conservative voices are outnumbered. This November, we have the chance to change that. We have the chance to elect American Patriots and put real leaders in office.

_I was elected to put America First, defend and support Ohioans, and Make America Great Again. I promise to use my power to CONTINUE fighting the Left and their socialist ideas. I promise to protect our Democracy from collapsing. I promise to stand up to Joe Biden and the Left._

[**STAND WITH SENATOR JD VANCE**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=2568bc040f3d4a589b8d55375febe83b&_e=3vMtFA681-Frhb6WYmVlnJ_toGd1DiQDqeqfqAybQwmN38b9oweELLLaEnE64Ok1PxThtanSSm2qkXKJiNTzUHoqWhISn_7dq2s01d0J_6fK5is7CRxBj5AGW_uo1lXTOu7RBJeUNvI0N6wwiPSbwpGJG9VqzWk0CXDoYRg7VtEZURmrJ54CDeMSOGBlAgr239RWtBtamqEiSGzOCyzLho1h_4h6_17togpsPQUtpKAKb3U5uPxT15XT8rp-i8fl_lzxUgOpbgqL4xpGKVi8rpJloFJCrTG0uxTszCwjxCo0kJne-1R10F-uqWz5KfwXzVP_Ds4gLNXoRxmlPut47g%3D%3D)
---

Thanks for your support,

Senator JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance. If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. Thanks for your support, Senator JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
If Liberals can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
As Co-Chair of one of the most important initiatives of the Republican Party, I wanted you to what we’re doing right now to lay the groundwork for the biggest GOP landslide in AMERICAN HISTORY!

| |

---
| | | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6851da15751349caac4d71de065e854f&_e=fyOhY7MR6BC7APGeSY1YFiZQsi0hyywkw-xrsNK-aWigU4eeUxV_jOrVA0jFHgfjQzrLrv3TOW6kjpHTVoBvNK2_Hvd_essk2LxjruhpYFBCio9s98ckN-6hMSqWgWnXrbtv2_xsNNQQZwM9Oe73vDs0aFMLNZh0vBXoXDUEP752qeH1D2MVQ_5srdnSupITUwm8bZycFihn1EDaxEE-kKqtvF4QbaD7S5hu1gqaYcAjjEPuG0NDH7VDMRPfoEQqGpV2fCKzVhpK8PbrT28PgRkS-khe_A-6l8npzEelmSiQblf5ouh1VQj6WD9Z2uWP9VspqcUUIAdQXn--yA08bTNdqJFT_AW_2jVKo6YB29npqZ9ONkrRzMPdeeEwefyOu2XMMJ4JgxazyTZi4MIsWA%3D%3D "Byron Donalds")
---

Hey - my name is Byron Donalds.

As Co-Chair of one of the most important initiatives of the Republican Party, I wanted you to what we're doing right now to lay the groundwork for the biggest GOP landslide in AMERICAN HISTORY!

_**[A lot goes into building the most powerful election-winning machine our country has ever seen- so bear with me for a minute:](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6851da15751349caac4d71de065e854f&_e=fyOhY7MR6BC7APGeSY1YFiZQsi0hyywkw-xrsNK-aWigU4eeUxV_jOrVA0jFHgfjQzrLrv3TOW6kjpHTVoBvNK2_Hvd_essk2LxjruhpYFBCio9s98ckN-6hMSqWgWnXrbtv2_xsNNQQZwM9Oe73vDs0aFMLNZh0vBXoXDUEP752qeH1D2MVQ_5srdnSupITUwm8bZycFihn1EDaxEE-kKqtvF4QbaD7S5hu1gqaYcAjjEPuG0NDH7VDMRPfoEQqn9Ewn2zDtMYXKMJjU0svL1JgQKMkKOJGqM_LOv_rKei0c_WrFA-qbuRPgvmgSVWKIi9oI9z6XCcimE50hbbpPmen2HOs-YcRnuR-rt5XbYpvccvQlpa_t9_rODI8KPRq8ZxgjpjGaww0FPgAiqwb4A%3D%3D "A lot goes into building the most powerful election-winning machine our country has ever seen – so bear with me for a minute:")**_

-> If the Democrat Legal Machine tries any shenanigans, we'll be there to stop them
-> If Liberals can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
-> If they're sending poll watchers, we should send an army of our own
-> We're not pandering to minority voters, we're building relationships with them
-> We're expanding GOTV efforts to get young Conservatives to the ballot box
-> We're fighting bad election laws to make it easier to vote but harder to cheat

These are the nuts and bolts of winning campaigns up and down the ballot. And I'm proud to help lead these efforts.

As Conservatives, we have the issues on our side. We are the only commonsense Party. **If we get these campaign operations right, the Democrats are in serious trouble come election day.**

_But I have to be honest with you: building this level of infrastructure is very expensive._ We're running ads in costly swing-state markets, printing campaign literature, filling up gas tanks to knock doors, recruiting volunteers, and scaling up our voter contact programs.

And unlike the Democrats, we don't rely on Liberal billionaires and rich celebrities for funding.

I'm perfectly okay with that. But it means if we want to WIN BIG, the burden falls on all of us to step up. _**[That's why I'm coming to you now - would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks to help kick start these efforts? Whether it's 10 bucks or 100 bucks, I only ask that everyone pitches in SOMETHING.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6851da15751349caac4d71de065e854f&_e=fyOhY7MR6BC7APGeSY1YFiZQsi0hyywkw-xrsNK-aWigU4eeUxV_jOrVA0jFHgfjQzrLrv3TOW6kjpHTVoBvNK2_Hvd_essk2LxjruhpYFBCio9s98ckN-6hMSqWgWnXrbtv2_xsNNQQZwM9Oe73vDs0aFMLNZh0vBXoXDUEP752qeH1D2MVQ_5srdnSupITUwm8bZycFihn1EDaxEE-kKqtvF4QbaD7S5hu1gqaYcAjjEPuG0NDH7VDMRPfoEQqpfyD54-j46ZsTta_CRGoNk6RQULdpbzgn04jwRBF_5pMiFv7oDinRqfvHZfMCy0h_PctoEp69C0hG8uqASdx2mGH4rSmjoM3M-bViIU9yNx7_z_5Q9VtyJHB-NF24N1YAT0tmSDdhA5jyytnIKu8OA%3D%3D "That’s why I’m coming to you now – would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks to help kick start these efforts? Whether it’s 10 bucks or 100 bucks, I only ask that everyone pitches in SOMETHING.")**_

Look,

**I know it 's a lot to ask but I GUARANTEE it'll all be worth it when we expand our Conservative Majority, take back control of the Senate, and win the White House.**

I don't know about you but the thought of unified Republican control fires me up! If that doesn't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?

Before I go, I'll just say this:

The Democrat Party is spending more money - and spending it earlier - than we've ever seen before. They know they are LOSING on the issues.

That's why they're compensating by raising astronomical sums of money, plastering social media with Liberal propaganda, and unleashing the powers of our Federal Government to attack Conservatives.

**But make no mistake: there are a lot more of US than there are of THEM!_[So if every Conservative in America steps up, there is nothing we can't do. So will you do your part when we need you the most?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6851da15751349caac4d71de065e854f&_e=fyOhY7MR6BC7APGeSY1YFiZQsi0hyywkw-xrsNK-aWigU4eeUxV_jOrVA0jFHgfjQzrLrv3TOW6kjpHTVoBvNK2_Hvd_essk2LxjruhpYFBCio9s98ckN-6hMSqWgWnXrbtv2_xsNNQQZwM9Oe73vDs0aFMLNZh0vBXoXDUEP752qeH1D2MVQ_5srdnSupITUwm8bZycFihn1EDaxEE-kKqtvF4QbaD7S5hu1gqaYcAjjEPuG0NDH7VDMRPfoEQqgQ_3KlnlrZH5CbbsBRiv76iWB7677j89lSOqBABfMj735_gJ4Lsa5wP7-fgW_kc-wsjLvjFJc842wcXqb8ebX-okBkUDVURb3GhXXqyeKVHBSTeOaxFTP8kTVS5bB_eOmmrEDdg2e1ky1FcRE7a57w%3D%3D "So if every Conservative in America steps up, there is nothing we can’t do. As Co-Chair of one of the most important initiatives of the Republican Party, I wanted you to what we're doing right now to lay the groundwork for the biggest GOP landslide in AMERICAN HISTORY! "A lot goes into building the most powerful election-winning machine our country has ever seen – so bear with me for a minute:" -> If the Democrat Legal Machine tries any shenanigans, we'll be there to stop them -> If Liberals can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better -> If they're sending poll watchers, we should send an army of our own -> We're not pandering to minority voters, we're building relationships with them -> We're expanding GOTV efforts to get young Conservatives to the ballot box -> We're fighting bad election laws to make it easier to vote but harder to cheat These are the nuts and bolts of winning campaigns up and down the ballot. And I'm proud to help lead these efforts. As Conservatives, we have the issues on our side. We are the only commonsense Party. If we get these campaign operations right, the Democrats are in serious trouble come election day. But I have to be honest with you: building this level of infrastructure is very expensive. We're running ads in costly swing-state markets, printing campaign literature, filling up gas tanks to knock doors, recruiting volunteers, and scaling up our voter contact programs. And unlike the Democrats, we don't rely on Liberal billionaires and rich celebrities for funding. I'm perfectly okay with that. But it means if we want to WIN BIG, the burden falls on all of us to step up. "That’s why I’m coming to you now – would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks to help kick start these efforts? Whether it’s 10 bucks or 100 bucks, I only ask that everyone pitches in SOMETHING." Look, I know it 's a lot to ask but I GUARANTEE it'll all be worth it when we expand our Conservative Majority, take back control of the Senate, and win the White House. name: JoeBiden.com
subject: Good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Joe and Kamala could really use your help, especially today. | | |
---
Peter, we needed to reach out directly. **Here's the good news:** So far this month, we've received hundreds of thousands of individual donations to our campaign. That’s a strong sign. It means that people are fired up about reelecting Joe and Kamala and defeating Donald Trump. **Here's the bad news:** Our average donation in the last week has slipped by about $5. That's OK -- this campaign is all about people giving whatever they can afford at the moment. No donation is too small. **But what it means is that in order to hit our fundraising goals (and scale our operation across the country), we either need LOTS AND LOTS more donations -- or we need people to give a little bit more.** Normally we ask someone making their first online donation to give just $10. Today, we have to ask you to do a little bit more, Peter. Especially because Trump has locked up the Republican nomination. [Can President Biden count on you to give $25 to his campaign to make sure we can defeat Donald Trump and defend the White House? Every donation matters. It will all add up fast when we're all chipping in.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_tF02SEYb775JbaVddBglvb5bATKUlRslVui8wRTD29Vyuts11LzgyEPGTDuww8Gq_clJNmq4LrfY9TulRi6dN7wMvUEhH2Q7bpmID0cN97qLZ21EQnxJucxzLxEFfTVdIlN0A9QOWr29XXY1yr5pYa5J94acT_eEYxuT8gUUJX_y7Yd0SVNZi6eNihfgXVMor_4-IQKP_rf9EPsLYqTuQTGzyvTRvp43cLxWBPhd2hf473Izuf3LkTNmny_TI5ehCPONaFc66AY0du5K2wqhDO7j8zQGKBx_b2QNrJ1s81vvJszagJZE3ZtoAOVH0M61c_jdqCBwGmge37v0bKb0LxHS2vy9DWVKCsuUhrlF4R4Q/46a/GDMyyxjkSJ28dG-wK6hrAQ/h0/h001.rMi1CzKY28BEl86EXtbYUxdnpH48q8KHs2E1rzK6Hds) | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Joe and Kamala could really use your help, especially today. | | | Peter, we needed to reach out directly. Here's the good news: So far this month, we've received hundreds of thousands of individual donations to our campaign. That’s a strong sign. It means that people are fired up about reelecting Joe and Kamala and defeating Donald Trump. Here's the bad news: Our average donation in the last week has slipped by about $5. That's OK -- this campaign is all about people giving whatever they can afford at the moment. No donation is too small. But what it means is that in order to hit our fundraising goals (and scale our operation across the country), we either need LOTS AND LOTS more donations -- or we need people to give a little bit more. Normally we ask someone making their first online donation to give just $10. Today, we have to ask you to do a little bit more, Peter. Especially because Trump has locked up the Republican nomination. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you in advance. Let us assure you it means a lot to President Biden, and to our chances. Team Biden-Harris

name: Daniel Pardee
subject: We need your input
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#] Josh’s favorite part of campaign season is speaking with voters across the district. Hearing from small business owners, first responders, labor, veterans, families, and more is critical to his work in Congress.

But it's impossible to hear from everyone. So we are sending out our Spring Issues Survey – for you to tell us what matters most to supporters like you.

Will you share what issues matter most to you? [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/prisv-2405]

TAKE THE SURVEY >> [https://go.josh4congress.com/a/prisv-2405]

This survey will take you less than a minute to complete, and we need to hear from 10 supporters in 18326 before the end of the week!

Thank you,

Daniel Pardee
Finance Director
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. subject: How important is religious liberty to you?
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=155f3ce0e58c4cc6b162536aa93925de&_t=oCxaHhT3GxsfIkJJ_rMRUU_9NkF99WH88P4sQSVAVFe28IVTO7ZbqDyrPHaWrt-LuLtVHT2bwV7lLC4pBtkwE9qOQP-LDgKH7q7F2p6Kk8Q%3D)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=155f3ce0e58c4cc6b162536aa93925de&_e=-9q2kNBMm8PWQo3qPvzZN839UdMTgm9ZXI4SU0gB_EIlmCFepZZKaetgVBwGHO0O9X3CnY0Qdy2CRMppHMbJ39FwTWQJGcL2VTAswao6_6G-OfwcWG7X9P_JqUq-1joz0Xcy7NEIDkGtRRemkqlnJz1FfiGiw17lC5bHU4hVWHR_TpTbg-DIlVw8nX214rY0RdPoWVw8uKG1qa65PUijsCd294yYwB_Aq5XooFejCQa9xdbZn46-mSp5-PW2s1kn7jhzyKwebFF3vvtRHdWWtBV0bVfshgBzUbELLuPhuOUY_HUQQyx1RkUZxkJGPEQWdd7FY60ZaQfckr091W6XvI_UxuYs9n-gaFpgxLXasHmYgSUcFuPJvuLc-cQ1vz3GCiwwZF-s2NmnxO0gceUL2PqzhCL8U25SUzPq7UXRZl8UjRylFg1oRsI3iNhAN1Ul)

Dear Friend,

You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.**

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=155f3ce0e58c4cc6b162536aa93925de&_e=-9q2kNBMm8PWQo3qPvzZN839UdMTgm9ZXI4SU0gB_EIlmCFepZZKaetgVBwGHO0O9X3CnY0Qdy2CRMppHMbJ39FwTWQJGcL2VTAswao6_6G-OfwcWG7X9P_JqUq-1joz0Xcy7NEIDkGtRRemkqlnJz1FfiGiw17lC5bHU4hVWHR_TpTbg-DIlVw8nX214rY0RdPoWVw8uKG1qa65PUijsCd294yYwB_Aq5XooFejCQa9xdbZn46-mSp5-PW2s1kn7jhzyKwebFF3vvtRHdWWtKf635lYl2LkuKGquaHx7zUL2sdiiWerItX4TlKFQ_egx0gtzsrm84yVxPd32-ABB0L7ja05CyYRL8cNj-dniwjBv65KzIaLdTAZ72V18ndeWdNTvrGRxvXfKfJypyimkFqT0uP-UGYZ_HDzGfrjqmUp4p9RKEP59SA6wCzREwGr)

The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...

Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.
Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.
The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in "extremist ideologies" and having the potential for "domestic terrorism."
Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.**

By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty.

Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below:

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=155f3ce0e58c4cc6b162536aa93925de&_e=-9q2kNBMm8PWQo3qPvzZN839UdMTgm9ZXI4SU0gB_EIlmCFepZZKaetgVBwGHO0O9X3CnY0Qdy2CRMppHMbJ39FwTWQJGcL2VTAswao6_6G-OfwcWG7X9P_JqUq-1joz0Xcy7NEIDkGtRRemkqlnJz1FfiGiw17lC5bHU4hVWHR_TpTbg-DIlVw8nX214rY0RdPoWVw8uKG1qa65PUijsCd294yYwB_Aq5XooFejCQa9xdbZn46-mSp5-PW2s1kn7jhzyKwebFF3vvtRHdWWtMxInE2kJUpqdxLvp6VM0rVbIEjPoR_YXkTRkrCXgwLLrJbRpiZc1a0cRGpaQPtsvILiFF2D94wxBs6J_IR-D3in-lf8pHM70bsaofvDe9qH_-HPuI9WOD1WMD1sQMM2yWbd-nnDq3vhhtNa65rxzLtZivj9SnZuydMKksgrwVbQ)

Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."**

Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion."

These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties.

You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course.

**The first step is ...EDUCATION.**

Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty.

We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.**

These efforts include:

**Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable.

So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time.

Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

**This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.**

I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey/**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=155f3ce0e58c4cc6b162536aa93925de&_e=-9q2kNBMm8PWQo3qPvzZN839UdMTgm9ZXI4SU0gB_EIlmCFepZZKaetgVBwGHO0O9X3CnY0Qdy2CRMppHMbJ39FwTWQJGcL2VTAswao6_6G-OfwcWG7X9P_JqUq-1joz0Xcy7NEIDkGtRRemkqlnJz1FfiGiw17lC5bHU4hVWHR_TpTbg-DIlVw8nX214rY0RdPoWVw8uKG1qa65PUijsCd294yYwB_Aq5XooFejCQa9xdbZn46-mSp5-PW2s1kn7jhzyKwebFF3vvtRHdWWtAOz2BpIO1M1lQHEYhKNsDXJk3_yVXYRqxOKucds3DsEk7jus1EmnrHjkH3hiKLrEjtOgiursOOIbn6PZiVzIYAipdwLQaTHKUx6xBTY4B05TKHXtK3d9AOurOI6MmxcEUKUmxqxDeXw1RWJdAMNZyHUzz2v-YfEnWKOB0qnb1ny)

Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=155f3ce0e58c4cc6b162536aa93925de&_t=oCxaHhT3GxsfIkJJ_rMRUU_9NkF99WH88P4sQSVAVFe28IVTO7ZbqDyrPHaWrt-LuLtVHT2bwV7lLC4pBtkwEwmfwFc-CRzut2kiOVBkc493pyuz1NcCp5aZDiGQl9w_REOuXdlVF7gCNMUUl0TzOROoCVEMVPuU5g8z-ZqiVUc%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=155f3ce0e58c4cc6b162536aa93925de&_t=oCxaHhT3GxsfIkJJ_rMRUU_9NkF99WH88P4sQSVAVFe28IVTO7ZbqDyrPHaWrt-LuLtVHT2bwV7lLC4pBtkwE9qOQP-LDgKH7q7F2p6Kk8Q%3D).

| | | **** **Being a mom in America is difficult, costly and fraught with danger.** [**Republicans want to keep it that way. Donate to elect Democrats who will pass paid family leave, gun safety bills, and defend public schools.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquatmgZTEMuLQ1bf-_rXJuOd8kpyuJ-vdi6QSKQA6hF-99RZEQ_CVjtIwxUSUDjyCzES2mZpnl17UEMeR9Bkg8BFtAOORunQ5lxrXJqGa6_FJJEyT1ngFBOHodZcGR6s4dADtjjfN_0tj-h-kaRzipbIMdDi3i57XQMU52n_Cp7D9jcy6PwJhvAt43zpJwIvDNYqJwsitzEIVs0mlKuGszWCP2COv7FpsX3c7e9GYn-IAjlUi4HSH5XuhKwyx1PenObKH05GM7A5rUtWMludQWGk5dwwby-KtmEjnluV2ZPrrwLBwxYOyZ1N5WSXNa2QZ_I2i0BqiNWbjNJEk5ddfqSS0TYYhYMWUkZKBR4tSGdpw/46a/Wk_uYUSSRi6fc_7a5xULIw/h0/h001.swYb0DQqNyjebPPi4dbK_-bE60veNxoaiTX_VyiDbwk)

Despite their claims of supporting hard working parents and families,__ the Republican Party’s policies _do not align with this message._ Republicans have taken away our constitutional right to decide when to become mothers. They have opposed affordable childcare, mandatory coverage of maternal care, efforts to expand healthcare and education, and they have refused to defend our human rights. _They don’t value our nation’s mothers._ **Democrats fight for paid family leave, low-cost child care, gun safety, and public schools - and we need to take back Congress.** [**This Mother’s Day weekend, chip in to elect pro-woman, pro-family Democrats today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquatmgZTEMuLQ1bf-_rXJuOd8kpyuJ-vdi6QSKQA6hF-99RZEQ_CVjtIwxUSUDjyCwKugept3Kc4V-tQwSlQPuM0twis8xSOpG1gke0aYLUlcDX7kLeHudKBhb9_9g3rRVguH5aHGRssWbRv5tenrOJj4t0ddoo3h3sfU2gcgpDwcxfTHhcmr85xX5OWRBnlCscfCn8PFS7fIQfOeUmL791e1wO8te9pvPtd0eRoS9Zxp8WqYV1amjsbjFIVUgPNQwqdFrmtSNwGApEwuYJEFtJGq3h0uMZypY2IJReNwNML7wqoQxOdlAnPtCPkn2Y4TJBwsuW3fXQr6TukQo67kshlFP142bizJz5hHOS1p9Www/46a/Wk_uYUSSRi6fc_7a5xULIw/h1/h001.IIzL7abJjmm3_7HvugjtcppnxCG9xhZymNW30P5A6dY) | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquatmgZTEMuLQ1bf-_rXJuOd8kpyuJ-vdi6QSKQA6hF-99RZEQ_CVjtIwxUSUDjyCyN6cek33XPnNsBbkuhAGndI7y3_m9-qniF1lyPsndIgiUlX5iQeEl6v4_ATE2CPKv0BlNb3vfTQvSWvThNlxox0PiGp0OmzMjfWQuohU3jIAac1kZSzAkkMTt_CCHwokEYF78Y47LEg-OdYCyAU9F4mbjxtp0TiNj1JHG_pmbvcAmgdLUQZjlUAz7Dq--Wi3jofk1aJcQEyQwuurDQ5CYWdpFolx2rOBBDE6MTnVZ5ImZimwJ0OxDM10K_wNKAb3BnP4FcHx4ReXpIYWmTzKLYUU8rU3_q8-M4L4Gz5zstcA/46a/Wk_uYUSSRi6fc_7a5xULIw/h2/h001.aiB2CZPxj-UPOjQ43TgNp4IEttON-B4sQOiiI9ttsLI)

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: the Jewish principle that guides my work in the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| _Tammy Baldwin here — I wanted to make sure you saw this message from my colleague Jacky Rosen. Jacky is running for reelection in Nevada to defend our Democratic Senate majority, so I hope you'll read her update and[chip in, if you can.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-rosen.SC53au&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240512_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=2574%2E35263%2EpmEKZy)_ Peter, my work in the Senate has always been guided and motivated by the Jewish principle of "Tikkun Olam," which means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than how we found it. In fact, it's why I ran for U.S. Senate in the first place – and it's why I fight so hard each and every day to make a positive change in communities across Nevada and the country. **But to keep up these fights, I urgently need your help.** National Republicans are zeroing in on my must-win battleground seat: Dark money groups like the Koch network have started pouring millions into Nevada to flip it red. **And even worse,_The Cook Political Report_ recently downgraded my Senate race from “Lean Democrat” to a “Toss Up.”** I'm relying on your immediate grassroots support to defend this seat so I can keep fighting for progress. That's why I'm humbly asking: [**Will you please chip in $10 or more to my campaign and Tammy Baldwin today to help me win in Nevada and continue making a difference for you and your family?**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-rosen.SC53au&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240512_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2574%2E35263%2EpmEKZy) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jacky Rosen and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-rosen.ol7LOA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240512_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2574%2E35263%2EpmEKZy)

name: Chuck Morse
subject: Happy Mother's Day to New Hampshire Moms!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse, Dan Norris Treasurer
body:
| | | |
---
| | Derek,
As we celebrate Mother's Day, I want to take a moment to express my heartfelt appreciation to all the incredible mothers in New Hampshire. Your dedication, love, and sacrifice are the bedrock of our communities and the driving force behind the next generation of Granite Staters.
I also want to give a special shoutout to my amazing wife, Susan, for being such a wonderful mom to our daughter Emma. Your unwavering love, guidance, and support shaped Emma into the remarkable young woman she is today, and I am endlessly grateful for everything you do.
To all the "Moms for Morse" out there, your support and enthusiasm mean the world to this campaign. Your energy and passion help to drive this movement and I am honored to have you by my side as we work together to build a brighter future for New Hampshire.
Whether you're a stay-at-home mom, a working mom, a single mom, or anything in between, I want to wish you a Happy Mother's Day. **Your love and dedication make our communities stronger, and I hope you feel appreciated not just today, but every day.**
Let's continue to work together to create a New Hampshire where every mother and every family can thrive.
Once again, Happy Mother's Day to all the amazing moms out there!
---
| | In Liberty, Team Morse
---
| | **_[With over a hundred members on our Moms for Morse team, join our group of Granite State Moms motivated to elect a Governor who will be an advocate for the next generation!](https://link.email.chuckmorsefornh.)_**
---
| [Join the Moms for Morse Team!](https://link.email.chuckmorsefornh.)
---
| | [](https://link.email.chuckmorsefornh.)
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://link.email.chuckmorsefornh.)
---
| | Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse, Dan Norris Treasurer. P.O. Box 106, North Salem,
NH 03073
---

clean_body: BY TWO | Patriot, I'm officially losing in the polls, and to catch up, I'm asking Patriots like YOU to step up and help me reach my emergency midnight deadline. | Ruben Gallego (thanks to his Democrat dark money) is beating me in the polls by 2%. His propaganda campaign finally moved the needle. If we don't do something now, this will only get worse. 2% may seem like nothing, but we can't afford to trail behind Ruben. 2% can become 3%, which can become 5%, you get the picture. The further ahead in the polls he is, the more money the left will throw at him, and the more ads he will run depicting himself as a "moderate" despite his 100% radical record in Congress. This is why my midnight deadline is so important. I want to launch a HUGE ad campaign that will show the people of Arizona the TRUTH about radical Ruben Gallego. We can't afford to let Joe Biden keep the Senate and give him another radical ally in Ruben Gallego. They would destroy this country and sell YOU out to the Liberal Establishment in a heartbeat. The road to the Senate Majority and the Presidency runs right through Arizona. I'm counting on your support. Anything and EVERYTHING you could spare makes a HUGE difference in the fight to Take Back America and SAVE ARIZONA! Thank you, Kari Lake Candidate for U.S. Senate in Arizona Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate If you'd like to donate by mail, .

body:
Losing just two seats could pose a grave threat to our democracy and our Senate majority. | |
---
Derek, look at these 23 states: Arizona.
California.
Connecticut.
Delaware.
Hawaii.
Maine.
Maryland.
Massachusetts.
Michigan.
Minnesota.
Montana.
Nevada.
New Jersey.
New Mexico.
New York.
Ohio.
Pennsylvania.
Rhode Island.
Vermont.
Virginia.
Washington.
West Virginia.
Wisconsin. What do these 23 states have in common? **These are the states with Senate seats that are key to Democrats’ majority** \-- the states that will decide control of the Senate on Election Day 2024. **Losing just _two_ of these seats could pose a grave threat to our Senate majority AND our democracy.** Mitch McConnell and his MAGA allies are hard at work handpicking candidates and funneling millions and millions into these states to tip the scales in their favor. **That’s where you come in, Derek. By pitching in today, you’ll play a significant role in helping us defend our Senate majority and in reelecting Democrats like Sherrod Brown, Jon Tester, and Jacky Rosen.** This team has stepped up time and time again, and now, we’re asking you to step up once more and support Democrats nationwide, up and down the ballot. **Please, pitch in $7 today:**

clean_body: Losing just two seats could pose a grave threat to our democracy and our Senate majority. | | Derek, look at these 23 states: Arizona. California. Connecticut. Delaware. Hawaii. Maine. Maryland. Massachusetts. Michigan. Minnesota. Montana. Nevada. New Jersey. New Mexico. New York. Ohio. Pennsylvania. Rhode Island. Vermont. Virginia. Washington. West Virginia. Wisconsin. What do these 23 states have in common? These are the states with Senate seats that are key to Democrats’ majority \-- the states that will decide control of the Senate on Election Day 2024. Losing just two of these seats could pose a grave threat to our Senate majority AND our democracy. Mitch McConnell and his MAGA allies are hard at work handpicking candidates and funneling millions and millions into these states to tip the scales in their favor. That’s where you come in, Derek. By pitching in today, you’ll play a significant role in helping us defend our Senate majority and in reelecting Democrats like Sherrod Brown, Jon Tester, and Jacky Rosen. This team has stepped up time and time again, and now, we’re asking you to step up once more and support Democrats nationwide, up and down the ballot. Dear Peter,
We are on the cusp of a historic breakthrough.
For the first time in over two centuries, an independent candidate has a real shot at the White House—and that candidate is Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
Voter frustration is at an all-time high, with two-thirds of Americans seeking an alternative to the typical Biden-Trump showdown. This immense desire for change, combined with the support of Independents—who now outnumber both major parties—positions RFK Jr. as a true contender.
A recent national Zogby poll reveals that Kennedy is the only candidate with a real chance to beat Trump. Yet, a critical hurdle remains: _20% of Americans are still unaware of RFK Jr.’s candidacy._
This is not merely a challenge— _it's a tremendous opportunity_.
Each dollar you contribute helps bridge this gap, turning every conversation into a potential supporter and moving our campaign forward.
Your donation gives us the opportunity to spread Bobby’s vision wider and ensure every voter knows they have a choice—a candidate who genuinely represents the people.
[Every contribution amplifies our message, builds momentum, and brings us closer to the White House.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20_percent_5_12_24_nd1&n=3)

name: Brian Mast - U.S. Army Veteran
subject: Time to start acting like the home of the brave again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
Biden lost his backbone

| [ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e40d54da6e3d454d91933b8872f325b6&_e=RroEsbPJmZl17npyu_WTmrD_5n_zkeUYlohcL_G3HcKrbp935YuEdRfeqX5hduUovoWTyH3dEfQ3obhPlt-_KjQc2cmR2PfmixBgqajFYSIJ_2dzMFCv3N4D1xLuCBVis7w2fGovvoPuF9O518CHQZ4Kzm3r8LjGf-xB0q54sYJ2o3wCDXEXN_n3aWavvErF0k5eYqJg5-CR70oalRWwqfJRZ716pIZF9G8ovCg_JsZ9O29hT-RBCXFyOzOdwEeJf00DMyVgj2pl3uT7GJs6N0IDBQKmlTgG7hcaghkXIQvQs9YR8sTCi2GasqSwCuCFfaRvvqooVBAo1ponoXsZUXYaKnzMSoPF8vBfXPkNvFtvitNcI9iI_nxw-pVUV2cr)
---
Patriot,

If you're getting this email, it's because I believe that you are a member of the America First movement and that you agree with me on one critical issue:

**Joe Biden is harming our nation.**

I'm reaching out to members of our community because I know that things look bleak right now across the board — high inflation, chaotic college protests, rising antisemitism, foolish federal funding bills, attacks on the American dream — the list goes on.

We know that **Joe Biden lost his backbone a long time ago.**

The duty of the President of the United States is to project strength and act quickly to stop all threats to the American people.

Yet, Joe Biden continues to project _weakness_ by:

* Allowing radical antisemitism to fester all over college campuses
* Standing by while our border is overrun by criminals and terrorists
* Wrecking our economy with skyrocketing inflation
* Spending American tax dollars on wasteful foreign projects

**The bottom line is Joe Biden is bending over backward for everything except America's public safety.**

**The result:** A weak and woke America that is vulnerable to attacks from foreign threats and radicals in our own country.

This is the exact opposite of what America needs from our leader.

**America is not a weak or lawless nation! We are the land of the free and the home of the brave — _it's time we start acting like it again!_ **

If you agree with me that we need to intervene before it's too late and Joe Biden runs our nation into the ground, **[I need you on my team](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e40d54da6e3d454d91933b8872f325b6&_e=RroEsbPJmZl17npyu_WTmrD_5n_zkeUYlohcL_G3HcKrbp935YuEdRfeqX5hduUovoWTyH3dEfQ3obhPlt-_KjQc2cmR2PfmixBgqajFYSIJ_2dzMFCv3N4D1xLuCBVis7w2fGovvoPuF9O518CHQZ4Kzm3r8LjGf-xB0q54sYJ2o3wCDXEXN_n3aWavvErF0k5eYqJg5-CR70oalRWwqfJRZ716pIZF9G8ovCg_JsYbs6Vc968vy0794IlHnGJPUukTcj-M6AEfHitmkzR4uttOUqTMfqzEwma3_rXOozRV1Mr8mxI-9mO6Urf6mca4SRFASMKJJI7XEkQExyhG5mihqfC_m0VjI-6pz10ZNFCKAIdaP32EoBBs5RV2Fg0o).**

Serving in the U.S. Army I learned the power of having a strong team that you can rely on. Heck, I wouldn't even be here today if it wasn't for my brothers and sisters in arms rushing to haul me out after my legs were blown off in a terrorist bomb explosion.

All of this to say — we can't rely on Joe Biden, but I feel like I can count on you.

If you want to secure the future of our country, **[please join me today](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e40d54da6e3d454d91933b8872f325b6&_e=RroEsbPJmZl17npyu_WTmrD_5n_zkeUYlohcL_G3HcKrbp935YuEdRfeqX5hduUovoWTyH3dEfQ3obhPlt-_KjQc2cmR2PfmixBgqajFYSIJ_2dzMFCv3N4D1xLuCBVis7w2fGovvoPuF9O518CHQZ4Kzm3r8LjGf-xB0q54sYJ2o3wCDXEXN_n3aWavvErF0k5eYqJg5-CR70oalRWwqfJRZ716pIZF9G8ovCg_JsZtEInend7l8WBOaC_vEAAfm8LWTGbQUMnQn8vmyfj5G0jA08Xn2xihZHL2S4FxfFHbhwYAouaJ24eDtcmSE8TLCNkc7VVAtF6TidXlpbApVNF8aCoynKI5nZtZMJ9oWH80vCvIoJF077JW6GoUx820).**

clean_body: Biden lost his backbone | Patriot, If you're getting this email, it's because I believe that you are a member of the America First movement and that you agree with me on one critical issue: Joe Biden is harming our nation. I'm reaching out to members of our community because I know that things look bleak right now across the board — high inflation, chaotic college protests, rising antisemitism, foolish federal funding bills, attacks on the American dream — the list goes on. We know that Joe Biden lost his backbone a long time ago. The duty of the President of the United States is to project strength and act quickly to stop all threats to the American people. Yet, Joe Biden continues to project weakness by: Allowing radical antisemitism to fester all over college campuses Standing by while our border is overrun by criminals and terrorists Wrecking our economy with skyrocketing inflation Spending American tax dollars on wasteful foreign projects The bottom line is Joe Biden is bending over backward for everything except America's public safety. The result: A weak and woke America that is vulnerable to attacks from foreign threats and radicals in our own country. This is the exact opposite of what America needs from our leader. America is not a weak or lawless nation! We are the land of the free and the home of the brave — it's time we start acting like it again! If you agree with me that we need to intervene before it's too late and Joe Biden runs our nation into the ground, . Serving in the U.S. Army I learned the power of having a strong team that you can rely on. Heck, I wouldn't even be here today if it wasn't for my brothers and sisters in arms rushing to haul me out after my legs were blown off in a terrorist bomb explosion. All of this to say — we can't rely on Joe Biden, but I feel like I can count on you. If you want to secure the future of our country, . Stand with me, Brian Mast U.S. Army Veteran | | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS Hon. Brian Mast is a retired member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. | Mast for Congress · PO Box 3016 · Stuart, FL 34995 · USA

clean_body: | | | Peter, I’ve got to be honest with you - people are thinking that Florida is a shoo-in victory for Republicans. I know we’ve had incredible success turning our state into the freest in the country, but we can’t take anything for granted. Just during his last election, Rick Scott won by just .01% of the vote. Just a few thousand votes saved our state from falling to the Democrats, and not too long-ago, Obama won Florida. The Democrats are spending MILLIONS to prop up Biden and down-ballot liberals. | | | | | | Here is an update about the FL senate race: It’s no secret that Rick’s Democrat opponent is buddy-buddy with socialists like AOC. She idolizes Nancy Pelosi and when she gets to the Senate, she’s going to be just another swamp creature who’s more interested in bumping high-powered elbows than doing what’s right for America. She’s going to block EVERYTHING we achieved under President Trump. Too much is at risk, Peter, and that is why I’m reaching out now. We need your help to fuel our campaign. name: Gallego, Ruben
subject: Kari Lake thinks the January Sixers are patriots. I think that anyone who supports those terrorists and traitors shouldn’t be allowed anywhere near the U.S. Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
All I had was a pen |
---
I won’t ever forget it, Peter.

Standing on the House floor. Hearing shouts, pounding, breaking glass. Barricading the door, teaching my colleagues how to use their gas masks. Texting my staff, telling them to hide.

I carried a rifle in Iraq and all I had to defend myself on January 6th was a pen. But I was ready to fight.

And after that day, Trump’s loyalists crawled right back to him. Witnessing them reject what they lived through, watching them ignore the testimony of the police officers that defended us that day while they were beaten, bloodied, pepper sprayed, cursed at... it makes me sick.

Kari Lake thinks the January Sixers are patriots who were “invited in” — she even campaigns with them.

I think anyone who supports those terrorists and traitors shouldn’t be allowed anywhere near the U.S. Senate.

This race in Arizona is just me and her. It’s on us to stop her march to more power and influence. Whoever wins in Arizona is going to determine which party holds the Senate, and could even decide whether Trump takes back the White House.

I need you with me, and I need you to take this race seriously.

[Please split a donation of $15 — that or anything you can give — between my campaign and Defeat Republicans to crush Kari Lake’s campaign and defend our democracy. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84831444/472765796/1387042203?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240512_2_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0NWIwNzljLWFlMTAtZWYxMS05NmYzLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5HWNJee1Tzs6a-dL8MmJW3i_NJWkWM96pOq00HOG2Es=)

clean_body: All I had was a pen | I won’t ever forget it, Peter. Standing on the House floor. Hearing shouts, pounding, breaking glass. Barricading the door, teaching my colleagues how to use their gas masks. Texting my staff, telling them to hide. I carried a rifle in Iraq and all I had to defend myself on January 6th was a pen. But I was ready to fight. And after that day, Trump’s loyalists crawled right back to him. Witnessing them reject what they lived through, watching them ignore the testimony of the police officers that defended us that day while they were beaten, bloodied, pepper sprayed, cursed at... it makes me sick. Kari Lake thinks the January Sixers are patriots who were “invited in” — she even campaigns with them. I think anyone who supports those terrorists and traitors shouldn’t be allowed anywhere near the U.S. Senate. This race in Arizona is just me and her. It’s on us to stop her march to more power and influence. Whoever wins in Arizona is going to determine which party holds the Senate, and could even decide whether Trump takes back the White House. I need you with me, and I need you to take this race seriously. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. | = = = = Thanks for your support. As we gear up for one of the toughest elections of our lives, it means a lot to have you behind me.
