name: LCV Shop
subject: Celebrate Mother Earth This Mother's Day
body:
Reduce your impact, max out your savings

There are many ways to celebrate Earth Day and here at the LCV Shop, we want to make it simple for every day to be Earth Day. Using eco-friendly products and shopping sustainably is something anyone can take part in.

It's no secret that eco-friendly products can offer a way to reduce, reuse, and recycle that considers the lifecycle of products from purchase to disposal. LCV Shop products message on leading issues such as clean water, national parks, and democracy but there's more than meets the eye. They also incorporate sustainability down to the fibers, in the way products are produced and partners worked with. Through organic or recycled materials, union partners, or U.S. production, the LCV Shop aims to protect our environment and ensure a healthy planet for future generations.

This month, we're spotlighting just a handful of products that help turn each day into Earth Day. Shop your values with the LCV Shop! By conserving water, carrying reusable shopping bags, or choosing non-toxic chemicals for use around the home, you can make a huge difference doing what may seem like a small act.

https://links.messages.lcv.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: NH Senate Republicans
subject: A Message from Senate President Jeb Bradley
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Hampshire Senate Republicans PAC
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yNDc4NjI4NjExMDIwNTU5NTUzJmM9YTVlMiZlPTE5MjgmYj0xMzE4NzgwNDE5JmQ9bjluOG82ag==.EJ-RtHXVQzcQqJ4q_nFF8E7fRjBV3YqMl7W2TJxOf_k)
| | | |
---
| |
---
|
---
---
| |
---
| Friends,
I have had the honor of serving the state of New Hampshire for almost 32 years. First in the New Hampshire House, then in the U.S. Congress, and finally here in the New Hampshire Senate. We are blessed to live in such a wonderful state and nation, and I feel fortunate indeed to have represented the Lakes Region and Mount Washington Valley in Concord and the First Congressional District in Washington. I have enjoyed working together to solve some of the most challenging issues that have faced our state and in a small way, hope that I have made it a little better for our future generation. But there comes a time for all of us when it’s time to say goodbye. And for me, that time has come. I will not be running again to represent Senate District 3. I will leave with gratitude and incredible memories, as well as confidence in my Republican colleagues. I know our state is in good hands. I want to thank my wonderful wife Karen who has supported my service to the state for many years. I never could have done this without her. Thank you so much Karen for your love and support. I also want to thank the voters who have honored me with representing them in this wonderful building. As far as my future plans go, Karen and I (and our dog Napolean!) will be spending more time with children and grandchildren, traveling, and of course hiking. While I am retiring, I will only be a phone call away. And in case I haven’t publicized this enough, it’s [603-387-2365](tel:603-387-2365)! \- Senate President Jeb Bradley

---
| |
---
| P.S. While I will not be seeking reelection myself, I will continue to work as Chairman of the NH Senate Republicans to protect and expand the GOP majority -- and we will need your help more than ever! clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Friends, I have had the honor of serving the state of New Hampshire for almost 32 years. First in the New Hampshire House, then in the U.S. Congress, and finally here in the New Hampshire Senate. We are blessed to live in such a wonderful state and nation, and I feel fortunate indeed to have represented the Lakes Region and Mount Washington Valley in Concord and the First Congressional District in Washington. I have enjoyed working together to solve some of the most challenging issues that have faced our state and in a small way, hope that I have made it a little better for our future generation. But there comes a time for all of us when it’s time to say goodbye. And for me, that time has come. I will not be running again to represent Senate District 3. I will leave with gratitude and incredible memories, as well as confidence in my Republican colleagues. I know our state is in good hands. I want to thank my wonderful wife Karen who has supported my service to the state for many years. I never could have done this without her. Thank you so much Karen for your love and support. I also want to thank the voters who have honored me with representing them in this wonderful building. As far as my future plans go, Karen and I (and our dog Napolean!) will be spending more time with children and grandchildren, traveling, and of course hiking. While I am retiring, I will only be a phone call away. And in case I haven’t publicized this enough, it’s tel:603-387-2365! \- Senate President Jeb Bradley | | | P.S. While I will not be seeking reelection myself, I will continue to work as Chairman of the NH Senate Republicans to protect and expand the GOP majority -- and we will need your help more than ever! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | via NH Senate Republicans PAC | | | | | | Paid for by New Hampshire Senate Republicans PAC. Jeb Bradley, Chairman | | P.O. Box 30, Concord NH 03301 United States | | ---|--- You received this email because you signed up on our website, donated to our organization, or made a purchase from us._

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: my grandmother remains one of my biggest role models
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I carry her wisdom with me to this day
| | |
---
Look, big change starts small.
That's a lesson that my grandmother, Polly Noonan, first taught me decades ago. Well before most women had any political power, my grandmother organized women into a political force in Albany.
By the time I was in elementary school, I was tagging along with her to all kinds of Democratic campaign headquarters, rallies and events. She remains one of my biggest role models — and I carry her wisdom with me to this day. **She taught me that my voice matters, that women’s voices matter and that grassroots activism matters. And she showed me how campaigns are won by the people who put in the work like the volunteers knocking doors, stuffing envelopes, turning out the vote and donating what they can, when they can.**
For decades, first by my grandmother's side and then as a public servant myself, I've seen how those small grassroots actions all add up to victory on Election Day. That's how Democrats defeated the odds in 2022 to defend and even expand our Senate majority. And that's why I know that we can win again in 2024.
With Democrats defending 23 seats, the odds are certainly stacked against us. And after the 2022 red wave in New York, Republicans here are already targeting my seat for defeat. **But when people like you get off the sidelines and chip in even just $3, eventually we'll build a grassroots movement capable of defeating even the GOP's wealthiest megadonors.**
**[So please, will you chip in $3 or $25 or whatever you can spare today to help save our Senate majority by building a grassroots movement one grassroots gift at a time? I refuse to accept money from corporate PACs, so these grassroots donations are truly critical to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84831619/472766380/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5033-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTkzZjNhOC1iMjEwLWVmMTEtOTZmMy02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SJJ3HJvpqKFMWpluXEutkBwILBvcVI52701XAWxT7kw=)**

name: Tanya Lloyd
subject: Let’s Take Better Care of Our Mothers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TANYA LLOYD FOR CONGRESS _ _](https://mgcp02
body:
Congress Needs A First Grade Teacher! | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=66414a158996120dfb74836a&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tanyafortx27.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6641491c91c2ca04673ef7b7%26ss_email_id%3D66414a158996120dfb74836a%26ss_campaign_name%3DLet%25E2%2580%2599s%2BTake%2BBetter%2BCare%2Bof%2BOur%2BMothers%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-05-12T23%253A00%253A56Z&w=658f0ec36f3fe00284167a1e&c=b_6641491c91c2ca04673ef7b7&l=en-US&s=VD5nsCCyIUTlZHXis1_FC522zes%3D)
---
|
## **Let’s Take Better Care of Our Mothers**
---
Hi Peter,I would like to wish all of the moms out there a heartfelt Happy Mother’s Day. Unfortunately, Texas has some of the worst maternal mortality rates in the country, and they [keep getting worse](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=66414a158996120dfb74836a&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.axios.com%2Flocal%2Fdallas%2F2023%2F07%2F24%2Fmaternal-mortality-in-texas&w=658f0ec36f3fe00284167a1e&c=b_6641491c91c2ca04673ef7b7&l=en-US&s=_NWVo5USeDNvLBJOgjxlTMxF0MU%3D). This Mother’s Day, let’s celebrate our moms by supporting policies and policymakers who respect them, too.In Congress, I will stand up for mothers by protecting and investing in women’s healthcare, reproductive rights, and policies that improve the lives of working families. If you agree, [please invest in my campaign](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=66414a158996120dfb74836a&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Ftanyafortx27&w=658f0ec36f3fe00284167a1e&c=b_6641491c91c2ca04673ef7b7&l=en-US&s=xHNVRWIvwT39A2JA3YjevmE7hzA%3D) as we face off against an extreme anti-woman politician.

name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: Marsha Blackburn's Backwards Policies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
This MAGA Senator's track record is frightening to say the least, take a look...
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maga-os?refcode=long)
---
| | |
---
|
## Marsha Blackburn: MAGA Extremist
---
| [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maga-os?refcode=blackburn)
---
| Team Dems: We're standing at a pivotal moment in our country's history. Republican extremists dominate that side of the Senate, not to mention the disgrace of having Mike Johnson as Speaker of the House. Today, we’re reaching out because your voice and support are absolutely critical in our battle for a more inclusive and equitable America. Let’s oust these aging bigots from our Senate!
---
| [ Chip In & Fight Back→](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maga-os?refcode=blackburn)
---
| As a Democratic PAC committed to progress and equality, we cannot turn a blind eye to the damaging impact of Senator Marsha Blackburn's conservative policies. Her stance on LGBTQ rights, abortion access, immigration, and healthcare represents a dangerous leap backward for our nation. **Let's unpack this.** Senator Blackburn has a track record of opposing fundamental rights for LGBTQ+ individuals, completely contradicting our core belief in equality for all. Her outright opposition to gay marriage and work to repeal Title VII of the Civil Rights Act demonstrate her support for bigotry, in its purest form. **But that's not all.** Her relentless opposition to the Affordable Care Act (ACA) has created severe repercussions, limiting crucial healthcare access for countless Americans, especially those from marginalized backgrounds. The ACA has been a lifeline for many, and Blackburn’s stance is entirely unconscienable given that two-thirds of Tennessee voters oppose its repeal. **Let's talk about reproductive rights.** Senator Blackburn's anti-abortion stance and her spreading of misinformation regarding reproductive healthcare directly jeopardize the autonomy and rights of women. Her tweets about Planned Parenthood selling ‘baby parts’ and her vocal opposition to Roe v Wade are deeply troubling and represent the worst our senate has to offer. **Now, onto something concerning beyond measure.** Her support for baseless conspiracy theories, such as the debunked claims about President Obama's birthplace, is an attack on the very fabric of our democracy. It creates divisions and distracts us from urgent matters. And let's not overlook her support for Trump’s 2017 Muslim ban – a blatant endorsement of discrimination based upon race and religion. We envision an America that celebrates diversity, champions inclusivity, and guarantees equal opportunities for everyone. Together, we must vehemently oppose this toxic bigotry and fight for a fairer, more compassionate society. [**Your contribution to our cause empowers us to amplify the voices that need to be heard, advocate for policies that uplift marginalized communities, and pave the way for a senate we can be proud of. Please chip in today to defeat MAGA Senators like Marsha Blackburn→**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maga-os?refcode=blackburn)
---
| If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---
| | | | [ Chip in $15](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maga-os?refcode=blackburn&amount=15&express_lane=true)

clean_body: | | | Election Day Eve is on MONDAY, Peter, so you know what that means...we’re celebrating! We’re hosting a rally in Bear Square at Riverdale Park Station on Monday May 13th from 6:30 - 8 PM ET. | | | We’ve been working hard to make sure Marylanders know Angela’s the best candidate to lead our state in the US Senate, and we need to sustain our momentum until every last vote is cast! This campaign will be won by the many, not the money. Let’s make sure all our friends have plans to vote on May 14th for Angela Alsobrooks and then rally together the night before our Democratic primary. | | See you soon & bring your friends! – Team Alsobrooks | | | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, | | | | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click . | Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate Alsobrooks for Senate PO Box 6058 Largo, MD 20792

subject: We won’t keep you for long. Promise.

Hi Peter — we know you’re busy enjoying your Sunday, so we won’t keep you here for long. Here’s the deal: We’re about to cross the halfway point of the fundraising quarter, and our grassroots momentum is in _deep_ water. It’s not just us — we’re hearing that practically every Democratic Senate campaign out there is facing tough times right now. We won’t dig out of this hole by the end of the day, but every little bit counts. And if everyone who’s read this far chipped in $3, then we think we can pick things up before Wednesday’s mid-quarter deadline. That would help us get over the hump. We have three very important things to share with you. | | |
---
Peter **We have three very important things to share with you.** 1\. Donald Trump’s campaign is reportedly raising $1 million a day on top of the massive $50 million mega-fundraiser they held in April. 2\. In response, we’ve set a daily fundraising goal to help us match his fundraising and keep us on track to reelect Joe and Kamala. 3\. We need every member of this grassroots team to step up and pitch in to make sure Joe and Kamala get four more years in the White House. So with our deadline rapidly approaching, we have to ask: [Will you make your first $25 donation to help us hit our daily fundraising goal? body:
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMtO6zAQhp9msmsUj-1Mz8KL05awqITKBonl4As1sknqJER9e9RQ2M7l-z_9nIcUw9UA7QDxHN0IiCD_A-Lldcll_sjHx83J7x42l_Yp69sW94A4XQf_d3qn1D5zTLcpHSpnZHCNqrwRJLTWJNW_6mwa65RqLQWm1jHpN6t46yQKJT1T4CoabFA1WiBKhUj1VrTBB9KtFILZIqhmzak5-xIti3FauJS-z7Xtc5XMeZqGcRXrALul9PXnbJOfx58322fA7q4M2H0Bds9bwlnv-fACsltbkIfh6E4BnShVMW5YYkpxbAlU8_6L-Q4AAP__k0FgDw)

Experiencing "senior moments"?

Then you need to take this simple 1-word dementia test.

According to the renowned journal, Neurology, if you fail this test...

You have a 95% chance of suffering from dementia in the future.

This **[1-word dementia](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jr1ugzAUhZ_msgXZ139hYGhK06FS1bWjY18HNxiIcYLy9lVQ1fU7R-d8Ns1DDI8WzAEQ--gXQATxAojX7zXl20_6eN990eFtd9WfST1TfAXE8pjpv_q3UlOycXhS01W-FcEzWVHLDVdKGSGbqm8Zs34fGsNOMhA6rVE5407YYOMVNbyKLTKUTHFEIRFNvec6UDBKC86tdQiSbT-1TZSjs3wpq815mlLtplQNbV_KvGxiR8BjP821G6K7nOx4qUcqTyyONoQ4RFsIRJdQ8DOgvtPopwyiG-mWp9LneAfUJXoQHZ1tWPO4QWKKc5RVbv28xmGIizYg2XmzclP6DQAA__-UAmgc)** test is a MUST if you've been...

\- Losing your keys...
\- Forgetting names or tiny details...
\- Or forgetting why you walked into a room...

Because these are red flags of memory loss.

And let's be real, these "senior moments" can turn into full-blown Alzheimer's so easily.

On the bright side, over 32,477 adults have taken this test & reclaimed a sharp mind.

**[Take the 1-word dementia test here (before it's too late) ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jr1ugzAUhZ_msgXZ139hYGhK06FS1bWjY18HNxiIcYLy9lVQ1fU7R-d8Ns1DDI8WzAEQ--gXQATxAojX7zXl20_6eN990eFtd9WfST1TfAXE8pjpv_q3UlOycXhS01W-FcEzWVHLDVdKGSGbqm8Zs34fGsNOMhA6rVE5407YYOMVNbyKLTKUTHFEIRFNvec6UDBKC86tdQiSbT-1TZSjs3wpq815mlLtplQNbV_KvGxiR8BjP821G6K7nOx4qUcqTyyONoQ4RFsIRJdQ8DOgvtPopwyiG-mWp9LneAfUJXoQHZ1tWPO4QWKKc5RVbv28xmGIizYg2XmzclP6DQAA__-UAmgc)**

It’s Spike and Kali, friend — and we don't mean to hound you, but this is important. It's Mother's Day!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84832486/472769710/-1229960802?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1208-su-nd&refcode=jtk1208-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTU5ZjBlNTgtYmExMC1lZjExLTk2ZjMtNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=K2I0C3N10GwKag9r5QXNVeCzcwJequuAOtt0X3pfWQI=&emci=562e7271-ed0e-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&emdi=a59f0e58-ba10-ef11-96f3-6045bdd9e096&ceid=3969733)
Our mom, Debbie, is real busy running a battleground race for Senate to defeat Rick Scott here in Florida. So we really want to give Mom the most tail-waggingly _paw-fect_ gift. **But to do that, we need your help! **
Our mom is the BEST mom out there, and you might think we’re biased toward the person who gives us our treats, but trust us, we’re not. Sure, she plays with us, takes us on long walks, and gives us yummy snacks, but she does so much more than that. # [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=6442%2E5257348%2EJ5S496)
Derek — We'll keep this brief (less than 100 words!).
Our campaign is facing our mid-quarter fundraising deadline in just three days, and _**our fundraising simply isn't where we need it to be.**_
